TEXT.Text: Wake up! Wyvern(4)
Speak with Edeline

Is this a Wyvern egg? I have seen drawings of it in books, but I never thought I would see one with my own two eyes...%% ({C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is listening to your story calmly.)%% I see. This egg was delivered while the mother Wyvern was still recovering from her bad health. It's just like a premature human baby...%%

I don't know what to do except make an incubator for the Wyvern egg. I need a lot of materials to make the incubator but, there is only one place near here that you can find them. %% That's at Dr. Farrell's laboratory located down in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in Port of the Winds. Be careful though. {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is filled with poisonous gas. You won't survive down there very long if you don't have a gas mask. If you want to go down there and find the materials for me, I'll give you an emergency gas mask to wear.
Don't you feel sorry for the Wyvern that died after she left this egg?
Wow, you are so brave. Here is the emergency gas mask, you will need it!
Magic Book
Portable Magic book

Are you sure you know how to use it? My grandpa always told me to make sure you've read the instructions before you start work.%% Well. Would you test If you can extract magical force without problems first?

Now listen very carefully. This can be a little tricky.%% What you have to do is make a Portable Magic Book. Use the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Extract Magical Force Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and create a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Magic Book{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Once you bring me the book, you are done.
Nothing is easy.
Go and make it yourself. I have my own things I need to do.
Hm, as I expected, the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Magic Book{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has been successfully created. Now I can tell my grandpa that I helped a customer today as well! Thank you always.
Are you kidding me?! You lost the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Extract Magical Force Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?! Ah... Here, I shall give you another. Don't lose this one!
Bitter Chocolate Cake
Deliver the Chocolate Cake to Sofia
Oh dear, I'm in trouble. Huh? It's nice to meet you %name%. I'm afraid I might break a nice girl's heart.%% If you do not help me, she may fall into never ending sadness. Can you help me?

At this time of year many women send me small valentines gifts. I am very happy to receive such gifts. But...%% The chocolate cake Sofia sent me is very very... I don't want to say it out loud. Just taste a piece.%% (You try a piece of the cake.....it's really bitter)%% Yes! The look on your face says it all. I can't just tell Sofia that her cooking is terrible though.%% I'm sorry but would you take this cake to Sofia and ask her to try a piece? I'm sure then she will realise what the cake tastes like.
Are you going to just stand by and let this young girl fall into depression?
I love a good sugary chocolate cake to make me feel better.
What? Rony sent me this chocolate cake to me? This is the cake I made! Does he want to share the cake?%% (Sofia tastes the cake)%% Yuk! This tastes terrible!
You lost the chocolate cake?? No worries! Good thing she sent me more than one! Here's another.
Where is the chocolate cake? I will taste it if you have the cake... Please go back and get the cake please!
Master Chocolatier
Speak with Gordon
This is strange! It's so weird! My Chocolate Cake should not taste like this. I used chocolate created by the famous Master Chocolatier, the Gingerbread Man.%% There must be another explanation....

Yes I made the chocolate cake, but I didn't try it! I am a good cook, but the chocolate I used was made by the famous Master Chocolatier.%% The Gingerbread Man's chocolate is well known for tasting heavenly, I made a reservation for some over a month ago! My friends told me that the taste of his chocolate had changed but I didn't believe them....%% I think I will ask Gordon for some help. I cannot leave the bank, would you speak to Gordon for me?
Oh well. I guess I will eat this bitter chocolate cake Rony send back to me and feel sorry for myself.
Really, is my cooking terrible? It's not right? Please tell me it's not.
Huh? The chocolate made by the Master Chocolatier has become bitter? Hmm, some similar incidents have been reported. I will do some investigation and get back to you.
Riding Pet 1st Class Promotion
Battle Pet Advancement Kit

%class%, you also have a riding pet. Your pet has already reached the highest level it can achieve before you get your next class promotion. Your pet will be able to get a battle function when you can proceed with the class promotion. Come back to me then and I'll tell you how to do it.

It's very simple. Find {C=0xFF00863C/}Pet Merchant Amy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me. It's very easy but it will cost you a few gold, I hope you have been saving all of your spare copper! You know that I'm a pet merchant, don't you?
Ah, poor riding pet...
You can obtain a {C=0xFFFF0000/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from a {C=0xFF00863C/}Pet Merchant{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Here, you see the Evolution Crystal? Using this Crystal your pet can get their first job advancement..
Distressed Master Chocolatier
Bakery Guard
Candy Shop Guard
Icecream Store Guard

Just as I thought! The Gingerbread Man learnt how to make chocolate from his teacher, ChocoChoco.%% The taste of the chocolate all depends on how he feels when he is making it.%% The Gingerbread Man was always cheerful so ChocoChoco taught the Gingerbread Man how to make it.%% It seems the Gingerbread Man is trouble however. Can you help me?

I've heard there is a strange group who call themselves the Love Haters at the {C=0xFF016295/}Master Chocolatiers House{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I am worried that they may be doing something to the Master Chocolatier, the Gingerbread Man!%% Please go and defeat the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bakery Guard{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Candy Shop Guard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Icecream Store Guard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} who are patrolling there.
If you refuse to help, I guess I'll have to do it. Cough cough, Awe. My back. As I get older, I get more and more aches and pains.
What's happening between the Love Haters and the Master Chocolatier, the Gingerbread Man?
Hmm. So the Love Haters are interfering when the Gingerbread Man is working? But why are they interfering with his work?
Sweet Attack
Well Done Gingerbread Man
Undercooked Gingerbread Man
Chocolate Cookie

Although we are still not sure what the Lover Haters aim is I have discovered a rival to the Gingerbread Man!%% Cinnamonbread Man!%% I believe Cinnamonbread Man is the one in control of the Love Haters. Can you help us stop the Love Haters?

The Gingerbread Man had a teach called ChocoChoco who had a total of only two students. His other student was called Cinnamonbread Man, he was a very strange guy. He calls himself the rival of the Gingerbread Man.%% I'm guessing this is because the teacher passed on a recipe only to the Gingerbread Man and not to him, which made him bitter inside and explains how he is acting now.%% Firstly we have to stop the Love Haters from interfering with the Gingerbread Man...%% The Love Haters have dispatched {C=0xFFFF5917/}Well Done{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Undercooked Gingerbread Men{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, as well as {C=0xFFFF5917/}Chocolate Cookies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to interfere with the Gingerbread Man. Please defeat 10 of each of them.
You're not going to help the Gingerbread Man after all of this?
Rivals always envy each other. But I did not expect such cheap tactics.
Well done! Now they won't be able to approach the Gingerbread Man so easily anymore.
Her Name is Ademia
Clear Stage 10 - Master Chocolatiers House (F6)

Oh dear, it seems I misunderstood the situation. It's true that the Cinnamonbread Man is attacking the Gingerbread Man, but...%% The thing is that the attack was not the Cinnamonbread Man's idea!%% The leader of the Love Haters, known as Ademia is the one with the plan. It seems you are the only one who can stop her.

I'm now sure why Ademia is interfering with the chocolate production process. One thing is for certain and that's Ademia is doing everything to prevent the creation of sweet chocolate.%% There are many people looking forward to receiving valentines chocolates, please stop Ademia.%% Ademia is at Stage 10 of the Master Chocolatiers House (F6).
All women will have a problem with you, can you take that?
I am also a big fan of the Gingerbread Man's chocolate. His special chocolate made for Valentines day is very special.
Hmm. So that is why. All of the anger she feels towards men is being released on the Gingerbread Man because he makes the chocolate that represents Valentines!
10,000th Proposal
Speak with Walter
Now there's nothing we can do. Ademia is angry at what Valentines day stands for... I have a good idea though, just hear me out.

My idea, as you have probably guessed, is to introduce a valentine to Ademia.%% Luckily Walter at Port of the Winds has been boasting about the number of friends he has. Speak with Walter and see if he knows anyone who would be a good valentine for Ademia.
Fine. Just leave Ademia to ruin valentines for everyone.
I have a very high standard, I've turned down many people during my time. Don't look at me like that! I'm telling the truth!

What? Do I know anyone who will be Ademia, Boss of the Love Haters valentine? What do you mean? The friends I was talking about were the cats I have at home.%% I'm not good with new people so I don't have any close friends.
Requirements of Love
Talk to Amy
I think love requires some proof. I guess this would usually be a gift but... I don't have much money.%% What I've done is sent some chocolates for Valentines day. Could you do me one little favour?
I really hope she will like them. Would you go and ask if the Amy received the chocolate? Um, Wait!%% (Whispers) Please tell her what a good guy I am, without being too obvious..
Hmm.. Yeah.. Who would be willing to help me out.
Recently the girls like to receive chocolate and something shiny.. That's not true right?
Yes? Walter has sent me chocolates? But why would Walter send me chocolates?
1st Class Change - Health Recovery
Talk to Maytry

Finally you're awake. I am {C=0xFF00863C/}Priest Maytry{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I have come to Kazeura to find the precious treasure.%% Stay still, don't try and get up yet. You still can't use your body.%% I checked you over while you were unconscious, you are not in a very good state right now, you were thrown around quite a bit when you crashed.%% You really need some specialist treatment.

I'll start treating you now, we need to recover your health. Don't move if you can help it, I warn you, this might sting a bit. ... ...%% It's lucky I found you so soon, I might not have been able to cure you if I found you much later.
You won't be able to travel far without collapsing, you need to take it easy.

Phew.... I'm finished, you should be feeling much better.%% You are looking better so I'll give you back your weapon, armour and also I have some gifts for you. Sorry I never caught your name? Ah. Well hello {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and good luck!
1st Class Change - Promotion to Summoner!

Ah... Luckily it looks like you have fully recovered.%% But... Can you remember why you crashed here with {C=0xFF00863C/}Priest Yanai's Wyvern{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% You don't really look like a veteran temple warrior. Can you tell me what's happened to you?

(Maytry is nodding her head after listening to your story.)%% I see....%% So you came here, so far away from home, because you by chance became involved with protecting the polluted precious treasure?%% Well then! You better go to Port of the Winds first, it's the fall back point for the Drakan's... Your not in the best condition after the crash, but you haven't prepared enough for battle either. Your life might be in danger if you still want to go there now..%% So, please let me see how well you are healing. Firstly, can you attack some{C=0xFFFF0000/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} near here? Five Crabby should be enough for me to see how you are doing.%% You could use your summon skill since you are a shaman. If you can use the summon kill to get the Starry's attention it will be an easy battle for you. %% You look like you are capable of becoming a Superior Shaman, I'll promote you right now if you have fully recovered.
That's too bad. However, I'm sure we will meet again someday. If your still alive! Take Care.
{C=0xFFFF0000/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are all over the coast. Try to find them. This is essential for me to check the progress of your recovery {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Cool, you seem to be a good Summoner! In fact, Bartie at Port of the Winds is responsible for {C=0xFF016295/}Superior Summoners{C=0xFF4D0D08/} but... I'll teach you some Superior Summon magic just this once, just don't tell Bartie. Then, I'll proceed with your {C=0xFFFF0000/}Summoner Promotion{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
1st Class Change - Promotion to Valkyrie!

Ah... Luckily it looks like you have fully recovered.%% But... Can you remember why you crashed here with {C=0xFF00863C/}Priest Yanai's Wyvern{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% You don't really look like a veteran temple warrior. Can you tell me what's happened to you?

(Maytry is nodding her head after listening to your story.)%% I see....%% So you came here, so far away from home, because you became involved with protecting the polluted precious treasure?%% Well then! You better go to Port of the Winds first, it's the fall back point for the Drakan's... Your not in the best condition after the crash, but you haven't prepared enough for battle either. Your life might be in danger if you still want to go there now..%% So, please let me see how well you are healing. Firstly, can you attack some {C=0xFFFF0000/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} near here? Five Crabbies should be enough for me to see how you are doing.%% If you can use the summon skill to get the Starry's attention it will be an easy battle for you. You look like you are capable of becoming a powerful Amazonian. I'll promote you right now if you have fully recovered.
That's too bad. However, I'm sure we will meet again someday. If your still alive! Take Care.
{C=0xFFFF0000/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are all over the coast. Try to find them. This is essential for me to check the progress of your recovery {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Cool, you seem to be a good fighter! In fact, Pai at Port of the Winds is responsible for {C=0xFF016295/}Superior Fighters{C=0xFF4D0D08/} but... I'll teach you some Superior Fighting skills just this once, just don't tell Pai. Then, I'll proceed with your {C=0xFFFF0000/}Twins Promotion{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
To enter the Garrison base...
Darkness Watchman
Hey kid... You're not really skilled enough for battle, ok...%% Do you know who I am, have you ever heard about me?%% No... Well if you had you would know you cannot enter here that easily...

Do you know what is the first rule in battle for a veteran like me?%% It's survival. My survival, my army's survival... and also your survival.%% So, I don't want a weakling like you to join the battle with me. I won't shatter my Black Claw Nest Outpost's morale by having more dead warriors because of someone like you who has never proved their ability!%% If you really want to join the battle with us then you must prove your ability to me.%% If you can kill 1 Skelldrark and 10 Darkness Watchman, I might be able to trust you as I know I wont have to add you to the list of fallen warriors after the battle. Hahaha!
Yeah, it's better to know your own ability. Don't disturb me anymore and go away.
I don't need a person like you who doesn't even know who the enemy is or how many we are up against!

Great! I heard that you killed 25 {C=0xFFFF0000/}Skelldrark and Darkness Watchman{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!%% However, you don't think you can become a member of the expedition for the Black Dragon Lord by killing such a weak monster right? Hahaha!
Elga expedition's qualification
Piece of Dark abyss

Greenhorn... You really want to be a member of the Dragon Expedition!? Do you know what it means to be a member of the Expedition?%% Death...%% It's a fate which has been accepted by many members of the Dragon Expedition who have passed by... They left all of their precious items to their family! and lovers!... In the end they become nothing but ash. All of our young comrades are now dead because of Elga...%% All of the horrible monsters have gathered here, they have all been brought back from the Dark Abyss!%% I really feel so sorry about this.

However, greenhorn! I like your passionate eyes.%% Go and kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Kashape{C=0xFF4D0D08/} with your sword!%% Unless someone stops his dance to attract more spirits, this disaster will never end.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right now and if you can, kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Kashape{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and return with a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Dark abyss{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as evidence, then I'll accept you as a member of Elga expedition!%%
Ok, greenhorn... You go back to your cosy home and await the apocalypse!
This journey won't be easy for you but don't give up. Greenhorn!

HAHAHAHA! Is this really a Piece of the Dark abyss...? I never thought a greenhorn like you could actually find one for me.%% As I promised you, you are now a member of Elga expedition now greenhorn! From now on, the first rule is...%% Survival.
Lost Proof of Love
Speak with Gordon

I am really surprised and flattered to hear that Walter has sent me some Valentines Chocolate. I haven't received any chocolate though. Come to think of it, I heard Gordon saying that there is some problem at the Cookie Factory.%% Maybe that is why the chocolate has not arrived yet. I can't leave here because I'm caring for a sick pet. I'm sorry but could you find out what's going on?

I really wasn't expecting any chocolate from Walter. I haven't spoken with Walter much either.%% He's the first person to send me chocolate for Valentines, I really don't want to lose the chocolate without a really good reason.
Oh well... There is nothing I can do, I can't leave the sick pets. Wait.... Maybe...
Did he send anything else? Like something small, shiny, and pretty, or anything like that?

So have you found a valentine to introduce to Ademia? (You tell Gordon about Walter and Amy and the missing chocolates.)%% Huh! We cannot introduce a cat to Ademia as her valentine. The case of the Missing Chocolate at the Cookie Factory is still in the early stages of investigation.%% I guess I will have to focus on that before I come back to the problems with Ademia.
The Chocolate Robbers?

What we've found so far is that there is another group, called the Chocolate Robbers who have gained access to the Chocolate Storehouse.%% Oh why do these strange groups keep appearing?%% Since this group appeared no chocolates have been delivered. I need your help to get to the bottom of this.

They seem to be operating in a similar way to the Love Haters. I'm not sure why they've appeared at the Chocolate Storehouse, it seems that there are many Chocolate Mushrooms in the group.%% Investigate 50 Chocolate Mushrooms and lets find out what they're up to.
Hmm.. You're going to leave this old man to conduct this difficult investigation?
Maybe they are leaving presents! I'm trying to be optimistic.
So, they are the ones who are stealing the Chocolate Boxes? I was suspecting it, but I didn't expect it to be this easy.
Sweet Retrieval
Chocolate Box
Oh no! This morning many people who didn't receive their valentines chocolate came by and asked for them! Good thing I have a good idea who is behind this crime.%%

The Chocolate Robbers are causing me a bigger headache than I expected. Especially since Walter is creating such a fuss.%% I think before solving this I need to calm all of the victims down...%% I have discovered that the Chocolate Boxes are being kept by the Pudding Monsters. Please bring back some Chocolate Boxes!
Are you going to just watch me die? How am I supposed to stand in front of this crowd?
It seems that Walter is the most angry that his Chocolate has gone missing!
Thank you %name%. I guess this will keep people happy for a while. Even Walter.
Coofie's Feelings
Clear Stage 40 - Chocolate Storehouse (F7)
Finally I've found out that the theft was led by the boss of the Chocolate Robbers! His name is Coofie, we must stop Coofie from stealing anymore chocolate.

I'm not sure why Coofie is stealing the chocolate. There is a rumour that he is a very dissatisfied young man...%% But he is not the only one who is dissatisfied about the world surely? It is no reason to commit a crime, just because you have a problem with something.%% Please stop Coofie from making more people unhappy %name%.
Don't you know that ignoring a crime is a crime itself!
What is he planning to do with so much chocolate?
Hmm, so Coofie has a story to tell also? It seems both Ademia and Coofie have a story to tell. Huh? Am I missing something. I guess I'm getting old.
Bridge of Love
Clear Stage 40 - Chocolate Storehouse (F7)
Are you thinking what I'm thinking? Ademia and Coofie... I think we can solve this problem by looking at their psychological state right now.

It's the loneliness. They're acting like this because they are so lonely.%% I think this problem can be solved by introducing them both to each other. Of course, they have to be attracted to each other...%% I think it will work though. They've been so lonely for such a long time they will understand each other.%% I will go and speak with Ademia, you go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Chocolate Storehouse (F7){C=0xFF4D0D08/} first and stop {C=0xFFFF5917/}Coofie{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from doing anything stupid.
What do you mean you do not care? What you're doing is a crime you know.
Please hurry and stop Coofie from doing something any more serious!

Haha. Just as I thought. They have been waiting for someone special to come into their life for a long time.%% I'm sure you'll find someone special too, don't rush anything. I'm sure there is someone special who's waiting for you too!
The Skills of Adventure
Talk to Mukapa
Oh hey %name%! You always look quite busy these days. I suppose it must be because of all of the monsters that have appeared recently?%% I think I can give you some useful advice.

Adventurers can encounter many unexpected things on their travels. That's why you will really need some Instant Processing skills.%% I was told that you can learn more from!{C=0xFF00863C/}Mukapa{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You don't know how to thank people do you?
So, are you interested to learn some Instant Processing skills?

Firstly, you can learn the Instant Cooking skill from Best Cook {C=0xFF00863C/}Brutus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, he will teach you how to make something useful from the ingredients you earn from monsters.%% Blacksmith {C=0xFF00863C/}Davi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will share Simple Crafting with you so you make make equipment from the loot you gather from monsters.%% Last, but not least, Soul Craft Merchant {C=0xFF00863C/}Julie{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has a skill named Extractng Magical Force which allows her to extract the magical force out of items.%% I don't think anyone will share they're skills with your for free. You might have to make it worth their while. How about you go and speak to {C=0xFF00863C}Julie{C=0xFF4D0D08/} first?
Instant Cooking

Well, you came to learn cooking? I was just a soldier serving under a General. I have tasted many different dishes from all over Dragotaka, and I realised something.%% It enlightened me! Do you want to know what I came up with?

For soldiers who have to spend a long time on the battlefield, it's good to be able to create some food to re-gain your strength. Nothing can beat some good home cooked food to make you feel better.%% I have tasted many different dishes from different places and decided I couldn't go on relying on other people to cook for me, so I learnt how to cook!%% At first, I only cooked for myself, but soon I discovered it was fun to cook for other people, especially when they loved my food.%% I am willing to teach you my Instant Cooking Skill, but you will need to prove you have a passion to cook.%% Since the Shark Pirates stole all of my firewood I can't go on cooking... If you can get me 10 Firewood back from the Shark Pirates at the Bearded Whale Coast, I will teach you my skill.
Do you know you are a fortune killer?
My customers are waiting for their food, please move quickly!

Haha. Thanks, now I can cook the rest.%% As I have seen your passion, I shall give you a reward. I will teach you the Instant Cooking skill, it should help you out a lot.%% Just use the Instant Cooking Ingredient in your inventory to start, you will never look back.
Great Dish
Portable Snack
Now I feel like I'm starving. Before I teach you, would you cook me something using your skill?%% Do me this for me please!

Haha. I knew you were a generous person. Of course, I'll provide you with the ingredients for my dish. Here, take this {C=0xFFFF5917/}Instant Cooking Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Please use this ingredient in your inventory and cook a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Snack{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me. Now! Move yourself chop chop I'm hungry!
Ah...I didn't expect you would just reject my request like that. So sad...
Go quick! The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Instant Cooking Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is not supposed to take long to cook.

Haha! You brought a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Snack{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! I knew you would be a marvelous chef just like me.%% Just do me a favour and don't open a restaurant next to mine. You wouldn't want to start a competition with me! Haha.
Oh? Are you saying you ruined the{C=0xFFFF5917/}Instant Cooking Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Ok, here you go again. Don't waste ingredients!
What is Simple Crafting?
Ah hello young one, you wish to see me? What do you want? Oh? You want to learn about Simple Crafting.%% Ah, I love teaching, but that is my own unique skill...

I learnt it from my teacher over a long time. It took me 10 years for me to master it...%% I don't think it's something I should just give to anyone... But I don't want it to die out. {C=0xFF00863C/}(Davi pauses to think.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Ah! Here's a deal for you. Before the winter comes again, I need to gather some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Fleece{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I had quite a few but then the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} stole mine.%% Would you get 10 of them back for me? I will teach you Simple Crafting in return.
Remind me, is it Simple Crafting you want to learn?
The weather is getting cold. This outfit isn't very warm.

Yes! That's exactly what I was looking for! Now this winter won't be very cold for me.%% Now, I shall treat you in return for your help. I hope Simple Crafting is helpful on your adventure.%% Click Simple Crafting to learn the skill.
Great Armour Kit
Portable Armour Kit
Once you've learnt the skill, don't let it go to waste. Well? Should I give you a chance to try the new skill you have just learnt. I bet you want to try Simple Crafting right away?

It's not that hard, you seem pretty clever, I am sure you could make something using Simple Crafting.%% Here, have a Simple Crafting Ingredient to create a Portable Armour Kit.%% Use the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Simple Crafting Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and one you're finished hand me over the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Armour Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you have created so I can see how much you have improved.
You learnt this still for nothing? How lazy...
Now go and make it! Time Flies!

Haha! Excellent, you created a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Armour Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} successfully! Do you want to do some part-time work for me?%% Hm? You don't? Too bad... I believe you could become a great apprentice.
You can't find your {C=0xFFFF5917/}Simple Crafting Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? What nonsense. You must have put it down somewhere and forgotten it... Here, I'll give you a new one.
How to Extract Magical Force?
What brought you here? I am Soul Craft Merchant Julie. Pardon me? You want to know how to Extract Magical Force?%% Sigh... That's a secret skill I learnt from my grandpa.

Extracting Magical Force is a useful and unique skill, I think my grandpa wanted to keep it in the family. He never did say it must not be shared with others. Once you pay for it, I'll share the skill with you.%% Lets say, I'll share the Extract Magical Force skill with you in exchange for {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You can get soul by disassembling equipment.
Huh? You don't want to learn Extract Magical Force?

Frankly speaking, I am from the world of {C=0xFF016295/}Ragnarök{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. This is located in another dimension. {C=0xFF00863C/}(...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Oh! please! believe me. I am not insane i swear!%% This is the tenth time I have introduce myself to someone. Once I say the words 'another dimension' people just leave. It was ten years ago, some energy mass came through the dimensional barrier to {C=0xFF016295/}Geffen{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. For now we just call the energy mass {C=0xFF00863C/}the energy{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Because of this energy the monsters in our world got mutated and ever since then it has been hard to fight them. That's why I came to this world, to find someone to save us... But whenever I say I am from another dimension people just make a funny face and turn away.%% Please, would you come to our world and save us?

Thank you so much! Even though I was making a sad face, nobody was willing to help me.%% I think the people in this world are too shy to talk to a beauty like me! {C=0xFF00863C/}(...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Anyway, besides the mutated monsters, we have a dimensional vortex in our world. This is a conflict that occurs when the energy from another dimension and the repulsive forces of our world crashes into the dimensional barriers.%% In {C=0xFF016295/}Geffen{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, many places have been restricted. Their idea is against {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and the Moderates who believe that the energy is a random disaster.%% So, {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} decided to ask for help from the other dimensions to solve this issue!

However to stop people from the other dimension stealing them, there has been strong seal placed on them.%% The Doctor said {C=0xFFFF5917/}Hungry Zombies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Ghouls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will have {C=0xFFFF5917/}Pieces of United Energy{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, bring 10 of them to me.{C=0xFFFF5917/}Lace{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Hunter Fly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} would have {C=0xFFFF5917/}Nucleus of United Energy{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, bring 3 of them to me also!
You! You do not care about your own world. Is it because of me? You prefer our world because of me?
You must be careful! Or else you will be defeated at {C=0xFF016295/}Glast Heim{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Now {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} says he can carry on with his research. But the other scientists are acting more aggresively now! {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} please, you must be careful!
Increase in Split energy
Rapid Grass
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, hi! I need your help!

Remember the scientist that I told you about? Well, he says that he needs more Split Energy.%% There is a special grass that will multiply the Split Energy, do you think you can get some for me? You can get {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rapid Grass{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Evil Druid{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please bring {C=0xFFFF5917/}10{C=0xFF4D0D08/} of them to me!
Ok thanks. That is all I need... I think...

I am sorry, so very sorry.
Happy Family

Sorry, I am so sorry. I, I did not want to. It will not be easy to forgive me... I'm so sorry..

{C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/} knew everything all along. He was trying to bring other people through the crack.%% So he told me to inform him when more people from the other dimension arrive. My family are currently being held hostage.%% My big brother Miyul was training in prison, but now he is locked up for real.%% My little brother Ail was performing an illegal warp and got caught.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/} told me that if I do what he has told me to do that they will be set free. Yes.. I understand....

You know, I am very worried. {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is using Mutated split energy so he can make the same dimensional crack in your world {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I fear that there's nothing we can do to stop it.
World in danger
Crystal of energy

This is bad news. The other scientists are claiming that {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is working as a spy. Currently {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is in prison.%% I spoke with Tailring and Deporte, but they don't believe me. I have only 1 person that i can trust now and that is you, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

There is only 1 way to save {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. We need to get the energy crystal and give it to Tailring!%% {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/} said that the energy was divided into two pieces by the Orc Hero and Dark Lord.%% But the Orc Hero energy Crystal has been taken by {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. We need to get the remaining crystal from the Dark Lord!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(I can't trust Binit anymore. He is acting very suspicious.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Haha! I always laugh like this, trust me!
Please help us, {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is preparing a full on attack on the world where {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} came from!
Ah! This is the energy crytal {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was talking about. So, Binit was telling the truth! I will take this crystal and show it to everyone!
Dimensional Savior
Conversation with Tailring
Wow! We are really thankful to you. There is peace in our world. All thanks to you.%% Would you like to know how we solved this?

We have used the crystal's energy to gain the proof we needed along with the help of {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein's{C=0xFF4D0D08/} research.%% Other doctors refuse to believe this proof though.%% However, when the energy crystal was removed from the monster the crack between our dimension began disappearing rapidly.%% So eventually the other scientists had to believe it.%% Of course {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Kaluza{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was still insisting that it was an invasion from another dimension, but since the crack between our dimensions started to disappear the other scientists didn't agree with him.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}Dr. Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is also free now. It is shame that still some cracks are left open, otherwise you would be able to enter {C=0xFF016295/}Geffen{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Huh! Everything has been solved, so you don't care now? No, I'm going to tell you everything.
No need to translate(x)

{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you have saved two worlds! We are not entirly sure where the energy has come from but we will find out sooner or later.%% I will act as a bridge between our two worlds.%% When you come back we will remember that you have saved our world. This is not much but it is a small gift from Dr.{C=0xFF00863C/}Klein{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Thank you!
Obtain Elunium

As I told you before, there are many Valkyrie pieces around {C=0xFF016295/}Glast Heim{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. But there are many kind of Valkyrie sets also!%% Should I tell you how to get a Valkyrie set that is right for you {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

Ta da! You can get them from me! If you bring me some Valkyrie sets that you do not need then you can use the option to {C=0xFFFF5917/}Obtain Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and get some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in return!%% When you bring enough {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me, I will exchange them for a Valkyrie set that is suitable for you.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}(I thought Dimension Seal would forbid me to take Valkyrie sets to our dimension.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% What! Do not look at me like that! As you are aware, Valkyrie is not just one or two person. There are many Valkyrie.%% So we have lots of Valkyrie sets with us. But now we require someone who can exchange useless equipment fo some useful equipment!%% Use Kafra to provide this service. Also, obtaining {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} leaves us with a huge profit.%% However the number of Valkyrie sets and the number of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} must match or I will be in great trouble.%% Then I will have to tell them the problem I have with you and as a result {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} would be thrown into jail over there.%% So although you are here to save our world, I still need {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from you to give you the Valkyrie sets.%% That is enough talking, I will give you a broken Valkyrie hat, try to obtain an {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elumium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from it!
Now, use {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/} extraction on the broken Valkyrie hat and extract 1 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Wow! Well done. Since you have done so well, I will give you 2 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Elunium{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. A little while ago someone gave me two extra when he was purchasing a Valkyrie set.%% I don't think he is coming back for these to be honest.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}(Kafra will go out of business soon if they all work like this.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Huh? Did you throw it away because it was broken? This is the last one!
I need a Gas Mask!

{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFA62700/}[Quest Requirements]{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}Bring 1 Sadonyx to Davi in Port of Winds.{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFA62700/}[Quest NPC]{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}Port of Winds - Davi{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFA62700/}[Detail]{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}If you lost your Gas Mask, kind Davi will Make another for you. In order to get a Gas Mask just bring one Sadonyx to Davi. You can get {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sadonyx{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF00863C/}Trade Merchant Daisy{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Hmm? Did you lose your Gas Mask already? Ok. I can Help you but..I need an ingredient.

I have an extra Gas Mask but it's pre-order to other person. He didn't need it so urgently so I'll give it to you. But in order to make the Gas Mask I'll need {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sadonyx{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as an ingredient.%%If you get it from {C=0xFF00863C/}Trade Merchant Daisy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} just Next to me, I will give you this extra Gas Mask.
Alright, if you say so.
There's nothing for free.
Here you are, but try not to lose it again.

Grow Sunflower up to Lv.60
Nothing will beat my special Sunflower Garden! Everyone will love it im sure. But i need more time to finish it off! Ah dear hero, you have come to help no doubt!

Thank you. In our village there will be a Summer Festival. I promised the villagers that I will show off a beautiful garden during the festival period.%% I have been thinking what would be the best flower for my garden and I have chosen a Sunflower! But the problem is that I don't have much time left to grow a Sunflower. I want to show a beautiful and fully grown Sunflower!%% My hero. Please help me grow a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sunflower{C=0xFF4D0D08/} up to {C=0xFFFF5917/}Lv.60{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Once you have a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sunflower bud{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you can grow it into a Sunflower!

Thank you for your kindness. Yes, I had a wonderful time at the Summer Festival. And please take this Summer Event Box. I hope you like my gift.
Ouch! I cannot use the equipping Pet. Please unequip your pet!
For the bravery!
Orc Hero

Not me, but a warrior, like you! You should learn to love yourself more.

Wow! You did it! Here is a special achievement just for you.

Spiritual Protection Stone
Talk to Gwen
Welcome. Gwen, Gatekeeper of the Guardians' Dungeon at your service. Are you here to enter the {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

Beware {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is an extremely dangerous place... If you really are going to enter then you need to be prepared.%% Many adventurers like you have lost their lives entering without the proper preparation. To prevent any further loss of life I have placed a shield over the dungeon only allowing those who are ready for the challenge to enter the {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Wise choice. The {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is not an amusement park.

The concentrated spiritual energy in each of the Dungeons of Spirits is not something any normal person can stand, including the legendary heroes.%% I have created {C=0xFFFF0000/}Spiritual Protection Stones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from this concentrated spiritual energy, when combined with an adventurers own Spiritual Energy it neutralises the powerful energy inside the {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} making it safe to enter.%% Using these stones weakens your own spiritual strength, you cannot use more than four stones per day. Therefore I give four stones to all challengers worthy of entering the {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

I think you are a suitable challenger for the {C=0xFF016295/}Guardians' Dungeon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Now take these {C=0xFFFF0000/}Spiritual Protection Stones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and enter the dungeon.%% May the spirits bless you...
Sweet Halloween
Talk to Randy
AH They're back! ...What do you mean who? Your asking me because you really do not know? It is them! They come back every Halloween!

The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} appear every Halloween and play tricks around the towns. Yes....I am also a Ghost but I really don't like them.%% Do you know what the worst part is? They took all the presents and treats I prepared for you, they took them all!%% I made loads of sweets from the pumpkins and brought them here with me, but they have stolen all of them! You'll help me get them back right?
No?? NO?? You're joking right? Really? REALLY? Are you serious?

We have never got along, the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and I. I want to cause them some trouble like they do to others. I like to see people enjoying Halloween, not suffer from their tricks. Halloween is for everyone to enjoy!

The Halloween Ghosts took the candy I prepared and have hidden inside a huge pumpkin. The pumpkins got tricked by the Halloween Ghosts and have become dangerous Tricked Pumpkins.%% I am worried that my treats might have turned into something bad.%% Please get the treats back from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and enjoy them. I made them myself!%% Of course that's not all there is, I have a gift box for you.%% The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tricked Pumpkins{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are hidden randomly in the field maps so you will have to do some searching.
Ghost Hunter
Halloween Tokens

You evil ghosts! Stay there! I, Randy shall punish you! Wooohoo! Ah!... You heard me? Oh my, I'm so embarrassed.%% I've always been wary of Ghost Hunters. My friends think Ghost Hunters are dangerous beings.%% I was scared of them as well in the beginning. But soon I realised that Ghost Hunters never cause a problem for the good ghosts like me.%% Ghost Hunters only capture the evil ghosts. To thank the Ghost Hunters, I have prepared 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Tokens{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for them. But, there's a big problem. Could you help me?

The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} heard about my plane and stole all of my Halloween Tokens and have hidden themselves inside the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tricked Pumpkins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I can't even go near the pumpkins because they are so abusive now.%% The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Tokens{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are not just for me. They are to distribute to kids all over Dragotaka to thank the wonderful ghoooooost hunterssssss!%% Ooooh. I ammmm sorrrrry. I was practicing ghost voice acting. My voice keeps echooooing... Please get back my Halloween Tokens from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% It is not for my own good, but for kids who are dreaming of the ghost hunters. The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are hiding inside the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tricked Pumpkins{C=0xFF4D0D08/} around the fields. You will need to do a lot of searching!
Oooooh... Do you even know what happens when you reject a ghosts quest? You will have to keep listening to a ghost moaningggg... Pleeeease collect the Halloween Tokens before Halloween endssss...
Once Halloween ends, the Halloween Tokens are uselesssss...

Ahh! You brought my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Tokens{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I shall give these to the kids who are dreaming of becoming ghost hunters.%% So, by fostering many little ghost hunters, I shall rid the evil {C=0xFFFF5917/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the world. Muaahh-ha-ha-ha! What are you looking at? Haven't you seen a ghost giggling before?
Happy Halloween!!!
Ghost Soul

Ha! Ha! Ha! Do you guys need anything? Ah, Oh sorry! I just remembered something.. Anyway, did you heard about my special item?%% No? hmm.. this is bad.. My special item is able to give special buffs to you.%% I got it from an old man in Halloween Town. Ah! Of course he's not living there. It's a bit of a complex story.. do you want me to tell it to you?

Halloween Town has a monster leader called Jack. Not long ago he brought a red rucksack to me.%% Inside it was an old man wearing red clothes, he smelt like he had been drinking a lot. Jack said his name was Samda Crosssa, no, Santa Nalian or something.%% Jack tied him up tightly and locked him inside a cell. But I felt sorry for the old man and untied him.%% When he woke and recovered from his drinking he became very angry about his imprisonment, he was very strong for an old man and his behaviour scared the town folk.%% After a while the old man returned and thanked me for my pity, he gave me something called a Crystal of Blessing. He told me the crystal could be used to bless many people.%% I've decided to use this crystal today to bring happiness to everyone on Halloween! I just need your help to do this.%% The Crystal requires an ingredient to work, it must first purify an evil spirit before it can bless someone.%% Luckily the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have a {C=0xFFFF0000/}Ghost Soul{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, this is one of the best ingredients to use.%% They can be obtained from the ghosts hiding inside the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Tricked Pumpkins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. They appear in random locations, so please do some searching for them.%% Depending on number of {C=0xFFFF0000/}Ghost Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} used a different buff will be given, there are four different buffs, the more souls used the better the buff. So please bring me as many {C=0xFFFF0000/}Ghost Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as you can collect!
This is too long? But if you do not hear me out, you'll be missing out!

Are you still here because you're scared of the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? I'm is very scared of the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Halloween Ghosts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and that is enough! No other person or ghost should be scared!!

Wa!! This must be what {C=0xFFFF0000/}Ghost Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are! I've never seen this before. I may able to give buffs to you if I have few more. Yay! Yay! Yay! Please bring more {C=0xFFFF0000/}Ghost Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me!
Learn a Profession
Talk to Max
I know you want to go for production now. But listen to me. You need to have some knowledge at least.. Well, do you want it?

To gather things, you' not only need a collecting tool, you also need to know what ingredients you can get, and where you should go for them. You don't simply gather ingredients from just anywhere without adequate information. First, you should go to {C=0xFFFF5917/}Windy Farm{C=0xFF4D0D08/} behind me, there you will see locations categorised by the kind of ingredients they have. You must gather things in a specific area.
Ha. You think you can work it out just by having the tool equipped alone?

The guide I spent my whole life writing contains valuable information which I've researched and gained from my experience.%%It will make anyone an expert in Production skills. I've decided to share this with people for free. That's my belief!! However, I'm selling the guide to whoever has lost the book. That's also my belief.!!

Well, there's a guide I wrote about all my experiences. You can check, it tells you where you should go and what ingredients can be found there. It covers basic things, but as your understanding of the process grows with your increasing skill EXP, you will be able to find advanced ingredients.%%Welcome to the World of Production!!
Senior Production Master Bessie
Talk to Bessie

Hm. I assume you're pretty excited now you have got a new job, but I guess it might not be clear what you need to do exactly.%% Well in that case, you'll need a good teacher. Oh? You'd prefer to learn from me? Haha. Yes, I am a Production Master , but I did use to be an apprentice.%% Since I wanted to be the best in the production field I spent a lot of time trying to find the best teacher, in the end I found her. Do you want to know who she is?

Madam {C=0xFF00863C/}Bessie{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is the Senior Production Master. These days she prefers to concentrate on training her two apprentices so I'm afraid she might not accept you as a new apprentice.%% As long as you show her your passion she will help you for sure. Once you meet Madam Bessie, let her know that I sent you.
I beg your pardon? Are you telling me that you were just wasting my time?
Go! Find Madam {C=0xFF00863C/}Bessie{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, tell her I sent you.

Ah? Max sent you? I already have two apprentices with me, I've spent a long time training these two young kids.%% I'm not as young as energetic as I used to be, I assume Max noticed some potential in you.%% Why don't you learn from my two apprentices? I've trained them well so they should be good enough to teach you!
Dried Branches

Greetings %name%, Madam Bessie let me know you would be coming to me. She said you were interested in learning about {C=0xFF016295/}Logging{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% You've made a good choice. Since I'm very shy I started Logging to make me more confident.%% I feel very strong and powerful when I cut down a tree. Unfortunately, I'm still the old shy Jerome when I don't have an axe though. Would you like me to teach you?

It's not that hard to start logging, just go to a lumber camp, equip {C=0xFF016295/}Collecting tool{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, start using your logging skill and watch your experience improve!%% It's not just the improvement in skill which is useful to you, take the dead branches you collect to Madam Bessie and make a good trade for them.%% Now, %name%, collect {C=0xFFFF5917/}5 Dried Branches{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. And take them to Madam {C=0xFF00863C/}Bessie{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Already tired? Too bad. I was going to let you know how fun Logging can be.
Logging helps build lots of muscle. See my arms? They are getting very strong.
Oh? Dried Branches. You are learning well from Jerome.%% Practice makes perfect. Be patient and keep trying. You will be a great lumberjack.
In the beginning I found it hard to train Jerome because he was so shy.
Mineral Fragment

Ah. So you came to learn how to mine? Mining is not an easy skill to learn.%% You may easily get tired of the hard work, it takes a long time to get used to pick away at bare rock. If you're willing, I'll to teach you how to mine. Well? Are you in?

Mining requires equipment first. I assume you have learned the basics from Max, since you came all the way down here. Good. Now I can tell you where you can start mining.%% The Mining Area can be found where the {C=0xFF016295/}Pickaxe Icon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} sign is marked on the minimap. Head there and go to a spot marked by a 100 sign.%% Since you are a beginner, that is the perfect place to start. Once the sign starts flashing, that's the time to start mining.%% Use your mining skill to start collecting.%% So! Shall we start?! Get {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bessie{C=0xFF4D0D08/} {C=0xFFFF5917/}5 ore pieces{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
What are you up to here. Are you wasting my time?
What are you waiting for? Move!
Ah, you seem to have learnt well. My grand daughter must have taught you well.
Romy is my grandson, it's really hard to teach him to have patience.
Deep Green Leaves

Greetings %name%! Madam Bessie told me about you. So you want to learn about Herbalism?%% Herbalism is a useful skill to have for everyday life and alongside your other skills. In the past, I picked a herb for my mother when she was sick, I thought it would make her better but it made her worse.%% I asked for the help of Madam Bessie, she cured my mother and later told me the herb I gave to my mother was poisonous.%% Since that time I made sure I studied herbalism from Madam Bessie. Do you want to learn more about it yourself?

Herbalism isn't that hard to learn, head to the {C=0xFF016295/}Herbalism area{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and go to a spot with a 100 sign. Remember to enter when the marker goes very shiny for extra luck!%% Equip your {C=0xFF016295/}Collecting tool{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and use your Ploughing Skill.%% Bring the herbs you collect from ploughing to Madam Bessie to exchange them for something useful. Now, shall we start ploughing?%% Obtain {C=0xFFFF5917/}5 Deep Green Leaves{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from Ploughing and take them to Madam {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bessie{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
I thought you were serious about learning Herbalism. Did you just fool me?
Ploughing can only be done when the sign flashes. The frequency that the sign flashing is not regular, so be patient.
Hm, It seems that you have learnt the basics of Herbalism. But I was just warming you up.%% Keep going and you could become as good as Jerome is.
You have something to ask me?
Trip to the Master of Production
Speak with Midas
Now you've had your job promotion you can learn Production Professions!

{C=0xFF016295/}Max{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is a Production Master and can help you get started with learning a Profession. Find him in the Centre of Port of the Winds and he will teach you everything about the Production Professions.
Hmm. You're just going to throw away a chance to become stronger? You are a shame to our tribe.
Although {C=0xFFFF5917/}Max{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is only human he is a master at what he does, you should visit him.

Ah. Gathering and creation is such a wonderful thing! The pleasure to be gained by making something yourself!!%% And if the item has its own purpose for coming into the world, then your work cannot merely be compared with any other activity; of course it is far more valuable. Don't you think so?%% Oh, of course, you want to know how to do that, right? I will gladly teach you: use tools, gather ingredients and process them!! Easy, right? %% What? Young Fish

Yes? You came to learn how to fish? Are you sure? Fishing is really boring... Bessie forced me to do it. But no one's forcing you right?%% I've been fishing for a few years now, but It still bores me. Granny Bessie thinks I'm too wild and thought fishing would help improve my patience but honestly, I don't thinking is very helpful.%% Do you still want to learn how to fish?

Now. I shall teach you fishing. You will need {C=0xFF016295/} fishing rod{C=0xFF4D0D08/} first, and to have learned Gathering skill.%% Once you have things ready, you can approach {C=0xFF016295/}Fishing Spot{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I bet you know where {C=0xFF016295/}Fishing Spot{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is.%% No? Sigh. On the mini map, you see {C=0xFF016295/}Collecting tool{C=0xFF4D0D08/} symbol? That is {C=0xFF016295/}Fishing Spot{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% You will find sign on which the number 100 is printed. Once your fishing skill levels up, you can try higher level fishing spots, but for now, 100 will be suitable for you.%% When you look carefully at the fishing area, you will notice some lights flashing. That is the time for fishing. At the flashing spot, press fishing skill and you can catch fish.%% As I have given you such detailed info, you now have to prove you have learned it, right? Go catch {C=0xFFFF5917/}5 little fish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and take them to Madam {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bessie{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Now, leave.
Ha! I knew you were impatient, you probably threw your Fishing Rod into the lake and ran away? That's what I did!
You'd better not move around. Your movement might scare all the fish away.

You seem to have learnt how to fish! Some people say fishing is boring, but it teaches you great life skills. Romy still hasn't learnt this yep but he hasn't given up just yet.%% It teaches you that it's possible to have fun on your own, and teaches you how to be patient.
It's very hard to teach Romy lessons. That's why I've sent her fishing.
Riding Pet 2nd Promotion (Shop)
Tianshan Snow Lotus

%class%, you have a really cool Riding Pet!! I've never seen one like this before!%% Your pet has reached a level suitable for it's 2nd promotion. Once you have promoted your pet, you will be able to ride your pet into battle! Here, I'll tell you how to complete the advancement.
It's very simple really. Just get me a {C=0xFFFF0000/}Tianshan Snow Lotus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF00863C/}Tool Merchant Hime{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Since they are very rare, they can be very expensive.
What a pity. Once advanced your pet has great potential to grow and help you a lot in your adventures.
{C=0xFF00863C/}Tool Merchant Hime{C=0xFF4D0D08/} sells {C=0xFFFF0000/}Tianshan Snow Lotuses{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Wow! Thank you! I heard that Hime had some Tianshan Snow Lotuses, but this is first time I've seen one. Please take this {C=0xFFFEF5917/}Evolution Crystal{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in exchange for a favour.
Town Chief's Advice
Talk to Dun Morgan
Oh! It's you. Long time no see. How are things outside of the village? I think I can give you some good advice this time.

Adventurers need many things while on their travels, it's true that not everything they need can be obtained while out discovering new places. That's why these skills which allow you to make useful things to use while on your travels are very valuable.%% I'm so proud we have people with such unique skills living here in Odelia.
Hmm, you seem to enjoy travelling without learning anything new. Always doing the same, that must be boring...
Ok, I shall let you know who they are.

First of all, you can learn how to Instant Cook from Best Cook Brutus so you can cook using the ingredients you collected from monsters.%% Equipment Merchant Darwin will share Simple Crafting with you so you can create equipment from the materials you collected from monsters.%% Last but not least, Soul Craft Merchant Julie has a skill known as Extract Magical Force that allows you to extract the magical force out of items.%% I don't think anyone will share them with you for nothing, but you can give it a try!
Instant Cooking

Well, you came to learn cooking? I was just a soldier serving under a General. I have tasted many different dishes from all over Dragotaka, and I realised something.%% It enlightened me! Do you want to know what I came up with?

I thought I could create a good food that could recover soldiers health while they are out on the battlefield. Nothing can beat some good food to cure people, and I have tasted some of the best dishes in Dragotaka.%% But I couldn't eat food people have cooked for me all of the time, that's why I started cooking. At first, I started only cooking for myself but I soon learned how delightful it is to cook for others who love my dish.%% I am willing to teach you my Instant Cooking Skill but you will have to prove your passion.%% I'm running out of firewood and if it runs out I won't be able to continue cooking! If you can get my {C=0xFFFF5917/}5 Firewood{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Woodies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains [Arcade Mode(F1)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} I shall teach you my special skill.
Do you know you are a fortune killer?
My customers are waiting for their food, please move quickly!

Haha. Thanks, now I can cook the rest.%% As I have seen your passion, I shall give you a reward. I will teach you the Instant Cooking skill, it should help you out a lot.%% Just use the Instant Cooking Ingredient in your inventory to start, you will never look back.
Great Dish
Portable Snack
Now I feel like I'm starving. Before I teach you, would you cook me something using your skill?%% Do me this for me please!

Haha. I knew you were a generous person. Of course, I'll provide you with the ingredients for my dish. Here, take this {C=0xFFFF5917/}Instant Cooking Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Please use this ingredient in your inventory and cook a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Snack{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me. Now! Move yourself chop chop I'm hungry!
Ah...I didn't expect you would leave me hungry here. So sad...
Go quick! The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Instant Cooking Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is not supposed to take long to cook.

Haha! You brought a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Snack{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! I knew you would be a marvelous chef just like me.%% Just do me a favour and don't open a restaurant next to mine. You wouldn't want to start a competition with me! Haha.
Oh? You're telling me that you ruined the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Instant Cooking Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Ok, here you go again. Don't waste ingredients!
What is Simple Crafting?
Ah hello young one, you wish to see me? What do you want? Oh? You want to learn about Simple Crafting.%% Ah, I love teaching, but that is my own unique skill...

Simple Crafting is a unique skill I learnt from my teacher a long long time ago. It took me over 10 years to learn how to use it most effectively.%% I don't think I should just teach you how to use it without you having earnt it.... But since I want to spread this special skill to ensure it isn't lost... {C=0xFF00863C/}(Darwin thinks for a while.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Ah! I know. Here's a deal. I need some Fleece before the winter comes, but the Sheep in Windia Plains are not very friendly.%% Would you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains Arcade Mode (F1){C=0xFF4D0D08/} and get me {C=0xFFFF5917/}5 Fleeces{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sheep{C=0xFF4D0D08/} there? I will teach you Simple Crafting in return.
Remind me, is it Simple Crafting you want to learn?
The weather is getting cold. This outfit isn't very warm.

Yes! That's exactly what I was looking for! Now this winter won't be very cold for me.%% Now, I shall treat you in return for your help. I hope Simple Crafting is helpful on your adventure.%% Click Simple Crafting to learn the skill.
Great Armour Kit
Portable Armour Kit
Once you've learnt the skill, don't let it go to waste. Well? Should I give you a chance to try the new skill you have just learnt. I bet you want to try Simple Crafting right away?

It's not that hard, you seem pretty clever, I am sure you could make something using Simple Crafting.%% Here, have a Simple Crafting Ingredient to create a Portable Armour Kit.%% Use the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Simple Crafting Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and one you're finished hand me over the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Armour Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you have created so I can see how much you have improved.
You learnt this still for nothing? How lazy...
Now go and make it! Time Flies!

Haha! Excellent, you created a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Portable Armour Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} successfully! Do you want to do some part-time work for me?%% Hm? You don't? Too bad... I believe you could become a great apprentice.
You can't find your {C=0xFFFF5917/}Simple Crafting Ingredient{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? What nonsense. You must have put it down somewhere and forgotten it... Here, I'll give you a new one.
How to Extract Magical Force?
What brought you here? I am Soul Craft Merchant Julie. Pardon me? You want to know how to Extract Magical Force?%% Sigh... That's a secret skill I learnt from my grandpa.

Extracting Magical Force is a useful and unique skill, I think my grandpa wanted to keep it in the family. He never did say it must not be shared with others. Once you pay for it, I'll share the skill with you.%% Lets say, I'll share the Extract Magical Force skill with you in exchange for {C=0xFFFF5917/}1 Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You can get soul by disassembling equipment.
Huh? You don't want to learn Extract Magical Force?
You can't get any {C=0xFFFF5917/}Souls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} by just fooling around here.

Oh, you brought me some Souls? Well, since it was a deal between you and I, I shall share the secrets on how to Extract Magical Force with you.%% Use the Extract Magical Force Ingredient I give you and you can learn it. Easy peasy right?
Fairy of Winter Nia
Conversation with Nia

{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, do you see that beautiful fairy? Whenever I stand front of beautiful female, my mouth goes dry and my knees give up.%% So I could not ask them about the {C=0xFF00863C/}Santa Claus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Could you ask them for me please?
Wow, thank you. Can't seem to speak to beautiful girls huh? Maybe he got it because {C=0xFF00863C/}Santa Claus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} always make a move on the beautiful girls first!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Rudolph puts his hand on your shoulder){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Hey, just do it! OK?
{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the children are waiting eagerly. Please find {C=0xFF00863C/}Santa Claus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!

A kid with no tears

I heard that the with, Paris, has come out of hiding? I'm not sure if you have heard this story or not but...%% {C=0xFF016295/}Paris has been a big threat to this world ever since a thousand years ago{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. She brought lots of trouble and destruction to the continent of Elyades with {C=0xFFFF0000/}a vicious black dragon called Elga{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% All of my young students know the story of the witch called Paris very well, {C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has always been especially interested in the story.

She is a very intelligent and responsible girl but I do feel sorry for her, she has had a tough life.%% Her mother was also a Superior Magician, and was a very kind and beautiful woman. Unfortunately she became very sick when {C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was very small.%% When {C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was growing up her mother would always suffering from her illness in bed.%% When she was just six years old she came to me and asked me to help her heal her mother. I started to teach her some basic alchemy. She quickly overtook me...%% Other people called {C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/} a genius, but I never doubted that. She would often come home with raw cut hands from climbing the mountains to find medicinal plants.%% She would often cry alone, she never told me this but I knew... Sadly in the end her mother passed away, she has never shed a tear since that day.%% I think she supresses her emotions by burying herself in her work but I'm sure deep down in her heart the feelings are still there.%% Please take care of her, this is my old request for you.
Someday, she will open up to you more.
Thank you, please take good care of her.
Oh, you are here. Yes, Sage told me that you were coming to see me {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

I asked the leader of Drakans Ochukoe if you could participate in holding Akanai down...Please do a good job at this.
Are you abandoning now? We do need your help.
You can meet {C=0xFF00863C/}Priest Horn Ochukoe{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Kazeura Village{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please take care.

Young brave man. I'd like to express a hearty welcome to you for visiting our village.%%As I heard, Dragon Fellowship directly takes action in killing Akanai.%%It is great pleasure that we two tribes cooperate each other to get over the crisis.
Run! Wyvern!
Deliver Tianshan Snow Lotus

Excuse me...Are you {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...? Oh! yes you are?! I'm Syari%% Do you recognize me?%% That's right. I'm the twin sister of Maytry. Maytry talked about you {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} sometimes by mail.%% She told me that you may come to Kazeura one day. And she asked me to take care of you...It's great to meet you.%%Though we have never met, I feel like I have known you for a life time.

Well...That baby Feilon... I noticed something strange. Can I see it closer?...%% I know how to feel a patient's pulse and examine one's condition.%% ... ...%% The flow of energy is not healthy. Is he sick?%% (Syari listened to my story for about what had happened to Feilon.)%% Incubator? Now I see. Because he hatched prematurely, his wings have not been able to grow normally.%% He should have fully grown up now.%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tianshan Snow Lotus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} can heal his condition.%% Although it's a very expensive remedy, it can heal the flow of energy instantly.%% You can buy a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tianshan Snow Lotus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the potion shop in this town.. If you bring that remedy, I will be able to cure Feilon.
Ah..Poor Feilon.
Is the potion shop selling {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tianshan Snow Lotus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

You have brought {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tianshan Snow Lotus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I worried that this baby dragon may not be able to become a riding pet for the rest of his life. %% I'm so relieved! This baby might have been unhappy with the fact that he could never reach his full potential.%% Once he has fully grown wings, please take care of him more than ever.%% All right! shall we use {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tianshan Snow Lotus{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm going to use. Now!
Paradise (1)
Talk with Ranotah

Welcome to Kazeura!%% The whole village is very noisy because of Drakan warriors who are passing through on their search for the Precious Treasure and the Dragon Expedition are visiting here for the first time.%% Anyway, you must be tired after having such a long journey to get here. You took a dangerous road too! The Kazeura area is not very peaceful anymore...%% The peaceful animals in Dragon Valley have also become more violent day after day because of the precious treasure's influence!%% Only in the past can we think of this place as a paradise.
Go to find {C=0xFF00863C/}Leader, Ranotah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as he is responsible for many things regarding Kazeura.%% Nice to meet you all!
Oh? You want to leave already?
{C=0xFF00863C/}Leader Ranotah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will give a tour for the new visiting warriors.
Ah... Your face is very familiar...%% It's a pleasure to meet you. My name is Ranotah, I am the leader responsible for the warriors at the precious treasure place.
Paradise (2)
Potchis in Eruda Valley

The Mashiram Mountains where Kazeura is located is a rough and tough place. So many people are unwilling to come.%% And it used to be heavily foggy due to the Ancient Magical Field that is called the nest of Kazeura.%% But... One day the heavy fog was gone and the misfortune happened. The monsters of an unknown origin came up and the Precious Treasure got stolen.%% After the Precious Treasure got polluted, the animals living in this area got aggressive.%% One of the animals even learned martial arts from us...Anyway...we'd like to have the old good Kazeura back.%% Could you do us a favour?

We Drakans have always liked Potchis in {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% But these days, the Potchis are attacking the Drakans entering Kazeura through the Valley for unknown reason.%% Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat the Potchis. I can't ignore them attacking the travellers any more.
If you are too busy to help us, then I won't ask. You may dismiss now.
How's your work going?
From now on passing {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} shall be much easier. I appreciate your braveness.
Paradise (3)
Any Obcullings

Potchi is a special creature benefitting other animals in this area. Without Potchi, the ecosystem of this land will face difficulties. Potchi grows flowers or fruits and provides food to the animals living in this rough land. It also spreads its seeds over the wasteland to bring life to it. But I have no idea what caused them to be this abusive. Once Potchi got changed, Obculling too is changing these days.

Obculling and Potchi originally had a symbiotic relationship. Obculling likes the fruits of Potchi. But recently...%%Obcullings around Kazeura Village are becoming abusive. Now it is even threatening the travellers passing by.%%{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Can you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat the abusive Obcullings?
Just Obcullings. Is it a big deal?
So how are the Obcullings in {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
It was nice of you, defeating abusive Obcullings. But I have a bad feeling. Something is happening.
Paradise (4)
Spiny Potchi
Lotus Potchi

Right...What we need to do now is... Find out the reason that why the animals living near this place are becoming so violent.%% After observing the violent animals, the priests have found out that they have been poisoned by a special poison.%% Quickly go to {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You need to bring me some Potches that are suffering from the potent poison, you can catch them from there.

We need the poisoned Potchi so we can investigate this disease. They were friendly before but now they have become violent and are threating us.%% If you can catch some of them and bring them to us, we can start to investigate into what this disease really is.
You can't even catch the Potchi? I may have overestimated you.
Hurry up! Catch the poisoned Potchi!

Thanks to your help I can now take the poisoned Potchi to my boss. Phew, it gives me a headache just thinking about how difficult this would have been without you. Anyway, I am really thankful for your help!
Paradise (5)
Obtain Poison tester Charm

{C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... It's the beautiful place where the ancestors used to live.%% However, this place is difficult to get to because of the sharp and dangerous slope leading to it. The Cumbas who live there are a very smart and strong mystical creature.%% They are very friendly around us and are not as shy as many of the other creatures in Dragotaka. Our temple warriors used to teach our material arts to them.%% But now the Cumbra have become violent towards us. The Drakan's really want to return them to how they used to be if we could, but up until now this has not been possible..

A few days ago, we attached a special charm to the Cumbras created by Archpriest of Wind Quywcha. This Charm contains a strong chemical to help us identify the type of poison used.%% I need to return the Charm if I want to identify why they suddenly became so violent.%% Please collect a {C=0xFFFF0000/}Poison tester Charm{C=0xFF4D0D08/} that's attached to {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}'s Cumba's body. They become more violent everyday, so please hurry up!
You must have something else to do as you don't really look interested in this.
Did you bring the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Poison tester Charm{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me after killing the Cumbas?
How can you defeat the Cumbas so easily... As I expected, you are very strong. Good job.
Paradise (6)
Rami and Potchi in Salvalon

According to Archpriest Quywcha, Moodragora poison was used upon {C=0xFFFF5917/}Potchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} first, and the animals that ate the plants or fruits of the poisoned {C=0xFFFF5917/}Potchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} got poisoned as well.%% Someone must have poisoned {C=0xFFFF5917/}Potchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to have it turn to poison like that.%% We assume it was the Black Witch. If Quywcha was right, the animals like {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rami{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Potchi that eat the fruits of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Potchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} might have been poisoned as well.

Remember you captured Moodragora? I'd like to ask you do a favour for us again. Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rami{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Potchi. We are going to investigate this matter.
We desperately need your help...
Please defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rami{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Potchi. No time to waste.
I knew you would make it. {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Go visit Quywcha. Quywcha is looking for brave and skilful warriors like you.
Paradise (7)
Zaro [Arcade Mode F1]

So. You are {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Yes you must be the fellow Ranotah was talking about.%% My name is Quywcha, the Archpriest of Wind who has taken care of the Precious Treasure. I suppose you remember the charm to detect the poison that you brought to Ranotah? I am the one who asked for that charm.%% After examining the charm you brought, I figured out that the poison is not from this land.%% It has originated from Dark Magic. A very vicious dark spell was used.%% To cure the poison, I tried my best to make a remedy.

I informed the warriors in the temple to use the remedy upon the surroundings of Eruda Valley...%% Salvalon in the deepest gorge is a tough place. I'm afraid the inexperienced warriors may get in trouble if they enter the place.%% That's why I asked Ranotah to send skilful travellers.. Proceed to {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon[Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat a Cumba named {C=0xFFFF5917/}Zaro{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Are you a coward?
Cumba must be hidden somewhere deep in {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon[Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You are back. It's great to see you again. {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... Ranotah is looking for you. Now go. And take care.
Paradise (8)
Zaro [Scenario Mode(F5)]

The Mashiram Mountains surrounding Kazeura has two holy places: Salvalon and Lamieta. Salvalon has been the place for training martial arts for a long time while Lamieta is where we practice Taoist Magic.%% For all Drakans, the two places have been Paradise-like places. The warriors in our temple happened to know Zaro, a young and weak Cumba once. They were training martial arts in Salvalon at this time.%% We felt pity for poor Zaro who was always rejected and bullied by his brothers. So we taught him martial arts little by little.%% He didn't have a healthy body but was smarter than any other Cumbas. He tried to learn as well.%% That could be the reason how he became the King of Cumbas.

But Zaro too could not avoid the recent misfortune. He turned abusive as well. And he is smart too... If we leave him, then it may cause more trouble.%% I'd like to capture Zaro by myself, but I'm just too busy at the moment with more pressing maters.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Please. Enter {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon[Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat Zaro the King of Cumbas!
Alas, nothing can stop Zaro. Should I go then?
Cumbas can be found at {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon[Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Be careful.
Thank you for defeating Zaro. But since the peaceful Kazeura has been damaged, I can't be happy yet.
The Broken Magic Flute
Deliver the broken magic flute

Hey, you! What are you doing here!%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Yanai?!?! Am I in a dream...?){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% I almost persuaded Jaro but you ruined it and messed up my plan! You really don't know what's going on! {C=0xFF888888/}(I thought Yanai was dead...){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Besides, what's this! My favourite flute! You broke it! Do you know how important this flute is! {C=0xFF888888/}(It must be you... who threw it....){C=0xFF4D0D08/} What! What are you staring at? Ok, unlucky for you.. I better hit you rather than hit Kumba as I really need to let out this anger!

Get me back my flute! I really doubt someone like you will be able to replace such a valuable flute, but I cannot forget about this matter.%% (Some of her anger has subsided after you talk to her about Quywcha orders.)%% What, Quywcha sent you here to kill Jaro? Ah... What was on her mind?
