How can she rely on someone like you to kill Jaro?%% Now, I'm going to chase Jaro, go back to the village first and ask {C=0xFF00863C/}Priest Quywcha{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to keep this broken flute.%% You better ensure this flute is fixed before I meet you next... If you don't sort this problem out you sure will be sorry!
What...You're just going to run away. Why did I expect more from you?
You're really so stupid! I asked you to take this flute to Quywcha!

What? A priest looks just like Yanai?%% Ah, I see. Ok... you must have never met her before. Her name is Rue.%% She is twin sisters with Yanai, a Archpriest of Shadow. She has been protecting the precious treasure for a long time in the deepest part of Akia Cave....%% Hence, she may seem to have a cold personality, but her real heart is very kind one just like her twin sister.
You're really so stupid! I asked you to take this flute to Quywcha!
Do you still have business to take care of with me?
Magical Flute
Thick Ebony Wooden Stick

You didn't actually do anything wrong but, I guess you will be in trouble as the wayward kid is going to be angry. Hmm... what can we do now. We better do something quick! It was really a precious item to her.%% Hmm, how to handle this... ... ...%% Oh, yeah. Don't worry, I know what to do. I might have a way to solve it. Can you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

This broken flute is made out of a special wood called ebony wood, so let's try to find the materials and make it again in the same shape. If you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you will see that the black Kumba groups are attacking travellers along the pass with their black sticks. Kill some of them and, bring their {C=0xFFFF5917/}Thick Ebony Wooden Sticks{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me.
Rue looks very angry... How do you thinking we should handle him...
Did you bring the Thick Ebony Wooden Sticks?

You were quick! What an amazing kid... Hmm... but...%% This is meant to be a dark wood stick, but it looks like a normal oak tree and not ebony wood.%% Yeah, I never imagined that the Kumbas would be taking this kind of rare tree in such large quantities.%% Rue will cut you into a flute if I make a flute with this and ask you to take it to him. Haha.
Sign of Disaster (1)
Horn Lami

More and more animals have eaten the poisoned Potchi fruit! Now almost every animal in Mashiram has become violent...%% We are having problems identifying the poison itself, so I really do not know what to do.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, quick prepare to go {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

As {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}has been poisoned, the animals have been becoming very violent. I pity the animals called the Lami.%% They now poison any animals near them and now they are even attacking all travellers who pass through {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Please find the poisoned Lamis in {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and put them to rest before they cause any more trouble.
Please help me when you have a time.
Stay in{C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} until you have killed all of the Lamis.
Well done. You really did a great job. I hope this kind of terrible thing won't happen again in future.
Sign of disaster (2)
Pring's Feather

Usually, Pring is a bad tempered animal but don't usually cause a problem for Drakans. However, recently this has changed.%% Many Drakans have been attacked by Prings in the last month. We must try and restore the Pring to how they were.

Kimaira is a Pring which has been affected by the tainted precious treasure. To cure Kimaira, we will need to get some ingredients for a remedy from some normal Prings.%% I think I can make a perfect remedy by analysing a normal Pring's feather. If you can find some Leaf Pring and Black Pring at {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, please take a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Pring's Feather {C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring it to me!
You're too scared to do it? Ha...
The Prings are not very strong so stop being a coward. Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Eruda Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to find them with a courage.

Great job. Well done!%% Now, I have the perfect {C=0xFFFF5917/}Pring's Feather{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Hence, there is no problem to make a detoxicant.%% Thanks for everything. I'll pay you back, so please don't reject me.
Sign of Disaster (3)
Talk with Quywcha

You can't see it but, there are many thing's in this world you cannot see.%% Have you ever wondered why fire is hot, or where the wind is blowing?%% The vast expanse of land and sea, light, darkness, we don't think about it because it is so natural.%% We are living inside a great miracle.

However... There are not many days left for us to enjoy this peace.%% It's not a coincidence that the precious treasure suddenly woke with this violent nature, as well as Kazeura, which has been hidden by a magic shield for thousands of years, being revealed to the world.%% All of the animals in this place have become violent just after someone poisoned the Potchi...%% Because of the Black Witch's small changes to the Precious treasure the whole of Kazeura will soon meet the end.%% The Drakan's destiny set out by the god is their own destruction... This time is coming slowly... However, I hope I can changed this fate.
Ok, you don't have to care about what I'm saying...
Please stop this disaster. That's all this old man request of you {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...
Magic Flute, behind-the-scene-story
Black Ebony Stick

Ah, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I was looking for you. There is someone using a Black ebony stick at Lamieta...%% I'm not so sure you will be able to defeat this person now given your current ability. Are you confident with this fight?

Kelo is at Lamieta [Mission Mode].%% He is the mountain goat that has learnt the ancestral magic from my teacher, and top magician Brai.%% Let's go and fight him. If you can defeat him and bring back the Black ebony stick for me then I'll make a shadow flute and pass it to Priest Rue.
Ok, I guess that's a good idea. It might be too early for you to defeat Kelo...
You need to go Lamieta [Mission Mode] if you want to fight Kelo.

Oh... You can defeat Kelo?! You must be quite strong person! It's a good you came to me now. I have some spare time so I'll make a shadow flute for you right now.%% The flute is made with some special magic.
Eight Trigrams of Seven stars detecting precious treasure
Obtain Eight Trigrams of Seven stars

Did I tell you about Brai, my teacher? He is the one who discovered that there was a balance, a link if you will, between all creatures on Dragotaka.%% He found that the precious treasure is incredibly dangerous, since it contains all of the vicious dragon children.%% He is the only one who realised how important the precious treasure was and what damage it could cause if it got into the wrong hands, therefore he built the temple and appointed priests to defend it.%% After Brai discovered that the precious treasure was created to seal in all the vicious dragon's spirits, he used Summoner magic and the Spirit Shards to create the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Eight Trigrams of Seven stars{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and hid each of the precious treasures.%% He created the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Eight Trigrams of Seven stars{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, which can detect the location of each of the precious treasures, so he could keep an eye on the location of each of the Precious treasures because he was afraid someone would abuse their power.

However, now we have lost the Eight Trigrams of Seven stars and apparently the person stole the precious treasure is stood right in front of you.%% The soldiers who are meant to be protecting the Eight Trigrams of Seven Stars think I am the one who took it.%% However, it wasn't me and I really don't understand what's happened.%% I really don't know how this was possible but, I have a feeling I might know who is responsible. I have some suspicions about the mountain goat who learnt ancestral magic from Brai. We might be able to find out something by following him.%% Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Lamieta [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right now and kill the Kelo. I'm sure he has the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Eight Trigrams of Seven stars{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Well if your not interested in what I have to say I'll just find a more worthy warrior.
The terrain around Mountain Mashram is very rugged... So please be careful on your way to Lamieta Scenario Mode(F5).

Yes, the wicked Kelo used ancestral magic to change his appearance to look like me and took the Eight Trigrams of Seven stars.%% Anyway, it's not such a bad thing. Now, it will be easier for us to find the precious treasure.%% Thank you! {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for saving everyone in Kazeura!
Fate of destruction (1)
Talk with Danku
Cough, Coughing... Hmm... Ok... *Cough*.. Hmm.... You must be.. {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.... Lot's of people are talking about you kid.%% Hahahah....%%

Our Drakan ancestor has been chained inside the tower for so long... Do you know why?%% The Drakans were created by god for a purpose, there is a destiny we need to fulfil.%% Eir, our holy goddess created us to end the war with giant tribe, she inserted god's DNA into a dragon's egg, one of the most holy things to the Drakan people.%% That's how {C=0xFFFF5917/}the first Drakan, Origin,{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was born but...%% Our mother, goddess Origin has strong, dark powers.%% She is the source of the darkness itself, it will destroy everything... Therefore, Eir locked Origin up inside the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Black Abyss world{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Coughing, cough....
Hahaha... Ok, you will have to know about this someday. So, go and enjoy your peace... come back when you are bored.

But... Kid... You must remember this. Don't believe Ochukoe and the temple priests!%% They have suppressed our Drakan with lots of lies. The truth will be revealed soon. Don't forget it.%% Origin will be revived soon.%% Once the locked seven spirits are released, our goddess has promised us to return. Hahaha.... Yes... yes... Hahahha...%% Hahahha... Hahahha!
Holy Test (1)
Talk with Ochukoe

Because of your great work all the Drakans in Kazeura can't wait to talk to you. Haha...%% Ochukoe is also looking for you after he heard about the precious treasure story. Maybe... Hmm, it's possible he might want to hire you as a warrior for the precious treasure place specially! But that's just me speculating....%% It will be very a honourable thing for you to do... do you want to try it?

Soon, I'll find Akanai by using the Eight Trigrams of Seven stars. You can help me in my mission to find Akanai if you will commit to becoming a warrior for the precious treasure place.%% ... ...%% If you want to do this then go to find Priest Horn , Ochukoe. He is the eldest and is responsible for looking after this place. You must respect him, and never be rude in front of him.
You have something more important than your honour. Ok, no problem.
Go and find Priest Horn, Ochukoe. I saw him waiting for you inside the village.
Nice to meet you! {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Your story is spreading fast in Kazeura. Because of {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}'s help the situation here is improving everyday!
Holy Test (2)
Talk with Syari
Ok so I called you because... I want to ask you to become one of our temple warriors {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I invited you here so I could listen to your opinion.

Humans and Drakans need to learn to live together in harmony, there is no need for discrimination between our races, ages or gender.%% However, what we really need right now is to be prepared to fight to avert catastrophe with our wisdom and courage.%% Fortunately, we have talented person like you, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, so we want to recruit you as a temple warrior, you just need to pass a special test.%% Go to {C=0xFF00863C/}Archpriest of Earth Syari{C=0xFF4D0D08/} when you are ready. Good luck!
Hahaha... You look different to what I expected.
Did you talk with Syari?

Nice to meet you. I'm Earth Archpriest Syari and I will be giving you your first test {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Priest Maytry is my twin sister , so that might be why you think you recognise me.%% If you can continue to prove yourself like you have been up until now, then I am sure you will have no problem passing this test. I'm honoured to meet you.
Test from the Earth (1)
Kill Zaro

The place we keep god's special treasures is a divine temple. A priest like me will protect the precious treasure from god together with lots of warriors.%% Usually, our Drakan warriors are required to pass seven tests given from the seven priests at Akia cave.%% However, some of priests have gone to the human world including priest leader, Mukapa... Thus, I will replace these with some different tests instead.%% Are you ready?

As a priest of the Earth, I really cannot forgive the Black Witch who poisoned the Potchi and polluted the nearby Kazeura areas.%% I feel very sorry for those who are living on this earth and have become sick and have been changed by her poison.%% Now, I'm helping Quywcha to implant a plant seed into a Potchi's head which contains many detoxifying ingredients.%% Of course, it will take some time for them to recover to their original condition. However, I really want to restore our nature back to how it was before it was polluted, even though it will cost me a lot to do that.%% By the way, I don't know why but Kumbas are now killing Potchi without a good reason. Maybe Zaro wants revenge... This will be for the last time...%% Here is my test for you. Go to Salvalon [Scenario mode(F5)] and kill Zaro. He is a smart one, he will be expecting you.
Please find me again once you're ready.
You must kill run away Zaro in {C=0xFF016295/}Salvalon [Scenario mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

I've heard from our warrior that you've already killed Zaro. You've passed the Earth element test. Congratulations!%% As I'm a priest of the Earth, I recommend {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}as a warrior for the divine temple.
Earth's Test (2)
Talk with Quywcha

There is another test you need to take, go and speak with Quywcha and she will tell you what you need to do.%% Come back to me when you have finished and I will tell you who will give you the next test.
Find Archpriest of Wind Quywcha.%% I hope you will pass the tests from Quywcha and Yanai, I'm looking forward to meeting you again, so we can kill Akanai. All the best to you!
Do you have something more important to do? Quywcha is waiting...
Go to Quywcha. You better hurry up.
Greetings {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm Archpriest of Wind Quywcha and I will conducting your second test. I am going to push you to the limit, so you better be prepared!
Wind's Test

I would have never have sent a kid like you on such difficult tests in the past, but desperate times call for desperate measures.%% It means this is really incredible. Thus, you also better do your best to pass the test.%% Ok, so you look like ready to it. So let's start it now?

To be honest {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I knew your ability because you found the Eight Trigrams of Seven Stars.%% So, you don't really need to take a test, but I have to make it fair, everyone else had to take the test.%% Therefore I, Archpriest of Wind Quywcha, am going to give you a test. Since the Potchi have been cured from the poison with the detoxification fruit and Kumba has been woken, the Kazeura area will back to normal after a little while.%% There is still a problem however, there is still someone who wants to take Kazeura. Go to Lamieta[Scenario Mode(F5)] and kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Kelo{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I thought Kumba was woken after returning the Eight Trigrams of Seven stars, but he skill wandering around Kazeura village. It may be related to the stealing of the Precious treasure.
Of course, I can understand you that you feel anxious but... It's time to get going.
I heard that {C=0xFFFF5917/}Kelo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is still at Lamieta[Scenario Mode(F5)]. What have you been doing??

I heard from the temple warriors that you defeated Jaro. Well done, the test is complete. However...%% Before I tell you the result, I have something to tell you.%% When you become a temple warrior, you unfaltering courage and strength of mind is essential.%% You will face dangerous times while protecting the precious treasure.%% If you falter while the precious treasure is unstable then not only you but others will be at great risk... You mustn't forget this.%% Well then... I, the Archpriest of Wind Quywcha will allow you, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, to become a temple warrior.%% Congratulations, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!
Shadow's Test (1)
Talk with Rue

I haven't been able to see Archpriest of Shadow Rue recently and I am very worried about her.%% She never shows how she is really feeling, she must be keeping too much to herself, her only sister has died.%% What to do....

Rue has been alone very hard since she lost her older sister. Maybe her way of dealing with the pain is by burying herself in her work.%% If you want to take shadow's test you need to go and meet her. I heard from the temple warriors that she is now staying at {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Quickly go and find her.
You better not reject me.. Hmm...
I'll be waiting for you.
What.. You?! Ah! Your face looks familiar...
Shadow's Test (2)
Talk with Rue

Hey! You! Have you fixed my flute yet?%% What? Quywcha has fixed it but she still has it? Is your head screwed on? You can't just break my things and then run around freely doing as you please.%% You are the one broke it, so you should be the one fixes it and returns it to me! heh!

Argh...%% Hahaha! Were you surprised? I've already received the flute from Quywcha...%% Why do you look so angry? I was only joking with you...%% My name is Rue. Archpriest of Shadow Rue. I heard from Quywcha you are trying out to be a temple warrior.%% oh and... Were you there when Yanai was casting Garuda's spell...?%% That day, I could just tell something was up with Yanai, I could feel she was gone.%% I knew since I was young...%% Priests are required to sacrifice their life for the precious treasure... This is really scary. I mean I really should be prepared to die.%% Ah... yes. You, you are taking a test right. Come and find me in the Cave's Next Floor when you are prepared. I'll tell you what you need to do for the test.
How dare you run away...! You really want to take the path which leads you straight to hell ?
I'll be waiting for you on the next floor. Don't keep me waiting too long!
You came finally. Ok, I let you know in advance... I really hate people who can just talk the talk, but not walk the walk!%% If you want to pass this exam, you better try your best.
Shadow's Test (3)
Perry Aerial

Shhh! Be quiet....%% ... ... This place is covered in monsters sent by the black witch!%% Haha.. I guess this is ok... I guess I can observe you killing these unwanted visitors to {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% You better tell me now if you want to give up. I don't know how strong they are.

The Archpriest of Shadow's test is still the same now as it has been always. There is a monster called Aerial inside {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Aerial is the monster the first archpriest for the temple, Brai, created to protect the precious treasure.%% It will not attack temple warriors or priests but it does attack strangers who set foot in the temple, invaders and people like you who I send to take this test.%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Perry Aerial{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is the longest living summoned monster from the Aerials. It is the strongest of the summoned monsters.%% I must warn you, it has become stronger and faster because of all the monsters sent by the Black Witch ! Hahaha!%% I will check out whether the rumours about it's increased power are true or not. So to complete the test you must kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Perry Aerial{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I am going to where the Spirit of Grudge is, so come and find me there after killing it. Let's go!
Yes! I guess I should have expected this, since you have already shown this attitude in the past... Haha
What... why do you look so blurry? I told you to kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Perry Aerial{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and then come and find me where the Spirit of Grudge is.
Slow, slow... That was very slow... I thought I was going to die of boredom while I was waiting for you!%% I really can't accept such a weak person as a warrior for the precious treasure place.
Fire's Test
Kill Spirit of Grudge

This is our longest tradition, so I need to inaugurate you once you have passed the test but... I still can't allow you to be a warrior for the Precious Treasure place.%% I'm going to give you few more test you need to pass. If you can pass them all, then I'll accept your ability and inform our Archpriest of Shadow.

Since a few days ago monsters sent by the Black Witch have been turning up here. The monsters we are calling Spirit's of revenge, are especially annoying.%% They are just like cockroaches. I've killed them many times but no matter how many you kill they keep coming back! I think they are coming through a rift to another world.%% When I was killing them a few days ago I found the leader of the Spirit's of revenge at the deep part of {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Kill the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit of Grudge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} monster. Consider this your new test.
Don't you think you better stop here?
Remember what I told you when you are fighting the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit of Grudge{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Find me after you have killed him, I'll be near the Bat Spiders.

... ... It must have been...%% very tough for you. I'll give you some potion so you can regain your strength.%% As you defeated the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit of Grudge{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.... The Temple's Archpriest will certainly inaugurate you.%% Well done... But, next time don't take on the hardest monsters.%% None of this is meaningful if you are dead.
Water's Test
Bat Spider
If you can pass the water test as well then... I might be able to consider accepting you. Right... listen carefully to the rules of the test, they are important.

Your mission for this test is quite dangerous one. {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bat Spiders{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are living in a dangerous deep cave.%% You need to be very careful, tread lightly or something terrible may happen to you. Good luck and depart when you are ready.
This is the final test for you.. So don't you think it's a better idea to at least try?
If you can get through this place, it will be easy to find where Akanai is.
I may have underestimated your ability! You have done well to kill so many {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bat Spiders{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You better go and rest before we continue, your injury looks serious.
Talk to priest Quywcha

I will accept you as a warrior, but you still need to gain some experience. As you act carelessly, you have been poisoned by Bat Spider's poison.%% You do not take enough care of yourself even when danger is staring you in the face.%% A warrior who does not understand the importance of life will quickly become history.%% The warrior will lose their life in the first fight.

The priests can purify the tainted precious treasure they are currently protecting by sacrificing themselves, using Garuda's special magical spell which was created by Brai but...%% You can't allow yourself to die, for no reason. Soon, you will need to have some tough training. Otherwise you will be killed by Akanai and your death will be pointless.%% Ok. Let's stop this gloomy talk now. I'll tell Quywcha that you are good enough to be a warrior for the precious treasure place. %% Go back to Quywcha at {C=0xFF016295/}Kazeura Village{C=0xFF4D0D08/} immediately.
You might have some mental problems so you might want to just give up right now.
Go on, go to Quywcha now. I am bored of looking at your face.

Finally, you are back from the test. Soon, Ochukoe will appoint you as a warrior for the precious treasure place properly with a coronation ceremony. Congratulations {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!
Chaos Time
Talk to Ochukoe

{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, it has been chaos while you have been away.%% The Drakan have started to experience mental blackouts because of the pollution being released by the tainted precious treasure.%% Some of warriors have experienced a mental blackout while they were conducting an investigation at Akia Cave. They say they saw a ghost or something like that and then just fainted.%% I'm afraid that just like before, the Drakan tribe will become violent again and destroy the world.

I was worrying about you as you went to Akia Cave to take the test, I thought you might have experienced the same mental blackout! %% Did you see anything at Akia Cave? Ok, that's really good.%% Ok...well, now it's the time to find Akanai, go and find Ochukoe who will accept you as a warrior for the precious treasure place.
Do you really want to give up the chance to be a warrior for the precious treasure place?
Go and find {C=0xFF00863C/}Priest Horn Ochukoe{C=0xFF4D0D08/} when you are ready.

{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Finally, you've passed all the tests. Now I can appoint you as a warrior for the precious treasure place. Please do your best. For the future of Kazeura and the world.
Fate of destruction (2)
Talk with Danku

Little kid... Hahah... haha... again we meet like this.%% So Ochukoe and Quywcha's want you to seal in Akanai again ? Cough...%% It will only cause more unhappiness. We need to accept our fate.%% We will all die anyway and return to the earth, our god has disappeared, the end is near.

Many of the Human's and Drakan's priests cannot just accept this fate.%% They just want to live, even just for one more day. What they do not realise is that they are stopping prosperity for the Drakan's.
Hahah... There is nothing that can be done now to avoid this fate. Origin's revival has already started. Hahahah....

Origin is coming back to this world from the Dark Abyss, eventually this world will end. This is the only thing I believe.%% So do not stop the release of the precious treasure. We accept our destruction. (I wonder if this is the person who stole the precious treasure?)
Kill Akanai!
Kill Akanai
Drakan warriors, please listen to me. Akanai is hiding in the darkness of {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and is threatening the future of our Drakan world.
Drakan and human warriors, Please kill Akanai.%% If today, at {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, we can kill Akanai. This will surely be the most important day in the Drakan's history.
Are you really just going to be a coward at such an important time, when we could start to restore peace to the world ?
What about Akanai?

Oh! It is such a pleasure for the Drakan to hear that Akanai has been killed.%% I think you deserve a special reward, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you have released us from a lot of worrying.
Light's Test (1)
Kill Perry Aerial

Hey, did you also come here after you heard the news that the precious treasure has been polluted? (What's happened? How come Yanai!?) I'm searching for Akanai now. Do you want to help me? {C=0xFF888888/}(Ah, this is just like what happened on the day I met her for the first time...){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Other guardian warriors of the precious treasure place have also gone to try and stop Akanai. We better hurry up! Let's go.

Lets go to where Akanai is hiding, we will need to enter the deepest part of {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% There are too many enemies, so let's spilt up here and we can meet up again later where Perry Aerial is.%% All the best to you. {C=0xFF888888/}(This is the hallucinations that I heard from Quywcha before? I'm really not sure...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
I don't have any other warriors who can support me with this except you. Please follow me.
I already told you to meet me again when you have killed {C=0xFFFF0000/}Perry Aerial{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Now hurry up!

You look like quite strong. But, I can see your weakness in your attacks when I saw how you were fighting with {C=0xFFFF0000/}Perry Aerial{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Everything has both strengths and weaknesses. This can even be applied to your attacks. You need to mix these two elements very carefully to make your attacks useful. {C=0xFF888888/}(As I expected, Yanai is really very kind compared to Rue...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Light's Test (2)
Kill Spirit of Grudge
Ok, we are moving to the next floor, so you better be ready.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Is this Yanai who standing in front of me? There is something fishy about him.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}

Ok, as before I'll meet you where the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit of Grudge{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is staying. Before I recruit you as a warrior for the precious treasure place, I'm going to test you are worthy.%% To pass the light's test you must kill the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit of Grudge{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I bid you Good Luck!
Kazeura village will be in disaster if we don't do anything about Akanai.
I'll wait for you near the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit of Grudge{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Try your best to find me.

Like fire, water, wind and earth and like light and shadow, there is always balance of dark and light in the world.%% The two different elements are clashing with each other and balance will only be restored after they have fought their battle..%% Do you understand the nature of this theory? However, somebody is denying this battle and without it there will be no balance.
Light's Test (3)
Kill Bat Spider

It is probably why someone moved the polluted precious treasure of Akanai to {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Akanai has been locked within the precious treasure for a long time, so now all he can only think about is finding the precious treasure of Shadow.%% I guess they released Akanai here to find the Precious treasure of Shadow, it's was hidden deep inside this cave a long time ago.

As usual, let's meet on the next floor. You may need to pass where the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bat Spider{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is living. So, please be careful.%% (You have just seen the ebony wood flute in Yanai's pocket)%% What are you doing? You must be hurry up!%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Ah... That flute is...!!!){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
You must be too scared to confront Akanai. Ok then, I can't do anything for you.
I will go first to the cave where the{C=0xFFFF5917/}Bat Spiders{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are living. Be careful and follow me back.

Did you know that Akanai is actually our ancestor? Well, not just Akanai but there are also seven other spirits who have all been locked into the precious treasure. They all used to be known as the Dragon Children.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(If this is not a hallucination caused by the pollution from the precious treasure...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% The precious treasure locked up the Dragon Child who had been horribly changed because they were influenced and were overcome by the desire to destroy. We protect it to ensure our people never forget what happened in the past and to ensure we do not make the same mistakes.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Then the person standing right in front of me... is not Yanai... It's Rue!){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% The reason we protect the precious treasure is not only to protect it from ham, but to protect our tribe and most importantly save the world!
No shadow can be cast in the unextinguished light
Talk with Yanai

What are you looking at?%% {C=0xFF888888/}(You stare in wonder thinking that it's impossible that Yanai has the shadow flute, only one exists.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% If I don't hurry up then...%% {C=0xFF888888/}(This cannot be Yanai standing here.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Hmm...%% Yeah... Finally, you look like you have worked it out. I was beginning to question your intelligence but you actually worked it out quite fast.%% As you have realised, I'm not Yanai. I'm Rue. I'll apologize about having to hide things from you.

If you try and challenge Akanai now, I'm quite sure you are just not strong enough and Akanai will strike you down before you even get to touch him.%% Thus... I've wanted to scare you off but it seems you never run away until the end.%% However... {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... your braveness is going to end here.%% It's a time for you to go back to the village, it's simply too dangerous for you here. Don't worry. I will seal Akanai inside the Precious Treasure of Earth without you...
Yeah, a weakling like you should get out of this cave right now.
Don't joke. Only one person will defeat Akanai and that is me.

Please promise with me right now that you will go back to the village immediately..%% I'll go back later after I have defeated Akanai... If our paths cross again then next time I'll play some music with this flute for you. Ok...?%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Rue uses the Garuda Spell and sacrifices herself like just Yanai did.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Call from the ancient forest. (1)
Kill Flying Squirrels
Kill Woods Flying Squirrels

My name is {C=0xFF00863C/}Shangdor{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I'm the best warrior in the Mika tribe... I can take anything in battle but I cannot stand it if someone is trying to humiliate our tribe.%% I don't care who they are, even the Dragon Expedition, or Drakan's, no one will be safe if they are trying to humiliate our tribe.%% I noticed you don't look like any ordinary traveller. What made you come here?

You want to go Verdurous Forest? To meet Hel Krouzer? Hmm.. You didn't pick a very good time.%% All of the forests around Verdurous Forest are in a complete mess. Umm, I've already said too much.%% You should prove your ability if you want to know more information. I really wouldn't want to be dealing with a weak person.%% Come to find me after killing 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Flying Squirrels and Woods Flying Squirrels{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% If you can't kill those monsters at{C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, then it would be most unwise to go to Verdurous Forest.
Haha, such a weakling...
Did you kill those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Flying Squirrels and Woods Flying Squirrels{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

You are pretty good! You did learn how to get your balance, didn't you?%% You must use the direction keys and jump button at the same time when you are going to fall whilst fighting the Flying Squirrel.
Call from the ancient forest. (2)
Talk with Naoi

Heh! Naoi is really great... She said a capable warrior would be visiting us but... You really are the same person he had in her dream without any doubt...%% The Mika Tribe has a Shaman called Naoi. She has premonitions of the future.

Naoi said a stranger will come to find me and she asked me to send the warrior to her after her dream yesterday.%% All of us are moved by the message she received in her premonition. She is a very special person to our tribe.%% She can be quite sensitive, so just be careful about what you say and do around her.%% My fist will not forgive you if you make her cry.
What, how can you dare to ignore her!?
Go on then.... Go meet her!

You actually came! I'm Shaman Naoi of the Mika Tribe.%% You are the person I saw in my dream last night. Ah, you must be embarrassed but... as you've already heard... I dream about the future.%% I even know that you are heading to Verdurous Forest to meet Hel Krouzer.
Wanderer's the book of revelation (1)
Talk to Naoi

Our Mika tribe has been living by Eir's message since long ago.%% We elected two shaman from our tribe, and decided what we should do as a tribe following their dream.%% Currently, my older sister, Orhah, and I are the Mika Tribe's shaman.

The reason why we came to Verdurous Forest is because of the dream that I had about half a year ago.%% Our shaman often has a premonitions about oncoming disasters such as floods and drought. We have always lived as nomads moving from place to place depending on what the dreams are telling us.%% However, the dream I had that night was very different to any I had before.
Oh... Please listen to our tribe's history. You are a very special person.

The whole world was covered in white ash. The forests and the rivers disappeared, the people who survived could only cry...%% All of a sudden a huge black sphere appeared in the sky...%% As quickly as the sphere appeared, it was gone, it sucked everything into darkness.%% Submerged in darkness, all alone, all I could do was cry. And...Then... I heard a voice.%% 'Go to the forest where god is sleeping.', the voice said. We followed the voice to the place where Eir was sleeping....
Wanderer's the book of revelation (2)
Talk with Syamalky

I came from far away to the Verdurous Forest area following the path which was set for me in my dream but, as you can see, I have faced many difficulties here.%% The woodmen Burnaun tribe is blocking the only way to enter Verdurous Forest.%% Our tribe is only able to enter the Verdurous Forest by following a special guide.%% The woodmen however are just cutting down all the trees to create a way into the Verdurous Forest.

Anyway, I had a dream last night while we are stuck here.%% The dream is about you are entering Verdurous Forest. The Tree of God is leading you there.%% Maybe we will be able to move on and get to the place where the God is sleeping because of you.%% Ask {C=0xFF00863C/}Syamalky{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for information about the woodmen as he has been keeping an eye on them.
If you can't help us, this will become a disaster!
Please go and meet {C=0xFF00863C/}Syamalky{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Hey, nice to meet you! My name is {C=0xFF00863C/}Syamalky{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!%% You must be the warrior... who I heard about from Naoi... I was imagining a tall strong person as she said you will kill the woodsmen and make it safe to enter Verdurous Forest... Hahaha!
The people protecting Verdurous
Kill Agnee

The Mika Tribe has become very small. Even now, we don't have enough young people. I heard our tribe prospered a thousand years ago but... After the Holy Empire labelled us as a cult, we have all separated from each other due to the suppression we encountered...%% So, now our tribe is only held together by the name.

But, I'm proud to call myself a member of the Mika Tribe. Protectors of the Earth! Have you heard of {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Parmir{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% He is one of the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Thousand Years Hero's{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The heroes who defeated Elga... {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Parmir{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is one of the Mika tribe.%% I also want to be the best hunter like {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Parmir{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The problem is there are just not enough animals to hunt around this area as {C=0xFFFF5917/}Agnee{C=0xFF4D0D08/} which we call tree spirits have appeared.%% So, you...Yea you...Do you want to compete with me? Let's see who is the fastest to kill 30 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Agnee{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Hmm.. Maybe I was mistaken, I thought you were the strong warrior Naoi was going to send.
You better hurry up and kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Agnee{C=0xFF4D0D08/} if you want to stand a chance to win the bet!
Wow! Oh my!! Are you sure you didn't cheat! I thought I was going to win for sure!%% Wow you beat me so well... Can you tell me your secret? Haha..
Woodman's Appearance (1)
Talk to Orhah

We have passed through Verdurous Forest and are now heading towards Gods' Sanctuary but we are stuck here because of Burnaun woodmen.%% We told Orhah not to go there but she has gone alone to the area where woodmen are.%% Can you please find her for us?

Our tribe doesn't have enough strong, young people and we are spread quite thin because many people in our group have gone to forage for food. We just don't have enough people to protect Orhah right now.%% I want you to meet Orhah. You are more than qualified for the job.
Hey! You are not going to give up and leave Orhah alone are you, right ?
Orhah is observing woodmen at {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Go find her!
Ah.. Who are you...? Syamalky asked you to find me?
Woodman's Appearance (2)
Violent Woodman

Oh hey! I just wanted to tell you that Shangdor said he had a reliable friend visiting him... So it must be you who Naoi saw in her dream ?%% Phew I feel relaxed now, I was surprised just then. The reason I came here is to observe the movement of Verdurous Forest.%% Verdurous Forest only allows a specially selected person to enter. This area is twisted like a labyrinth.%% {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has the only way to gain access to Verdurous Forest... A lot of the trees here have been growing over a few thousand years...%% The shape of forest is continually changing due to the ancient magic shield called the shield of Verdurous. It's there for a good reason however, we wouldn't want just anyone to be able to enter.

The Mika tribe is allowed to enter Verdurous Forest because the Tree of the god shows us the way.%% However, everything has been messed up because the of Woodman Burnaun. They received an order from the Black Witch to cut down all of the trees here.%% If you are the truly brave warrior Naoi saw in her dream, please help us.%% You can start by killing woodmen at {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}[Mission Mode]. Please help the injured Verdurous Forest.
I think you might not be good enough to help me right now.
There are many {C=0xFFFF5917/}Violent woodmen{C=0xFF4D0D08/} wandering around {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}[Mission Mode].
The movement from woodmen has slowed right down now. The attack you helped us with seems be working well.
Woodman's appearance (3)
Obtain Old Circular Saw Blade

It's important to kill woodmen but I'm very worried about the increasing number of Burnaun.%% I think it is better if we steal their equipment, but it's difficult for us to do that.%% If you can help us, we could give it a go...

Ah... Thank you. I don't know what to say... it's great you are willing to help me with this!%% Steal {C=0xFFFF5917/}Old Circular Saw Blades{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from woodmen at {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. It will really slow down the plans of the Burnaun if they don't have any equipment.
I'll make it worth your while if you will help us.
Go on, the woodmen at {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have {C=0xFFFF5917/}Old Circular Saw Blades{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Go and steal some!
We have done some damage to the weemen thanks to you help. This is very good. Thank you.
Appearance of Betrayer
Kill Woodsman Paul Burnaun

Paul Burnaun is a former chief of the hammer hunting dog tribe who live in the east of the chaos continent. He came here under the Black Witch's orders.%% They are now starting to take things too far, I cannot ignore this anymore.

If only you can kill Burnaun, the leader of the woodmen then maybe...just maybe the other woodmen will stop their logging work in Verdurous Forest. %% I'm begging you. Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill Woodsman Paul Burnaun. I have to kick them out to stop them from attacking the spirits and trees at Verdurous Forest.%%
Are you really just going to ignore this situation?
Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Woodsman Paul Burnaun{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Finally, you've killed {C=0xFFFF5917/}Woodsman Paul Burnaun{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!. I've been waiting this moment for such a long time.%% Now, I hope all I will have to do is watch them leave Verdurous Forest...
For the forest's future (1)
Talk with Orhah

I told you the story about the Mika tribe who came to this place long ago, didn't I?%% Our tribe was living far, far away from here in the Akasha East area until a thousand years ago.%% However, a thousand years ago, before Elga returned we were experiencing an invasion from Holy Empire. The cardinal from the holy empire considered us a cult because we could receive messages from god...%% Their Knight came to kill us all, even women and children, just slaughter us all like animals.

After that was over, when remaining survivors of the Mika tribe were suffering great pain from their losses, Shaman Charpira came to us.%% He was having dreams that Elga, the Dark Dragon Lord had returned and was going to make the whole world burn. Charpira was worrying greatly because of the nightmare, he couldn't eat or drink anything for days, he only prayed and hoped to get an answer.%% But that the time, many people were too afraid of the Holy Empire and ignored Shaman Charpira's warnings, they were angry he was not there when they really needed him.%% Thus, he had no choice and took the few people remaining in the Mika tribe to {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} where he could prove it to them.
I guess you don't like to listen to such a sad story.

As you already know soon after the Black Dragon Lord Elga returned and nearly brought the world to an end. Everywhere was burnt in flames, the Holy Empire was destroyed.%% Thankfully despite that, we were safe back then. Fortunately, Elga never attacked Verdurous Forest where Eir was sleeping.%% This place has become a second home to us. So we can't just let this forest suffer.
For the forest's future (2)
Talk to Shangdor
Talk to Syamalky

I asked some young warriors from the Mika tribe to conduct reconnaissance on Paul Burnaun.%% If Burnaun is really conducting a logging operation on the trees here then...well... We are ready to fight him!

Go to find Shangdor and find out what information he has gathered about what Burnaun is up to. Syamalky may have heard something while she has been hunting, so anything she has heard will be helpful too.%% I'll keep an eye on the situation from here, please return to me after you have spoken with Shangdor and Syamalky.
Please do not ignore us, we could really use your help.
You have already spoken with {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shangdor and Syamalky{C=0xFF4D0D08/}'? Go find them and return to me with the full story.
If don't do anything about this, Burnaun will leave no trees left in Pinecone Knoll. We need to hurry before too much damage is done!
The situation is getting worse. Burnaun is preparing a stronger offense that ever before to attack us.%% I think we better strike first before they gain any more strength.

A large flock of birds from the South have flown off! This means the woodsmen near there must have started to move.%% Oh yes, the Oil! The smell of oil covers where Burnaun currently is. I guess they are planning on burning the mountain!
For the forest's future (3)
Kill Woodsman Paul Burnaun

Finally, this is the time to strike against {C=0xFFFF5917/}Woodsman Paul Burnaun{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'll prepare us for battle by gathering all warriors from the Mika tribe. I hope you will be helping us!

Now it is time to punish the evil people who have been harming the holy, natural trees and spirits at Verdurous Forest. Go to Pinecone Knoll[Scenario Mode (F5)]. You must kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Woodsman Paul Burnaun{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and then come back to me.
Do you need more time to prepare?
Come back when you have killed {C=0xFFFF5917/}Woodsman Paul Burnaun{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Pinecone Knoll[Scenario Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Ah, today is a glorious day!%% You've done a great deed for the Mika tribe, so... I have a secret to tell you about Verdurous Forest.%% There is a hidden place in Verdurous Forest called the Altar of Verdurous and there is a secret machine which can disable the shield at Kundara Cave.%% Maybe Paul Burnaun is logging god's tree's to create a path so he can reach the Altar of Verdurous.
The true mind of betrayer
Talk with Hel Krouzer

The cursed dark magician, Mutisha, must be involved in what has happened. He was kicked out of his hometown by the humans because of he has been practicing vicious curses.%% He never reflects on the actions he is taking, but always seeks revenge on everyone who is against him. I guess this is why he wants to become the Black Witch's apprentice.

If you can catch Mutisha, you should be able to find the whereabouts of the Black Witch you have been looking for.%% Try to find Hel Krouzer if you are going to {C=0xFFFF5917/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. He is a mist elf who has been protecting {C=0xFFFF5917/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFF016295/}Verdurous Forest{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for a long time.%% Hel Krouzer has also been trying to track down Mutisha, so he might be able to help you.
I heard that you are looking for Hel Krouzer... But you look like you have changed your mind.
Find Hel Krouzer at {C=0xFFFF5917/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Hopefully he can help you.
Who are you? Why have you come to this sacred place? You will regret it if you don't leave this place right now.
The where the god is sleeping (1)
Talk with Pyrei

Ah... warrior... My premonition is coming true.%% It's exactly the same, I saw a warrior like you in my dream who was passing through this place on their way to {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Kentarous Pyrei lives at {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% A long time ago, Eir decided to come here and stay near Verdurous Forest to rest after his long struggle with the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Giant Tribe Elders{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Eir wanted there to be please in this area so she created two different tribes, the Mist Elves and the Kentars who were to live here in harmony. Just like the myth, Kentarous are a holy race that have protected {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for a long time. For sure, Pyrei will be able to help you.%% All the best in your future warrior...
Ah.. When you are ready to go then I'll tell you a story that may be useful to you, so come find me again then...
Pyrei is the holy Kentarous that protects {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Oooh! You surprised me...%% I know you're not a spy from Karous... right? So c'mon, tell me who you really are! (Are they....a really holy protector...?)
Going to the place where the god is sleeping (2)
Kill Kenta

Hahaha! Oh my god...%% I really misunderstood you. Why did you not tell me earlier that the Mika tribe's shaman sent you here?%% Ok, well lets forget about that. Recently {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} looks very different compared to before. It's very tense because of the internal war between Kentar.%% Before Mutisha came here, the Kentar enjoyed life without being involved with the outside world.%%

Ah, I'm running out of time. They will be here soon. The cursed Kentars...%% Can you help me to stop the crazy Kentars? They are working as a group and are trying to capture the normal Kentars like me.%% Please kill Kentars at {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I guess around 20 Kentars wander around there.
Ah, don't be like that, I have more to tell you!
All over {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} there are lots of Kentars who are trying to catch me.

Phew, I'm still alive. By the way, where did you learn to fight like that!? You're pretty good.%% I feel too ashamed to call this place {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} anymore. How can we act as if we are better than the others when we allow this to happen to the Kentars.
Betrayer's conspiracy
Obtain Keiron's Crossbow

Karous was he leader of our tribe. He was great. He was a very brave man and had great leadership.%% But, one day Mist Elf Hel Krouzer brought a human magician. In his words... 'the Black Witch is targeting the Fairy Stone which is hidden at Kundara temple.'%% Usually, Mist Elf Kentar doesn't listen to humans but...%% He started to open his mind and listened to this young magician as he brought such important information and because of his politeness, even though he was a human.%% Not long after this place became chaos like it still is. Karous became cursed by Mutisha is now just his minion!

Hmm, I really don't know whether should tell you this kind of story to you.. This is my first time I've met you. Anyway, you are also from outside.%% If you can bring my lost weapon, I might be able to trust you.%% Can you kill monsters at {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and return with {C=0xFFFF5917/}Keiron's Crossbow{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Ah.. As I expected, you are an untrustworthy outsider. I shouldn't have trusted you so easily.
I saw a monster at {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} pick up {C=0xFFFF5917/}Keiron's Crossbow{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I was worrying that I requested you to do such a difficult one but... I never imagine that you can really find back{C=0xFFFF5917/}Keiron's Crossbow{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so fast like this. Hahahah!
Half human and half devil's peaceful place (1)
Kill Karous

At first, Mutisha was very caring about our tribe, it was as if she was one of us. She would always worry about us and give us good advice.%% This is why ,{C=0xFFFF5917/}Karous{C=0xFF4D0D08/} did not see who she really was and allowed himself to be kidnapped by her!%% If you are curious about {C=0xFFFF5917/}Karous{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, go to {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to find him.%% He is not thinking rationally and is trying to disable Kundara's shield around the restricted area!%% Fortunately, Mist Elf Hel Krouzer still has the ring, so the spiritual protection stone is well protected.%% I'm worried they might think I am the one who has the ring because they acted like they wanted to kill me.

Something terrible will surely happen to our home, Gods' Sanctuary, if we just sit back and watch {C=0xFFFF5917/}Karous{C=0xFF4D0D08/} now.%% Something very scary is sleeping inside Kundara's Shield.%% Young warrior, please kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Karous{C=0xFF4D0D08/} who has the polluted soul at Gods' Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1].
If you don't want to help me then, I'll lose all hope too.
You can find {C=0xFFFF5917/}Karous{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and his followers at {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Having a victory at this time has an important meaning and creates hope but... We still can't relax. {C=0xFFFF5917/}Karous{C=0xFF4D0D08/} doesn't understand defeat and might be preparing an alternative way to disable Kundara's shield by re-distributing their soldiers...
Half human and half devil's peaceful place (2)
Clear Gods' Sanctuary [Scenario Mode (F5)]

Oh... I never imagined this day would come. Actually, I'm not a good Kentar. Originally I was the opposite.%% I would always complain about everything, I was too lazy to do anything and no one would play with me and they excluded me from their groups.%% Kentar was the true Karous before he has was cursed.

As I never really mixed with the main group of Kentar... I could be safe from this Mutisha's curse.%% According to Hel Krouzer, there is no way to lift this curse. I guess that means that maybe I'll be alone forever...%% In fact, I was thinking that I should join the cursed Kentar and become one of them. However, I've changed after I met you.%% How can you care so much about me even though I'm not related to you? This is the first time in my life that I feel like I have a true friend.%% So, now the time has come to defeat Karous! Please go and kill Karous and the polluted Kentars, sorry I cannot come with you friend. You may find them at {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary [Scenario Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
It's ok, you don't have to help me, I guess its my own fight anyway.
Please clear {C=0xFF016295/}Gods' Sanctuary [Scenario Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
It seems like your braveness blocked Kundara's shield from being opened. I can truly say that you have almost stopped the oncoming disaster. You're really great!
To dear Hel Krouzer
Deliver Pyrei's Letter
You saved my life... I am forever in your debt, what can I possibly do to repay you?%% I'll do anything I can for you. Please tell me something I can do.

Ah? You want to solve the misunderstanding with {C=0xFF00863C/}Hel Krouzer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Let me think about this....%% It's true that the Mist Elves are difficult to control but, after listening to your story I also think that {C=0xFF00863C/}Hel Krouzer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is in the wrong.%% So how about this... I'll write a letter to {C=0xFF00863C/}Hel Krouzer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} myself, and you could take it and show it to {C=0xFF00863C/}Hel Krouzer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me.%% Even an arrogant Mist Elf like {C=0xFF00863C/}Hel Krouzer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} should finally understand you.
Please, tell me whenever you want some help and I will do my best to help you.
If you go to find Hel Krouzer, he will surely help you. Don't worry about it and just deliver this letter to him.

What's this....A letter.... From Pyrei? Why, its from the coward Kentar who fled from the pollution on his own.%% Hmm, Ok then... I'll try and read it now. ... ... ... ... %% Argh I can't read Kentar's writing, how can you send a recommendation letter that looks like this?!%% It's so bad I guess it proves this letter is from Kentar, he is so stupid.%% Anyway....I would like to listen to your story.
If you go to find Hel Krouzer, he will surely help you. Don't worry about it and just deliver this letter to him.
What's up? Do you have any business with me?
Griffon Pet Promotion
Battle Pet Advancement Kit

Hello! {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Wow! Griffon has grown up already! %% It feels just like yesterday I was making a incubator for you, but now look... you are so strong and grown up.%% Somehow, Griffon also grew up, so you'd better promote him to be a battle pet... Hahaha! What do you think {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

If Griffon becomes a battle pet he will pick up items and attack monsters!%% This is a rite of passage to increase Griffon's potential.%% You really should buy a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from my shop to promote your pet. So, please buy one and bring it to me.
It will be a great advantage to you if you promote your pet to a battle pet. Your hunting speed will increase and your pet will pick up dropped items and gold for you!

Ah, I'm very sorry but I cannot do anything for you if you don't have a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... I'm selling it at a good price in my shop, so please buy one from me... You won't regret it.
You can use the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Evolution Crystal{C=0xFF4D0D08/} reward to promote your riding pet.%% Try to promote your pet. I wish you and Feilon have a happy journey together!
Wyvern Pet Promotion
Battle Pet Advancement Kit

Hello! {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Wow! Feilon has grown up already! %% It feels just like yesterday I was making a incubator for you, but now look... you are so strong and grown up.%% Somehow, Feilon also grew up, so you'd better promote him to be a battle pet... Hahaha! What do you think {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

If Feilon becomes a battle pet he will pick up items and attack monsters!%% This is a rite of passage to increase Feilon's potential.%% You really should buy a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from my shop to promote your pet. So, please buy one and bring it to me.
It will be a great advantage to you if you promote your pet to a battle pet. Your hunting speed will increase and your pet will pick up dropped items and gold for you!

Ah, I'm very sorry but I cannot do anything for you if you don't have a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... I'm selling it at a good price in my shop, so please buy one from me... You won't regret it.
You can use the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Evolution Crystal{C=0xFF4D0D08/} reward to promote your riding pet.%% Try to promote your pet. I wish you and Feilon have a happy journey together!
Go to find the Fairy Stone
Talk with Pablo

It turns out the information that the Black Witch used the Drakan's precious treasure to create a vicious dragon is true.%% Maybe what Dr. Farrell said is true and the witch is trying to revive the Black Dragon Lord Elga.%% So if we just ignore this, a disaster will be unleashed upon this land just as Paris wishes!%% So, I would like you to embark on an important mission for me.

It was one thousand years ago... When Elga almost made this world come to an end.%% Many children were chosen by God to become guardians of the future generations of Dragotaka, they became known as the, {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Guardian Sprit of Fire Skippy{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Guardian Sprit of Water Mirinae{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Guardian Sprit of Wind Belkan{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Guardian Sprit of Earth Parmir{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...%% Each of the Guardians had a weapon which could be blended with a {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Fairy Stone{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% These {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Fairy Stones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} were sealed somewhere in our spiritual place after they were last used to defeat Elga so many years ago.%% If you can find the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Fairy Stones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} I speak of, we have some hope even though Elga is revived.%% Please find their whereabouts as this could be the only weapon which can defeat Elga.
Do you really just want to watch Elga's revival?

The only person who knows about the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Fairy Stone{C=0xFF4D0D08/}is Mist Elf Hel Krouzer who lives at Verdurous Forest.%% I want you to go and find him, but I'm worried that you will not be able to find him because he is well hidden.%% There will be lots of peril waiting for you while you are looking for him at Verdurous Forest. Please be careful.
Looking for the Precious Treasure of Earth
Talk with Syari

Oh hey {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Today, I've got special to ask of you.%% I want you to conceal your identity and travel trying to find information about the precious treasure from around the whole world.%% Do you think you can help?

You will see Pinecone Knoll if you head towards the Chaos Continent from here. It's where the Ancient Forest started...%% We call it the Verdurous Forest. I used the eight trigrams to locate the treasure and they indicated that the Precious Treasure will be near there.%% The problem is that Verdurous Forest is also a very holy place that is protected by an ancient magic shield just like Kazeura, so not just anyone can enter...%% Therefore, I want you to do some investigation into the Precious Treasure's whereabouts at Pinecone Knoll which is the entrance to Verdurous Forest. Go and find Archpriest of Earth Syari right now. She will help you to prepare for your journey. Eir's blessing will always lead you to the right place.
If you say so... Well you should go on your way now.
Go to meet Archpriest of Earth Syari before heading to Pinecone Knoll.

Cool you are back!%% I feel so sorry to hear of the fate of Rue.%% Not only the Light Archpriest but also the Archpriest of Shadow have sacrificed themselves to protect the precious treasure, this is a very difficult time for us.%% However we cannot stop, we still need to try our hardest now more than ever.%% Please go and find the precious treasure of Earth quickly, we to purify it. C'mon then! Hurry to Pinecone Knoll.
Chance to trace the betrayer
Talk with Hel Krouzer

This has happened because of my poor judgement. All the trouble with Mutisha is my fault...%% He polluted Verdurous Forest on purpose because he predicted that I would bring the Forest's Ring to purify the forest!%% He planned to swap the ring by making me fight with Revious. Please help me. Please forgive my stupidness.

Like you said, Paris, the Black Witch is probably behind this, I expect she is trying to get rid of any source of potential trouble for Elga's revival...%% But what Mutisha really wants is the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Fairy Stone{C=0xFF4D0D08/} that is hidden at Kundara. He is going to try to use the forest's ring to wake Aram up!
Maybe there is something that I can't return back even I'm regret so much. Ok, I got what your mean.

Aram is {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Kundara's Shield{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The scary ancient golem has been programmed to kill anything and everything that enters Kundara.%% It's programmed to take command only from the person who is wearing the Forest's Ring. Now, the ring is under Mutisha's possession. Ah...! I never expected we would be in such a bad situation.
Find the Altar of time
Broken Mushroom Factory's Monster

I don't really know what you are looking for but... I really don't have enough time to listen to anymore because the state of this place is terrible.%% You do know we are the Fungus tribe who plant the mushrooms of temptation, don't you? Everything has been messed up because the mushroom factory has been broken!%% So, I can only listen to your story once I've solved the problem in our town first.

What? You want to help us?%% Hmm... Ok... I think I might be able to allow that.%% If you like, you could help me by killing 100 monsters who have come to the Broken Mushroom Factory and messed it up.%% If you do that, I'd be happy to listen to your story.
Hmm, Ok... Then, just forget about the request from Hel Krouzer.
I asked you to kill monsters at the broken mushroom factory. Did you forget?!
Phew... At least now the repair work on the factory will be easier! Ok...So, tell me about your story.
A giant and dangerous pet
Kill Burlune

We don't know anything about the Alter of the time Hel Krouzer was talking about.%% I guess that's because our people left this place over a thousand years ago when Elga destroyed this place. We came back here just ten years ago to rebuild the town.%% Hmm.. Unless Bubo know something...

We hired a group of moneys who are loyal to Burlune to help us repair our town.%% The problem is that someone broke our mushroom factory and stole the really tasty mushrooms we were using to give to the monkeys as payment for their work.%% Because we cannot pay them they have stopped their work and have hidden somewhere. I have heard a rumour that Paris, the Black Witch was responsible for this... But I might be wrong.%% Apparently Shrooms is the one who asked Burlune to steal just the tasty mushrooms, but like I said apparently the Black Witch was the one who asked Shrooms to do it!%% I heard that they are using the mushrooms to spread poisoned insects. Please find and kill the monkey named Burlune if you can.%% I'll also try my best to help you if you can go to {C=0xFF016295/}Village of Slumber [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill him.
I might be able to tell you something about the Altar of the time...
What about Burlune at {C=0xFF016295/}Village of Slumber [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Oh, you've defeated Burlune! When I think about the moment when he must have been begging for mercy from you... It feels so good, like eating some delicious mushroom.
Monkey Leader who stole the Flute
Obtain the Awakening Flute

Our Master of Mushroom Planting for the Fungus tribe has a special {C=0xFFFF5917/}Awakening Flute{C=0xFF4D0D08/} it has been passed down through the ages to each town chief.%% Poison mushrooms can be very dangerous and sometimes someone eats one by accident, so the flute is used to wake up people who have become ill from the effects of the poison.%% This flute is priceless, there is nothing the flute can't wait people up from.%% Even people who have lost their memory will have their memory resorted just by hearing the beautiful sound of the flute, even for a short time.

I never thought Burlune would even be interested in the flute. But one day I saw him steal the flute and he began playing it to his monkey friends...%% The monkey who heard the sound of the flute ran away with Burlune. I thought finally I close the book on the issue with the violent monkeys but...again things are back to the way they were.%% If you can return the flute to Burlune, then I'll tell you the whereabouts of Bubo.%% We might get some important information from this area's sage Bubo by using the flute on him.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Village of Slumber [Scenario Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right now and kill Burlune and return with my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Awakening Flute{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!
I can only help you if you can return my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Awakening Flute{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me.
Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Village of Slumber [Scenario Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right now and kill Burlune and bring my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Awakening Flute{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back.
Oh... I'm so happy that you've defeated the annoying monkey leader and I am so thankful that you have returned the flute he stole to me!%% Thank you!
I'm one thousand and two hundred years old! Boo!
Clear Forgotten Village [Arcade Mode F1]

Oh.. OK... Yeah, I told you that I'll tell you about where Bubo is staying. Alright.%% Bubo is really a great sage. He has been alive for over two thousand and two hundred years!%% You could say he is a living encyclopedia as he has collected a lot of wisdom and knowledge over such a long time. Hence, our Fungoid tribe owe him so much, for such a long time.%% But, now he has become a violent monster as his memory has degraded as time has passed. What a waste. Nobody can beat the effect's of time, not even a sage.

I heard that Bubo is staying at the {C=0xFF016295/}Forgotten Village [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You will need to clear {C=0xFF016295/}Forgotten Village [Arcade Mode F1] {C=0xFF4D0D08/} before you can meet him. Good luck to you.
I thought you wanted to know more about the Altar of the time? Hmm...
You need to clear the {C=0xFF016295/}Forgotten Village [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} first before you can meet with Bubo.
Ah, that's too bad.. Maybe it's my turn to try since you couldn't communicate with him at all.
Sage with dementia disease
Kill Bubo [Scenario Mode (F5)]

I guess Bubo won't have many days left to live now. Anyway, I'll help you because like you said you couldn't get anything useful from him.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Forgotten Village [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

If you can meet me there, then we can fight Bubo together and I will find an opportunity to use the Awakening Flute. So, please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Forgotten Village [Scenario Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat Bubo.
Hmm... Are you still not ready yet?
I said go to {C=0xFF016295/}Forgetten Village [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill Bubo.

Fortunately, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sage Bubo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} told us his story thanks to the Awakening Flute.%% But unfortunately there is no way to get a map of the Altar of the time as it was only in Golem Pythanuth's memory and he was killed over a thousand years ago by Elga's Fire.%% Damn, that's too bad...
Reunion with a strange Duke
Clear Land of Temptation [Arcade Mode F1]

Oh, Who is this? Ah! You are {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, aren't you? How are you doing?%% As you can see, I'm collecting many different mushrooms from here. Especially, this Mandra mushroom which looks just like a human. This is going to be my best collection ever!

Ah, by the way... Have you ever heard about Ice Handy?%% The monster who might be living somewhere in Land of Temptation? If you are ok with it, I would like you to find some more information about this monster for me.%% I heard that the Black Witch revived a monster that lived in the Land of Temptation long ago.%% Now go to {C=0xFF016295/}Land of Temptation [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and investigate this monster for me. I want to know everything about it! So, please gather everything you can and report back to me.%%
You want to leave now? But I have an important story to tell you.
You just need to clear {C=0xFF016295/}Land of Temptation [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Oh, the monster's name is Golem Pythanuth? So how about a fight?%% Haha, things are getting interesting now. Hahahah!
Golem Pythanuth's Appearance
Obtain the Map of the truth
Is it true that you met Golem Pythanuth? Then, it won't take long time to find the map you are seeking.

It is fortunate for you that Golem Pythanuth has been revived by Paris, the Black Witch. %% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Land of Temptation [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right now and kill Golem Pythanuth. Then, it won't take long time to find the map and get back the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Map of the truth{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% If the Black Witch know about this, the only way to find Golem Pythanuth would disappear. Hurry up!
If you don't try your best , you will never find the Altar of the time. Now cheer up and get back to it!
Have you already been to {C=0xFF016295/}Land of Temptation [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? What's the fate of Golem Pythanuth?
Is this the map? It's strange.. Because it just looks like a ordinary Spirit Shard to me, you can get these anywhere.
To Ashmist Village
Deliver Pythanuth's Spirit Shard

Oh...yeah, that's it! There is black magic hiding information inside the Spirit Shard.%% If you can go to nearby Ashmist Village, you can meet my friend of {C=0xFF00863C/}Black Magician Baron{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Ask him how to extract the hidden information from the Spirit Shard. Obviously you will need to first deliver the Spirit Shard to him.

He can appear to be a bit grumpy but he is very kind really. I also thought he was not very nice but after a while I realised how kind he really is. He has killed a lot of bad monsters who have come to this village.%% He really can help you, so don't worry yourself about it.
I can't think of another way of doing this. Are you sure you want to just give up ?
You can meet Baron at Ashmist Village. The mad head alchemist has invited all the alchemists in the world.

Who are you? Town Chief Fungarf from Mushroom Village sent you here?%% What's that you have there? ... It looks like a sage Spirit Shard which but seems to be holding a massive amount of knowledge inside...%% Do you want me to extract all of the information contained inside?
You can meet Baron at Ashmist Village. The mad head alchemist has invited all the alchemists in the world.
Do you plan to give me something? You look like you have lost it already!
A Disaster for alchemists
Talk with James

Maybe you don't know what's really going on here but... Something dangerous and terrible has happened here. Thus, I don't have time to talk with you right now.%% Actually, Count Van Cliff is the person who living near here and is very good at alchemy. He has tried to gather the best alchemists from all over the world and bring them together.%% I have also received a invitation but I'm involved in the incident at Mushroom village, so I was delayed by a few days.%% After I arrived, I realized that something really strange is going on in this village. Van Cliff has died a long time ago because of his disease...%% The strangest thing is I cannot find anything about the whereabouts of all the alchemists and black magicians who were invited here.

A Dragon's bone is worth so much money you cannot even imagine how much! There is a rumour that many people cannot even find the Dragon's Tomb and will never be seen again after they enter here.%% The Dragon's Bone is a very rare, but important ingredient for alchemy which is why the price is so high!%% Count Van Cliff is one of the best alchemists so he exhibits a Dragon made from the rare magma bones at his castle. Luckily for him he has a big inherited wealth!%% I heard some shocking news after I arrived here though, the castle has become a ruin, it has been over 600 years since Van Cliff was there.%% If you can help me to find some information about the village I'll try to find extract some of the hidden information in this Spirit Shard. How does that sound to you ?... Good.%% Then you must go and find James who is gathering information on this place.
Ok, I'm so sorry to hear that. Maybe we will meet again if I am lucky.
Have you already met Real Estate Agent James?
Hmm.. I knew this place is haunted but, I'm curious that why Count Van Cliff invites all the alchemists and holds a banquet here. Anyway, welcome to this haunted village.
Shiny Sage's Spirit Shard
Talk with Baron
Do you remember the Spirit Shard that you gave me? You told me that inside there is a map which has the directions to the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Altar of the time{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, yes?

Finally, I've found the truth. If this map is the real map, it will take you to the greatest ruins in the whole of history.%% This place is where the Time Travel Machine made by Eir was hidden. The this great magical time travel machine is called {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Kyoneske{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... I used to dream about time travelling after I heard the myth about this place when I was young.%% I can't believe we might have actually located {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Kyoneske{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. A real time machine. The {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Altar of the time{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is divided into 3 areas. The past, present, and the future.%% If you can pass the tests in each of these areas, you will obtain an ability to control time. This has always been a dream for every alchemist, it is my dream and will be for the rest of my life.
Now, you don't look like you have a strong enough mind to find the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Altar of the time{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
(Yes, I don't have)

I have some advice that I really want to give you after I have listened to your story. I sure that you will have a very tough time if you go to {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Altar of the time{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% However, please work through these tough times and stop the Black Witch's conspiracy to destroy this world.%% I bid the best of luck to you.
Top of Drakos
Kill Paris

Our warrior! Finally we've reached this point after a long struggle! Our goal is on the horizon now.%% Can you see the top of Drakos? That's where Elga and the vicious witch who wants Elga's revival.%% At least we have opened the way for us to reach Paris, it's a shame so many of our fellow warriors were sacrificed to create this opportunity.
If we can defeat Paris and Elga now, our long struggle for peace will finally be at an end.%% Our warriors! Raise your sword for Paris! Raise the flag and lets start moving!
We are just about to end the chaos and bring peace to this continent and you want to give up now?!
Paris is staying at top of Drakos . It won't be easy for you, but please remember that your shoulders are carrying the chance of peace in this continent.

It looks like the peace is being restored again but, we are beginning to lose hope. It seems that Elga has been revived after all...%% This doesn't mean Elga has doesn't need time to build his strength however, which would explain why Elga has run away.%% At least it's a good news that we have defeated Paris, the Black Witch. Soon, we need to find where Elga has gone to hide, so don't relax too much!
Half Hope
Talk with Naoi

Guard Captain, Colin at Briez country has underestimated something. Paris opened the Black Abyss here temporarily, releasing the dead spirits from thousands of years ago which have been wandering the spiritual world.%% Paris has been slain but nobody can find her remains in the rubble from the top of the tower, so we still can't relax yet.%% I also worry about the Origin of the black spirit created by the Black Dragon Lord, Elga after he escaped from Paris.%% Maybe the origin has been hidden inside Paris's soul and has lead him to do all these bad things. Maybe when the last of Paris's spirit was released, it moved straight into Elga!

I met a Mika tribe Shaman near Dragon Valley recently. It looked like they had just had a premonition about Elga.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right now and meet Shaman Naoi. Do not delay, wasting time will just give Elga chance to get stronger! They will be waiting for you, hurry up!
How can't hesitate about this, are you insane!?
Go to find shaman Naoi at {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You don't have much time.
This is a dream come true being about to meet you again like this! I thought I would never see you again after I left Pinecone Hills.
Change detection
Talk with Shaman Orhah
