The reason why we came to {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is because of my premonition.%% Do you remember about the black darkness that covered whole world which I mentioned before? I had the same premonition again recently.

The Black Abyss has crossed over {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and the Edge of the World. I haven't had anymore premonitions I am losing hope that I can avert this disaster.%% We met some young warriors of the Mike tribe while we were deciding what we should do about this, they helped us come to our decision and we are now heading towards the edge of the world. We need to find out what is awaiting us there.%% My older sister Orhah is also looking forward to seeing you {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Do you want to go to find Orhah?
Yes, I can't take my eyes off of your face because I won't be able to see you anymore
Orhah is staying inside the {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Ah, you are {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! I never imagined I'd bump into you here! How have you been lately?
Where the dragon sleeps
Boss Muchi

Hey, Nice to meet you {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Our destiny is a great one, I have found a place for us to go to. This place is where dragons go when they are going to die.%% This place is very dangerous, I would have never even considered going there in the past. However, this time I have no choice but to do this to protect Naoi. At least we haven't died yet, like the rumour suggested, I really cannot believe that we are alive.

We have succeeded in holding this place so far, but it still doesn't feel safe still to me. Especially since there are all these {C=0xFFFF5917/}Muchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Boss {C=0xFFFF5917/}Muchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} all over the place!%% Your skills are going to come in handy here, right? Can you help us to secure the Mika Shaman's area? In the meantime, I'll kill some other monsters, if you could kill 30 of each {C=0xFFFF5917/}Muchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Boss {C=0xFFFF5917/}Muchi {C=0xFF4D0D08/} in Dragon Valley that would be great.
You won't disappoint me will you, right?
Please kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Muchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Boss {C=0xFFFF5917/}Muchi{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Syamalky and I will take care of the others.

Thank you. You haven't lost any skill. No wonder.. You appeared in Naoi's premonition, it must be your fate to be here.%% I don't think I'm important enough to appear in Naoi's premonition, maybe someday...Haha...
Energy of the end
Clear Dragon Valley [Arcade Mode (F10]

It's not only the Black Abyss that Naoi saw in her premonition. I don't think the dream was only about this disaster anyway...%% We came here specially to help find the place where Elga is hiding.%% Naoi saw the Black Abyss near the Edge of the World, she also said she heard Elga's shriek come from near there.%% I heard that the expedition is looking for the place where Elga is hiding, but have been having difficulty. You will definitely find where it is while you are investigating there.%% But...

My sister and I will not be around much longer... Sob...%% We met a Demon who came out from the Black Abyss while we were searching for clues on the location of Elga.%% He said we were guilty of not accepting the fate that had been laid out for us, so he sentenced us to death!%% Our lives will be sucked into the Black Abyss...%% Please keep this a secret, I really don't want Naoi to worry. I really don't want you, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, to worry either.%% I travelled here to meet the Demon again.%% Can you find out where Demon Peurogel's is in {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? I'll must this nightmare end.
Ok, nobody can blame you, maybe this one is just a bit too tough for you. Thank you for everything till now.
Have you already been to {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

The world has been changed by everyone who has been trying to change their fates.%% Therefore, I'm not going to give up hope for myself. Thank you for telling me where {C=0xFFFF5917/}Demon Peurogel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is located.
Until the last second of the last day
Kill Demon Peurogel [Scenario Mode (F5)]

Ah, you are {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! I heard from Shangdor that you defeated Muchis?%% I was stupid and got injured by the monsters. I'm so ashamed for my lack of skill.%% Ah, by the way... Well Done! You are know about it too, don't you?%% That Naoi and Orhah met the Demon... I think we can't ignore it anymore. You know.... that the Shaman requested we go back to our hometown as they are worried about our safety. Do you agree?%% I just can't go and leave the two of them alone...

Do you know the sad history of Mika tribe, they have lived isolated for so long. Their children have always listened to this song since they were young, their mothers used to sing it.%% I will protect you.%% I will share your pain.%% You will never be alone.%% Until the very last second of the very last day...%% Sob sob... I'll protect our shaman!%% Did I not tell you before, my dream has always been to become a powerful hunter, just like Parmir, but now it has changed.%% Now, my only dream is to protect my friends and the people I love!%% Lets pretend we are heading to our hometown but we will actually head towards {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} where {C=0xFFFF5917/}Demon Peurogel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is staying. Can you help me?%% I won't ignore partner's misfortune! I must find a way to lift the Demon's curse there!
It's ok. You can go your own way.
Let's meet where Demon Peurogel is hiding in {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Valley [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!

Ah, I never expected that you will be quicker than us in confronting {C=0xFFFF5917/}Demon Peurogel{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... You are really....%% a good friend of mine. Sob...%% I'll never forget this. You are the best hero to me, I will remember you forever in my heart.
Revealed Black Toe
Talk to Hel Krouzer

This time I owe you a lot! I have no way to say how thankful I am Warrior...%% Finally we have found the mountain top where Elga's Roar has been heard. From this information I can predict that Elga's hiding place is...%% The Black toe next located in the edge of the world!

A few days ago, I met Hel Krouzer in Dragon Valley and I heard that the expedition's supply camp is located at Camp Steven.%% Everyone is rushing to find Elga's hidden place urgently, please go to find Hel Krouzer and tell him about the black toe nest as soon as you can.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you can't imagine what difficult times are ahead of you but, please do not give up hope.%% A great warrior like you, should never lose their dream to save the world....%% I foresaw in a dream that one day that the world will be in peace. Please take care until that day is upon us...
If you can't make it to tell this to Hel Krouzer on time, then our the only way to stop Elga will disappear into thin air.
Please give this information to Hel Krouzer at Camp Steven.

Ah.. I was looking forward to hearing from you. So, what did the shaman of the Mika tribe say to you...?%% What!? Elga has been hidden at the black toe nest!%% Ah... That's a big surprise!. I must tell this to the expedition right now.%% I should send everyone in the expedition to the black toe nest!
The Door to the Hell will be opened.
Edge of the world (Field) Monster

Ah.. The situation here is becoming worse day by day. What we needed to find Origin was released from Paris's body and then disappeared, and.... well... We are not getting anywhere with the Elga situation...%% Everyday hundreds of spirits are appearing at the Black Abyss and we are sacrificing many soldiers to hold them back.%% If you cannot help solve this problem our military strength will be halved, so even if we do find Elga and Origin it will be completely hopeless.

To resolve this problem, we need to decrease the number of vicious spirits at the {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Do you think you can go there right now? Ok! Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill the spirits who have been disturbing us!%% You must kill at least 100 monsters. Hurry up!
Ah, you really don't understand how serious is this!
C'mon then! Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill 100 monsters!

Oh! What a splendid achievement! As you have helped us to decrease the number of spirits at the {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the number of soldiers who get wounded travelling here will decrease. Well done!
From the edge of the world
Clear Edge of the world [Arcade Mode F1]

Due to the monsters that have been coming out from Dark Abyss non stop... The gathering everyone for the expedition to go and defeat Elga has been greatly delayed.%% If we don't get a move on our soldiers on the frontline will be trapped and annihilated.

Many soldiers in the expedition have lost their lives to this cause, but finally we know where the spirits are coming from...%% They are coming from the {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. We have failed however to identify what exactly is happening there.%% So, please investigate the place in detail and please find out what's going on there. Now, your the only one who can help us. Sorry for sending alone to such a dangerous place.%% Eir's blessing will be with you...
If you can't complete this mission, we might not be able to avoid annihilation.
All the secrets have been hidden in {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Finally we have reached the truth about the source of all the spirits.%% I just realised that it was here that so many soldiers were killed by Elga many thousands of years ago...%% The soldiers that were killed at that time are now the haunted spirits blocking us from moving on...
The Dance of the Dark Abyss
Kill Carsharp

All the monsters which have been appearing is because of Carsharp's dance?!%% That's the reason why spirit monsters has been appearing non-stop even though the Black Witch has disappeared. Now, perhaps it's your turn to do something for us...

If we can't stop Carsharp from summoning the spirits from the Dark Abyss, our window to leave for the Elga expedition will close.%% Besides, Mika's tribe's efforts to find Elga's hiding place by putting themselves in danger will be futile.%% Kill {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spirit Carsharp{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as swiftly as possible! Our future is in your hands!
It looks like it's the end for us... You have even lost courage in yourself!
Kill Carsharp at the {C=0xFF016295/}Edge of the world [Scenario Mode(F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
The day when we first met each other... I was so rude to you. Please forgive my stupidity and rudeness. At the moment...%% The only hero of the expedition is you!
Precious Treasure of Earth, Purification...
Purify Precious Treasure of Earth

Oh... I can't stop thinking about what has happened to both Yanai and Rue. Because of the vicious Akanai, one is dead and the other one has disappeared forever...%% We can't allow something this tragic to happen again.

Our Drakan tribe's guardian... A warrior from the location of the Precious Treasure, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Please purify the Precious Treasure of Earth which has been at the centre of this tragic story.%% If you can complete this final task... The Archpriest Yanai who is now a star in the sky and Priest Rue who has disappeared into the fog will surely be very proud of you and forever watch over you.%%
We must now overcome this great sorrow, it will take time for these wounds to heal.
Have you already purified the Precious Treasure of Earth?
{C=0xFF888888/}(The Precious Treasure of Earth starts to release a mysterious energy which is very different to anything you have seen before.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Akanai's Shadow Essence
Akanai's Shadow Essence

Amazing! I cannot believe you've defeated Akanai! Not even a Drakan warrior has ever managed to do this before you! %% Our work is not done yet however, we need to purify the precious Shadow Essence to weaken Akanai's power.%% This can be left for the Drakan Tribe Warriors though, so you can relax. Now... do you want to hear a secret?
I need someone to kill Akanai and collect his Shadow Essence.%% If you can bring {C=0xFFFF0000/}Akanai's Shadow Essence{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me, I'll give you a gift.
I need someone to kill Akanai and collect his Shadow Essence.%% If you can bring {C=0xFFFF0000/}Akanai's Shadow Essence{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me, I'll give you a gift.
You look scared and you should be! It might be hard to kill Akanai alone. Perhaps you should find some other Dragonicans who are willing to help you!
Well done. Here is a reward I kept for you. I don't know what will come out of there, so you might want to stand back! Haha. It all depends on your luck.
Akanai's Shadow Essence
Akanai's Shadow Essence
Great! You've succeeded in purifying the Precious Treasure of Earth. It has been a great hope of the Drakan tribe to achieve this for many years. Anyway, do you want to know a secret?

Akanai will never disappear even though you have succeeded in purifying the Precious Treasure of Earth. This is because Akanai has a soul which has both a light side and a shadow side. %% As you've purified the Precious Treasure of Earth, his power should be weakened, but, he is still in {C=0xFF016295/}Akia Cave{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Don't worry however. At least there won't be any threat for Kazeura Village anymore. %% Before you go, there is one more secret that you should know. Akanai is spreading his Shadow Essence whenever he is killed and I really need some of it. If you can bring me some of {C=0xFFFF0000/}Akanai's Shadow Essence {C=0xFF4D0D08/} I will give you a gift in return.
I need someone to kill Akanai and collect his Shadow Essence.%% If you can bring {C=0xFFFF0000/}Akanai's Shadow Essence{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to me, I'll give you a gift.
You look scared and you should be! It might be hard to kill Akanai alone. Perhaps you should find some other Dragonicans who are willing to help you!
Well done. Here is a reward I kept for you. I don't know what will come out of there, so you might want to stand back! Haha. It all depends on your luck.

%class%, you also have a riding pet. Your pet has already reached the highest level it can achieve before you get your next class promotion. Your pet will be able to get a battle function when you can proceed with the class promotion. Come back to me then and I'll tell you how to do it.

It's very simple. Find {C=0xFF00863C/}Pet Merchant Amy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Battle Pet Advancement Kit{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me. It's very easy but it will cost you a few gold, I hope you have been saving all of your spare copper! You know that I'm a pet merchant, don't you?
I'm very sorry to hear that. Your pet has limitless possibilities if you can proceed with the class promotion..

Talk to Rophu

I happened to see them...Skippy, Mirinae, Belkan and Parmir...%% I could not believe the heroes from a thousand years ago appeared before me. As a matter of fact, Elga too is a soul from a thousand years ago...%% Aye...are you aware that we Drakan warriors scouted deep inside of Black Claw Nest? There's no way to put things back the way they were. Elga and we both came to a dead end.%% Since the two warriors {C=0xFF00863C/}Maruphu and Rophu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} beside me have scouted out the Black Claw Nest, they will give you details on the place.
I understand. You may have tonnes of things to care before the last battle.
Have you talked to {C=0xFF00863C/}Maruphu and Rophu{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

So you heard from the two scouts? According to Royal Guard Ranotah, the third floor of Black Claw Nest is full of dreadful obstacles.%% No one dares to approach there due to the threatening situation...%% Please cross the huddles and attempt to break through towards Black Dragon Lord Elga. I'm counting on you. You shall be the new hero of our day.

I have been to the first floor of Black Claw Nest. Beyond the vast number of monsters, I barely reached the entrance to the next level and I met Cerberus there.%% Once you see the entrance to the next level, get ready before you open the door.

I rode on Feilon and made my way up to the second floor of Black Claw Nest. And I didn't know what to do.%% I faced as many monsters as I saw on the first floor... and I was overwhelmed by the number of dreadful traps.%% Due to the traps, our attacking force can be easily dispersed. Devil leech stays at the entrance to the third level, and I'm afraid the dispersed force will lose their lives to this monster.
Fight against Black Dragon Lord Elga!!!
Defeat Black Dragon Lord Elga
Now the time has come!%% {C=0xFFFF0000/}Black Dragon Lord Elga{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is deep inside the Black Claw Nest, looking at us, preparing to attack. Are you ready to face the Black Dragon!
Eventually, the end battle will take place.%% Remember our peaceful past times stolen by Elga. If we triumph in this battle, a bright future will be waiting for us.%% All! Advance for the attack!
Sigh...We no longer have a hero who would save the world from Elga!
If we hesitate for a moment, the dreadful Black Dragon Lord Elga's complete revival will be complete.

Oh! You are the true hero. You are the one who saved Breeze in the great crisis!!!!%% Until the day the Origin which dominated Elga and Black Witch Paris is gone, I look forward to your remarkable activities. Now take a rest!
Cape of Black Dragon Lord Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, other recipe quests can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Origin is not dead. It just have temporarily disappeared. Since the Mighty Magic Grantnoir has been cast, the surrounding time space has been twisted. Past present and future are all mixed up in one space. Some say this is the reason how Elga can return to this place...%% Due to the mysterious after effect, Elga's energy still stays in Black Claw Nest...%% Defeat Elga and bring me those mysterious objects, then you shall be able to create special weapons and armours.

At Black Claw Nest where time and space are twisted, defeat Elga and obtain materials for the Black Dragon Lord equipment. But the most important thing among the materials needed is for the Black Dragon Lord Recipe.%% If you want {C=0xFFA71FC9/} Cape of Black Dragon Lord Recipe{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, do me a favour.
What! you think Equipment of Black Dragon Lord is not good for you?
Other people are seeking the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/} too.

Aye...this is the {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Once you collect all the required materials the recipe indicates, you can create Cape of Black Dragon Lord.%% You will love the power of the Black Dragon Lord equipment.
Helmet of Black Dragon Lord Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, other recipe quests can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% I suppose you already heard that with equipment of Black Dragon Lord Recipe, you can create a powerful equipment using the materials obtained after clearing Black Claw Nest.%% Though I have {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Helmet of Black Dragon Lord Recipe{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I'm not that interested in this...%% Wait! Do you have {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/} by chance? I'd like to make a necklace using Piece of Black Claw, Can you get me one?

Haha, Good decision!%% {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...listen! For somehow, other people are seeking {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/} too. But you know the best looking equipment is Helmet, don't you?%% So ignore other people's request, and come to me with the item. I shall trade it for {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Helmet of Black Dragon Lord Recipe{C=0xFF4D0D08/} right away.%% You will have to defeat Elga first.
Are you saying you don't want the {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Helmet of Black Dragon Lord Recipe{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
There are many who are seeking {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Already 7 or 8 people I know of in this Black Claw Nest Outpost .
So, this is {C=0xFFA71FC9/}Helmet of Black Dragon Lord Recipe{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Go make one right away.%% I shall get a necklace made of this {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Top of Black Dragon Lord Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, other recipe quests can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Hmm... I do not understand. The spirit of Black Dragon Lord is still roaming around Black Claw Nest...%% Anyhow have you heard about the special ingredients you can get after defeating Black Dragon Lord Elga?%% By collecting the ingredients you can create powerful equipment from the Black Dragon Lord.%% I have a recipe for the Black Dragon Lord Top.%% I wish to reward this recipe to any brave warriors who can defeat the Black Dragon Lord Elga.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I think you can do this.
Any one who defeated Elga would have a {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. If you bring me this as proof, I will give you this recipe that will help you to make Black Dragon Lord Top.
You are not really interested in this recipe....
Black Dragon Lord Top has highest defence point out of all the armours, however it requires the most ingredients.%% Anyhow, hurry and bring me {C=0xFFFF0000/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Yes, you are brave enough to have the equipment from the Black Dragon Lord. I will give you this recipe, collect ingredients as the recipe says and make a Black Dragon Lord Top. %% If you keep defeating Elga, you should able to make the Top without any problem. Of course for you to enter the Black Claw Nest, you would require Fellowship Medals too.%% Good luck!
Black Dragon Lord Bottom Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, other recipe quests can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% I heard from the spirit of Elga that by entering the Black Claw Nest, you can receive a special ingredients.%% If you can collect the ingredients from this recipe... You can make equipment of the Black Dragon Lord. %% I have a recipe for the Black Dragon Lord bottom, this kind of equipment is for a hero like you.

Although I wish to give you this recipe for the Black Dragon Lord Bottom... I wish you to do me a small favour. %% Fellowship's magicians are greatly interested in the Grantnoir. Especially Magician Class Master Edeline says that she will go to the Black Claw Nest herself.%% So for the Fellowship Magicians research, would you bring me {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Of course, I will give you a recipe to you if you do this for me.
Hmm.. Edeline would be very disappointed...
You still don't have the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

Yes, you are brave enough to have the equipment from the Black Dragon Lord. I will give you this recipe, collect ingredients as the recipe says and make a Black Dragon Lord Top. %% If you keep defeating Elga, you should able to make the Top without any problem. Of course for you to enter the Black Claw Nest, you would require Fellowship Medals too.%% Good luck!
Shoulderguard of Black Dragon Lord Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, other recipe quests can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% While I was on guard, I found the recipe for Black Dragon Lord shoulder... Since it requires the ingredients from the Black Claw Nest, I decided to give up on it.%% Do you want this?
But this is too good to be free... Oh.. What should I do?...%% Yes...! Bring me a Piece of Black Claw by defeating Elga. I will keep one as a souvenir.
You found... another recipe?
For you to enter Black Claw Nest to defeat Elga... You will need the Black Dragon Lord Fellowship Medal...
Wow! So, this is it...%% It's a lot prettier than I thought. Thanks.
Black Dragon Lord Gloves Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, until this quest is either completed or given up, other recipe quest can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Hahaha! It's you. I decided to have a bet with our soldiers. The winner will get this Black Dragon Lord Glove recipe...%% Would you like to join in?

The rule is very simple.%% Defeat Elga and bring me the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and I will give you the Black Dragon Lord Glove recipe.%% Now I think I will begin, so START!!
Well, no matter.. If you join, it is going to be boring.
What? You must hurry! You might miss out on the reward!
Hmm.. As I have expected, you have finished it first. Well done.%% Now, THE WINNER IS. {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!
Black Dragon Lord Shoes Recipe
Obtain Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is ongoing, until this quest is either completed or given up, other recipe quest can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% That Thomas... He is a captain but still acting like a normal soldier. Betting with his soldier. This is a disgrace! %% Hm. But unlike him, I am going to have a competition. Prize is Black Dragon Lord Shoes Recipe!

Any one who completes the task fastest will be given the Black Dragon Lord Shoes Recipe.%% So... Let the competition begin! If you can bring me a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/} faster than anyone else, you will receive the prize.
Wh..What? You are not going to join? I am the only person with the Black Dragon Lord Shoes Recipe So don't come back crying later.
If you hurry you might able to win.
Hmm.. So you are one of the fastest As a prize, here is the Black Dragon Lord Shoes Recipe.
Black Dragon Lord Weapon Recipe
Piece of Black Claw

{C=0xFFFF0000/}Keep in mind that once this quest is on-going, until this quest is either completed or given up, the other recipe quests can't be undertaken.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Oh, It is you! Very good! I was actually looking for you.%% I managed to get a Black Dragon Lord weapon recipe from one of our customers. Now, I need some special ingredients, but I can not get them so I have gave up with my project. Will you help me?

For my new project, a new Spirit Shard has been found called {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... I would like to use it to make some equipment, and I would like to know what it will do.%% If you can get me the ingredient, I will give you the Black Dragon Lord Weapon Recipe!
So you are busy. Please come to me when you are free! Please!
There are many people looking for a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Piece of Black Claw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please bring it to me. The most valuable equipment can be made from this item.

What you must remember is this... The Black Dragon Lord Weapon is the hardest item to make out of all of the other equipment.%% I was thinking about making one myself but... There are too many ingredients, and I do not think I can collect them, so I gave it a pass. Please make a good weapon. Come to me for repairs!!
Secret Order from Kazeura Village
Talk to ChiChai

Hey {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! It's fantastic to see you again, what brings you to this place...?%% Ha...I hear you...The story that the Black Witch destroyed the only weapon that can defeat the Black Dragon Elga is well known around Kazeura Village.

I would really love to stay and chat... but I'm afraid I am on an important mission assigned to me by Priest Horn Ochukoe.%% I feel bad about having to rush off like this so I'll drop a little gift to my friend ChiChai. Meet {C=0xFF00863C/}ChiChai{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to collect it sometime!
Ah...It's no trouble, please take it!
Don't forget to visit {C=0xFF00863C/}ChiChai{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for your gift.
Yo! You must be the fellow Croquis was talking about. He left this with me to give to you, here you go.
Secret Order from Kazeura Village (2)
Obtain Prune Pouch

Yo. Are you also an adventurer? You can fight too eh?....%% I began a journey with my childhood friend, Croquis. Croquis has been very busy with secret missions recently though and doesn't have any spare time these days.%% I have been thinking of just going back to Kazeura Village. Could you do me a favour, it's really simple...

I am a Trade Merchant but I dream of one day becoming a Master Chief. I have been collecting many special ingredients to create a legendary dish.%% I came here to get one of these ingredients, this is the favour I want to ask of you. I am looking for Prunes to make the best Plum Cake ever!%% The Hill Gnolls keep Prunes in their pockets, but if I try and get them I'm afraid they will eat me all up at once!%% Would you be so kind as to defeat them and collect a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Prune Pouch{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me please.
Oh...you were my last hope. Where can I get some prunes...
One of the Hill Gnolls must have a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Prune Pouch{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
So this pouch is full of Vartikan Prunes? I can't wait to taste them...%% Hmm.. Yum yum!... Oh! These taste really good! So juicy, they have the perfect texture for my cake!%%
Dragon Teardrop
Obtain Dragon Liquor

Since Croquis is not able to help me out these days I don't think it's a good idea to just let you go! I have found in my family's old recipe book a legendary Dragon Liquor. Using this seasoning I can recreate my mum's old dish.%% It's created from an everlasting Dragon Teardrop, I came to this place, known for Dragon Sightings to get one.%% Of course not many Dragons exist anymore, but there are rumours that Elga has been revived, so who knows?...

Luckily I have heard that {C=0xFFFF5917/}Donply{C=0xFF4D0D08/} still has a reserve of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Dragon Liquor{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... You'd never guess how much gold I spent to get that information...%% Donply is extremely paranoid and has shut himself inside Vartika Hill Mission Map Arcade Mode to guard the Dragon Liquor.%% You just need to sneak in and grab the Dragon Liquor for me, simple right? C'mon please please!
Ohh?! Please do this for me!
Did you get the Dragon Liquor! Oh, I got excited then! Don't forget it's in Vartika Hill Mission Map Arcade Mode.

Haha! So! This is it?! Wow look at the it's colour... So this is genuine {C=0xFFFF5917/}Dragon Liquor{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? I can't tell, I've never seen one before.%% I'll taste this too...Oo. Yum...Yum...YUM! Wow!!!%% This stuff is crazily good, better than sugar spice and all other things nice! This must be genuine Dragon Liquor! Strange though, Dragons only shed a tear when they lay an egg...%% I wonder how Donply got hold of one.
A Drakan Adventurers Request
Defeat Flame Scouts

I heard you have been helping ChiChai obtain the ingredients he was after. For helping my dearest friend I do not know how to thank you.%% Honestly speaking, I was summoned to Kazeura Village by Priest Horn Ochukoe and he assigned me a secret mission to obtain a Dragon Egg.%% There are still baby dragons in Dragotaka but nobody has seen a huge dragon in a long time. Ochukoe's baby dragon pet called Koop said he could feel the presence of a Dragon Egg on the east part of the hill.% Shall I continue...?

Ochukoe immediately summoned a few adventurers and assigned them a secret mission, including me. Ochukoe wants to ensure we Drakans are the ones to take the Dragon Egg.%% I went straight to the Hill and searched all over but I didn't find anything, but I did have a sense that something odd was happening...%% The Vargons and Hill Gnolls have never been close but they were up to something. Something important. I think we need to go after them and find out what they are up to.%% Lets work together and find out, go and confuse them while I search for some clues. I'll take care of the Hill Gnolls and you go for the Vargons {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!
I guess we'll never find out what they are up to...
Go and cause some chaos by defeating some Vargons.
Unfortunately I didn't find any clues on the Hill Gnolls. I did find a sketch of Donply though... I can't tell if the sketch has any relation to the Dragon Egg.%% Anyway, thanks for your help!
Defeat Donply
Defeat Donply

Ah, this is what friends are for... So this seasoning ChiChai was seeking is made from a Dragon Teardrop eh? What a surprise!%% I have a strong feeling that Donply must have the Dragon Egg I'm seeking.

Donply is a tough monster, I'm going to need your help again. Could you defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Donply{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Vartika Hill Mission Map [Hero Quest Mode (F5)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and collect the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Dragon Egg{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me.
Too bad, I'll just have to find someone brave enough to do this.
Donply is in Vartika Hill Mission Map [Hero Quest Mode (F5)]

I guess Donply went insane because of the unique energy this Dragon Egg generates.%% Thank you so much {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I really appreciate your help.%% I shall report how helpful you have been to Ochukoe and request a reward for you, but...please keep this a secret between us.
Mohamo's Request
Defeat Drake Gorge and Florence Gorge

{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Hel Krouzer sent me here to deliver this to you. Argh, I was really busy dealing with the problems in Verdurous Forest...and now I have to face a ugly %class% here.%% The wet breeze around here isn't making me feel any better either, what use am I here...%% Anyway, Hel Krouzer is very anxious because he hasn't received any info on Time Machine Kyoneske. I can't understand why he cares about you...%% He has asked me to give this treasure found in Aram, it allows you to enter the Red Fox Delta.%% So, you want it eh?

Hmm... Well... I...actually.... ...don't want to give it to you.%% I can't stop myself from freaking out, I have come all the way up here battling against tough monsters just to meet a ugly fellow like you.%% Maybe you can make it up to me...If you defeat 30 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Drake Gorges and Florence Gorges{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me, I'll consider handing over this Boost Backpack to you. Argh! I can't believe those monsters ruined my just polished nails!
Do you know you have a very unpleasant manner?
Defeating 30 Drake Gorges and Florence Gorges is not a simple task, just get on with it.

Oh, I noticed Drakes and Florces knocked down all over the Gorge... You did that? Heheheheheh!%% If I ever wanted to find you I don't think I'd have a problem when you leave a trail like that. As this was Hel Krouzer's orders I was going to give it to you eventually anyway.%% I feel better now anyway. Take this Jetpack [Omega], you will need to wear it to pass through Red Fox Delta on your way to Hydron Core.%% When you get some components for your backpack don't forget to bring them to me so I can give you an upgrade!
Jetpack [Alpha] (1)
Obtained Backpack Upgrade Kit
Jetpack [Omega]

I read an old book in the Aram dungeon once, it had some interesting details about these backpacks. The Jetpack [Omega] you have is just a basic one.%% It seems the ancient people had all kinds of intricate types of backpacks. If you can get a Upgrade Kit you can have your Boost Backpack upgraded.%% So...are you interested?

I already mentioned it to a skilful Mika blacksmith, he said the can handle upgrading the Boost Backpack if you bring him the Upgrade Kit. Problem is it's very hard to get hold of one.%% It can be obtained from Cetirus in Red Fox Delta but it will be tough. The problem is Cetirus doesn't give up the kit easily, you might need to try several times.
What...Are you rejecting my kindness?
To get the Backpack Upgrade Kit you just need to keep beating Cetirus, he will break eventually.
This looks way too old. I'll ask Mika Blacksmith Rugor to check it out... I'm afraid it might take some time.
Jetpack [Alpha] (2)
Talk to Syamalky

Mika Blacksmith Rugor has asked a favour of me, he wants to get a message to Syamalky who is somewhere here in Banshi Gorge...%% I'll go straight to Rugor to get this Boost Backpack Upgraded if you can find Syamalky and deliver Rugor's message to her.

Oh yea...urm..the message is.... Oh! Right. Because Rugor has found Parmir's arrowhead there is no need for her to continue wandering around this dangerous place searching for it.%% Rugor would like it if Syamalky could return to the safety of Pine Cone Hills. Got it? Good... Now go find Syamalky.
Oh, so you're saying you don't want to have your Boost Backpack upgraded anymore?
You're still here? Go find Syamalky, she could be in danger!

Well? Hahaha. No one can stop her?! Hehe...She reminds me of how I was 200 years ago. No worries, I will explain this to Rugor.%% I brought you something. Ta-da...Finally your Boost Backpack has been upgraded.%% Rugor had no problem upgrading your Jetpack [Omega] to a Jetpack [Alpha] using the Upgrade Kit!%% Give it a try!

What? Rugor said he found Parmir's arrowhead? Whoa...I know Rugor is a gentleman, but... I don't think it's true. This must be a lie Rugor made to make me go back.%% Until I find it, I shall continue my adventure. This is the Mika way!
