Unfair Contract (1)
Talk to Princecia

Hmm..it is you... Well {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Since you are here.. The rumours about the Sky Stairs have been spreading all over but I'm not one to care about the treasure of Skyland.%% I'm here to fulfil the royals wish to find the new princess. Any idea where she is?

Ok well, if you find the little lady Princecia around here please let her know that Duke Monadron has come to escort her to the palace. Hahaha!%% Since there are no suitable young heirs to the throne, who knows? I may be her future prince! Ahh being young is so fun, sneaking out...%% Just tell her it's time to go back to the palace, that is all. Hahaha!
Aye... too bad. Should I go find her?
If you find Lady Princecia just deliver my message to her.

Whoa, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! I was just thinking of you, it's great to see you here.%% Pardon? Duke Monadron is looking for me? Well I doubt he came all the way here just to look for the missing Princess Candidate...%% He must have been the one to report me as missing and then came here to catch me to stop me meeting Jack and Jess.
Unfair Contract (2)
Talk to Jess

After witnessing the powerful magic at the Citadel of Torment I have kept in touch with Edeline. She has been saying Jess has become very cranky recently and told me that he has joined Monadron's tomb robbery team.%% Duke Monadron even has a bad reputation within the palace, he has been issuing dangerous orders and has been collecting deadly poisons. He's up to something no good.%% I can't believe Jack and Jess are helping him, that's why I've come here...to stop them.%% Those foolish brothers may get into trouble, if you bump into Jess please tell him the mistake he is making.%%

Edeline hinted that there are ruins of an ancient machine here, they are known as Hydron Core, or Sky Stairs.%% It can help people go to the Sky Garden, as it is known. Many believe it is the place where the god Eia lived with the first people he created.%% Monadron is planning to go to the Sky Garden using the Hydron Core and steal the treasures there, Jack and Jess don't know what he is really up to.%% Please persuade {C=0xFF00863C/}Jess{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to stop what he is doing.
You don't care if Jack and Jess get into trouble?
Meet Jess and persuade him to stop helping Duke Monadron.

What! How preposterous, you're friends with that wizard aren't you. Just like the Black Witch that wizard tried to confuse and manipulate us. Princecia and you too...all wackos!%% Get out of my sight!
Unfair Contract (3)
Talk to Monadron

Sigh... After we returned from the Citadel of Torment Jess became another person, since he started working for the Duke it has only got worse.%% I've asked him to quit a hundred times but every time I bring it up he freaks out at me. He won't listen to me anymore.%% He's already been to Red Fox Delta... It's really dangerous out there but nothing will stop Jess...%% Please, I beg you to ask {C=0xFF00863C/}Duke Monadron{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to let Jess leave.

This is all because Jess has been fooled by the evil Duke... I didn't steal anything but the Duke has made people believe I'm a thief and managed to make my brother to sign a unfair contract.%% Duke Monadron asked my brother to bring back some stuff from Red Fox Delta or he would send me to jail. He's lying and my brother is not listening to me...
If you don't help Jess may lose his life at Hydron Core.
Persuade Duke Monadron to leave us alone.
Mwee Hee Hee...I can guess what you are up to. It seems like you know those thieves very well. Interesting. Very interesting. Mwee Hee Hee!
The Duke's Strange Collection (1)
Obtain an Armoured Golem's Steel Horn

Yo... {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}... Please stop looking at me like that. Aye, I did hire a thief, Jess. Indeed I am innocent, Mwee Hee Hee...%% Firstly, Jack did steal my...well not my but...he stole a artifact from the ruin that doesn't belong to him. If I was following regulations I would have already arrested him for robbery!%% Jess, his brother, offers to assist me with my work in exchange for not sending Jack to jail... I saw this as a fair agreement... Mwee Hee Hee!!%% If you want to terminate our contract {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} then you just need to complete the work I assigned Jack...

Ha...you are so predictable, you have always wanted to be a hero. Yes, yes..keep helping vulnerable people - you are doing great.%% There are three things I want, all of them you can find in the Red Fox Delta.%% That weird clock the brothers already brought me really isn't my style and wasn't on my list anyway... The first thing on the list is a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Armoured Golem's Steel Horn{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. To get this you will need to endure the Golem's powerful attacks...%% Come back when you have this and I'll let you know what else I want... Now Leave...Mwee Hee Hee.
Aye, even if you do want to be a hero, Red Fox Delta is not a place you want to start with!...ahha
You can find Armoured Golem inside Red Fox Delta. It's a dark and Gloomy place, Mwee Hee Hee!
Ah...What a beauty, you brought the real thing. This steel horn is made from Vertadium only found in the Sky Garden. It's very precious.%% Great job. I knew you would bring it to me.
The Duke's Strange Collection (2)
Obtain Armoured Barrel's Steel Tail
All the stuff I want can be found in the {C=0xFF016295/}Red Fox Delta{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You'll have to make a few trips, you can't possible carry all of these back at once!

The second item is Armoured Barrel's steel tail. Because it is full of strong Vertadium, nothing can hurt it.%% Recently I heard that Armoured Barrel got demolished as it was just a prototype, however Armoured Golem then got equipped Armoured Barrel's steel tail.%% Go to Red Fox Delta, defeat Armoured Golem and get me its steel tail. Mwee Hee Hee.
If you don't want to finish then I can't cancel the contract.
What are you waiting for? Head over to {C=0xFF016295/}Red Fox Delta{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat Armoured Golem! I want his Steel Tail!
Oh, it's more beautiful than I could have dreamed. Mwee Hee Hee!
The Duke's Strange Collection (3)
Obtain Armoured Kampaling's Steel Jaw

Aye, there's just one item left. Ahh you always surprise me {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I can't believe you would do so much for your friends....%% Just remember...you cannot help everyone... Sometimes it might just be better to let things go. I'll hand over Jess' Contract as promised once you complete this final task.

The last thing I need from Red Fox Delta is Armoured Kampaling's Steel Jaw. You might be wondering what on earth I need it for...%% It's sometimes necessary to be unpredictable to avoid attracting attention. Mwee Hee Hee...%% Go to Red Fox Delta, defeat an {C=0xFFFF5917/}Armoured Kampaling{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring me it's {C=0xFFFF5917/}Steel Jaw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Just this one last thing and Jess is free! Did you forget about our deal?
The Armoured Kampaling will be the toughest monster you will ever face in Red Fox Delta! I'm counting on you! Mwee Hee Hee!

Mwee Hee Hee! Now I have collected Armoured Golem's Steel horn, Armoured Barrel's Steel Tail and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Armoured Kampaling's Steel Jaw{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% You've done a great job and as promised I shall hand Jess his contract and let him go. Good luck in your future {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Mwee Hee Hee...
Cetirus, Guardian of the Sky Stairs
Obtain the Skystone

I came here in search of the ruins of the Sky People. Legend has it that they lived in a floating land called the Sky Garden. It speaks of something called Skystone, a Spirit Shard which floats.%% It is this material upon which the god Eia built the Sky Garden. The legend says the Sky People used something called the Sky Stairs to come down to earth and leave their civilisation.%% I wish to prove the truth behind this legend and need a piece of Skystone to do it, you have already defeated the three guardians of the Sky Stairs for me... But there was a problem...

After you defeated Armored Golem and Armored Kampaling, My men went for the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skystone{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and we lost lives by an unknown monsters.%% The only man who survived went insane and keeps saying that he saw Cetirus, a machine harpy. He's totally petrified.%% Now, I have my final request. For my poor men who lost their lives and for my skyland collection, do me a favor.%% Defeat Cetirus and get me the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skystone{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Ah...! Aren't the thief brothers lucky?! They now can live longer for having a good friend like you. If you refuse my request, I'll present their case to the court. Mwee Hee Hee!%%
Right I'll take the thief brothers case to the courts, unless you wish to reconsider?
Cetirus can be found in Hydron Core, in the deepest part of Red Fox Delta. I'll wait here for you to bring me a piece of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skystone{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...Hee Hee

Mwee Hee...You are a smart one {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. If you didn't return I would not have dropped the charges against Jack since that was not part of our arrangement.%% So this is...a... Skystone! Hee Hee... Now I shall take this proof of the Sky Garden's existence and show the noblemen of Dragotaka that I am not a fool.%% To the Sky Garden, I am expecting you to join my party! Mwee Hee Hee.
Meet the Unknown Hunter
Talk to the Unknown Hunter

Do you remember we save the Heroes from a thousand years ago in the Citadel of Torment? We saw them all through the Great Magic, I remember one of them especially.%% Their name is...the Guardian Spirit of Earth... Parmir!...I think that is her name.%% I don't know how she could have appeared after a thousand years, perhaps it's her great grand daughter...I don't know exactly, but it's a bit of a coincidence to see her around here!%% Are you curious about this too?

I saw her near the entrance of Red Fox Delta, I'd like to go and find her myself but the men Duke Monadron sent to find me are all over the place...%% Why don't you go visit her for me, you may find out who she is.
When you are ready, let me know. I think this is related to the heroes from a thousand years ago.
Go the entrance of Red Fox Delta and you will see the Unknown Hunter.
Shhh! Kid...tone down your voice and hide yourself! ...Now is not a good time to be here.
The Hunters Memory
Talk to Syamalky

Who are you...? You came to meet me? C=0xFF888888/}(The Unknown Hunter listens to your story){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% So you're saying that I'm one of the great heroes from a thousand years ago, who saved the world from Elga? ...the great Mika hunter...Parmir?%% This must be the most ridiculous joke I have ever heard. Are you practicing some kind of April fools joke? ...oh...sigh...you're serious aren't you.%% Well...after losing my memory I have been wandering aimlessly to find people who I might recognise but you are the first person I've met that has a clue. I want to know who I am...%% But what you're suggesting doesn't make any sense! I'd be over a thousand years old, can a person live that long? I've been trying to remember who I am, but.... a granny hunter?% ...Argh...Are you kidding me?

Well it was nice talking to you and listening to your funny story... But it doesn't help me. I think talking about this has jogged my memory though! I wish I could talk more but...%% I vaguely recall that I was on my way to find Kyoneske, guarded by Cetirus. If I can go see that then maybe I'll regain my memory.%% Maybe your story is true, perhaps find someone who knows the heroes from a thousand years ago? Got it?%% (Someone who knows of Parmir...That's...Syamalky!)
Hehe..that is one of the funniest jokes I've heard in a long time. Ha ha.
Someone must know who I am. They might know something only I'll know and we can prove who I am...Can you find someone?

Pardon? You met Parmir?!?!?! Wait...so, Parmir has amnesia and is looking for Kyoneske... %%...and she doesn't remember that she is one of the heroes from a thousand years ago? This sounds unreal...but since Paris is recalling the souls from a thousand years ago it may be true...%% Whoa! Parmir has come back alive!
Parmir's Mark
Deliver Syamalky's Parchment

Hmm, If I were you... Oh! I know what to do!%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Syamalky pulls out a parchment and draws a strange design on it){C=0xFF4D0D08/} This...mark is unique to Parmir! It was on the arrowhead I lost, I clearly remember it!%% Once you show her this she will surely remember who she is!

Each Mika hunter has a unique mark carved onto their arrowhead, no hunters mark is alike.%% Rugor's ancestors have kept Parmir's arrowhead for over a thousand years, if this Unknown Hunter is the real Parmir then she must have another arrow with this mark carved on it.
If this Unknown Hunter is Parmir... I cannot just stay here! I must meet her!
Now! Take this parchment.

{C=0xFF888888/}(You show Syamalky's Parchment to Parmir){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% This...this...this is the mark engraved on my arrowheads! How does she know this?%% Does it mean that...I'm actually Parmir? One of the heroes from a thousand years ago... How can this be, I can't remember anything.%% I was hoping once I met someone who knew me I'd remember everything. The only thing I can remember clearly is darkness...but I can remember something about a clock hand and the name Kyoneske...%% If you're right, maybe someone summoned me out of the darkness to this world. Please continue helping me to regain my memory {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I am sure some information about Kyoneske would be helpful to me.
Show this parchment to Parmir.
Parchment? You forgot the parchment you were brining to me?
Jack's Little Gift
Investigate Mysterious Junk

Hey {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Thanks for saving Jess! He is still freaking out a bit, but he'll calm down eventually.%% To thank you for your kindness we would like to give you a little gift we brought from Red Fox Delta. Jess said I could give it to you...Will you accept it?
To me it looks like an antique grandfather clock... It may look like junk now but once it's been repaired it will work. Please take this gift.
Hey, I know you might not appreciate the situation of Jess freaking out but... A gift is just a gift.
There may be an on/off switch somewhere. Look closely.

{C=0xFF888888/}(You check it over closely but there is no switch to be found... It's just pure junk....){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Suddenly the pattern carved into the junk glows. Is this junk working now?){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
A Longer Lasting Battery!
Obtain Tarquin Liquid

{C=0xFF888888/}(You place your hand on the glowing pattern.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Vrrrrrrrm... Squeak....Squeak...%% It...is... Two...Twenty two...pm... {C=0xFF888888/}(What is it?...just a plain old grandfather clock?){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Hello.... Sir... {C=0xFF888888/}(Wait! It called me Sir?!){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Excuse me, I am encountering a system error... Could you please tell me where in the map we are located and what year it is please so I may fix this error? Looking at your clothes, I can tell you are near the end of the peaceful time.%% I guess it is before the Dark Dragon Lord... ...is unleashed...Squeak!%% {C=0xFF888888/}(What on earth is this junk talking about...?!) {C=0xFF4D0D08/}

Yikes....sorry... My battery is running low... I cannot....stay on...very long....%% If possible, would you bring me some Tarquin Liquid, to recharge me?%% Cetirus probably has my battery... Oh..my..battery...is...d..dead.. Squeak.......
{C=0xFF888888/}(If nobody helps, it will stay abandoned forever here.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{C=0xFF888888/}(Cetirus must be the machine harpy in Red Fox Delta..){C=0xFF4D0D08/}

Squeak... Vrrrm... Vrrrm...Squeak..Squeak...%% Oh...Thank you.... You brought my battery! Let me introduce myself, I am an ancient weapon that has been a legend through generations....%% Hey...? I haven't finished yet. Where are you going?
Key to All Secrets
Talk to the Mysterious Junk

How rude... I haven't finished my story yet. Since you saved me, I shall forgive you....%% Anyway, it is my pleasure to meet you, my real name is Model XXIVXIXX or in science I'm known as a Elastic Dimensional Navigation Kiosk. Or just Kyoneske for short.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Ah...this device is Kyoneske...!){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% In order to resolve all of the troublesome situations I have faced I will need your help. I'll tell you how it all began...

Ten years ago while on a mission, I dropped by Hydron Code to refill on fuel but the Guardians there recognised me as an invader. I'm not sure if they were malfunctioning or something!%% That's how I ended up trapped there for ten years, until those two human boys saved me and you brought me energy. I owe you a lot.%% I will return the favour for sure, but since I'm on a mission... I still have things to do. My duty is to keep the dimensions of this world in balance.%% The world and all of it's different dimensions have been in a time of peace and balance under the god Eia but trouble has been stirring in the dimension of the Dark Abyss.%% The Dark Abyss is a graveyard for all of the lost souls, the spirits of the dead collect there and are sealed inside forever. A powerful and evil spirit sealed inside the Dark Abyss has crossed the wall of the dimension with the help of a wizard who knows a lot about Great Magic.%% The evil spirit is known as the First Child...created by the god Eia from the blood of Dragons and himself.%% It's name is Origin.
But if you leave now... You are losing the chance to become a hero who can save the word.
Shall I go on?

I have been send from the Sky Garden to return Origin to the dimension of the Dark Abyss. If Origin remains here the wall around the Dark Abyss will shatter and ghosts and evil spirits will pour into this world.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(You break the news that the Black Witch has already been summoning evil spirits.) {C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Ugh!! I am late. Ha Ha Ha. Never mind! There is still a solution. Using the five Spiritual Protection Stones you can cast the Great Magic Lenoobo and send Origin back to the Dark Abyss...%% {C=0xFF888888/}(You break the news that the Black Witch has destroyed the Spiritual Protection Stones.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Whoa!!! Pardon...? Destroyed? Oh...No..! All of this has happened in the ten years I was trapped... Ok... So the Black Witch is helping Origin...No Problem.%% I can time travel.. I'll go back to the past and bring the Spiritual Protection Stones. Easy Peasy. Ha Ha Ha! Right stand back, don't be too surprised I'll be back in a few seconds...%% Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha..Oh...Urm....Errrr Why am I still here? Sigh... I think it's broken. I'm sorry...Wait where are you going?
Plan B
Talk to the Unknown Hunter

Oh..oh..wait please...! It's my fault, please understand...%% This was all unexpected, even if my time-travel circuits are functioning correctly maybe I can't travel to the past because the Spiritual Protection Stones have been destroyed...%% Ah..It should work... I really have no idea why it failed... No problem though, I have a plan B.%% Sky Garden technology always has backup plans for almost any situation. ...even if we never anticipated that the Spiritual Protection Stones could be destroyed by human magic, there is a last resort.%% Doommm...Whirrrrrr.....Whirrrrrr....Whirrrrrr ...I have brought them.

Yes, that's the ones...The Heroes from a thousand years ago! The ones that can control the Spiritual Protection Stones but were swept away into the Dark Abyss with Elga...%% Ten years ago, I detected the presence of Origin in this world, the black witch that summoned it escaped through the gap in the Dark Abyss. Once the news was receives the people of the Sky Garden assigned me a mission.%% Seeking people who can control the Spiritual Protection Stones was the best solution, but unfortunately there is no one on this world that possesses that power...%% So...instead...I found the heroes trapped in the Dark Abyss and have returned them to this world, because they were trapped in the torment for a thousand years their memories have been lost.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(You tell Kyoneske that Parmir is around.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% You have met her already?! I must have miscalculated the time to place them here slightly... Good to hear she vaguely remembers her past. Humans always surprise me.%% If we can find all five of the heroes we will be able to put a stop to the conspiracy the Black Witch and Origin are planning. First we shall restore Parmir's memory.%% Go and meet Parmir in Banshi Gorge, I don't think we will be able to restore her memory all at once, but we can talk to her and see what we can do.
Wait!!! I still have things to tell you!
Please tell Parmir in Banshi Gorge what is going on.

{C=0xFF888888/}(You tell Kyoneske's story to Parmir.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% So what you are saying is... I once lived a thousand years ago, and have been revived...? ...But I lost my memory of this... Your story sounds like nonsense but...%% I shall go and meet Kyoneske. Since I have it's name in my memory, perhaps the device may be able to help me regain my memory.
Jess's Hostility
Talk to Jack

That device is mine. I'm taking it. Great Magic! Time travel?! Ha! Isn't it funny! A talking robot....I can get a good price for it.%% I found this device and it is mine. I never wanted to give you my stuff, now go away!!

You want me to sell it to you? I have no desire to make a deal with a scammer like you. Contract? Isn't that part of the conspiracy you planned with Duke Monadron?%% I know you have worked for him in the past, even Monadron himself said that {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} serves him the best!%% I no longer wish to talk to you. I will take this junk to the Village of Ash Mist and sell it there right away. Keep your head out of my business in future!%% {C=0xFF888888/}(It looks like Jack, stood next to Jess, wishes to say something.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
From now on, you don't know me, or I know you.
{C=0xFF888888/}(It looks like Jack, stood next to Jess, wishes to say something.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}

Ah... {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.... I am really sorry... My brother has changed a lot.%% It is all because of our father, he abandoned us when we were young. My brother hates him and finds it hard to accept the fact that Belkan resembles him.
My Dearest Friend
Talk to Jack in the Village of Ash Mist
We are heading to the Village of Ash Mist. I'll calm my brother down and persuade him not to sell Kyoneske. So if you happen to drop by the village, don't forget to visit me.

My brother values friendship a lot. Even though he is saying that right now, I bet he will change his mind very soon. So please don't mind him.%% You are my best friend {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Ok I can see you're annoyed by my brothers attitude. Let me know when you feel better.
The {C=0xFF016295/}Village of Ash Mist{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is near. We will stay there for a while.
Ah...What can we do? After we came to the village, a few villagers died. Now people suspect us.%% I'm afraid we might be blamed.
A Powerful Energy Source
Talk to Chief Scientist Noel

Recently I have been using my scientific knowledge to investigate many supernatural phenomena. Even around us now, there are many hidden powers like magic, summons and spirits etc.%% As of yet no one has succeeded in proving what the origin of all of these powers were... I have never been interested in such things and preferred to keep to my scientific facts...%% After I received my old colleague, Dr. Farrell's research I was astonished. Among the work, I found some fascinating information about Spiritual Shards. Have you ever heard of Spiritual Shards?%%

A Spiritual Shard is a stone which contains one of the basic elements which make this world. Water, Fire, Earth and Dar have permeated the rock deep below the ground over many many years.%% It has been proven that once the element gets compressed and concentrated it can erupt with a powerful energy. Once the stones have been extracted they can be used as a powerful source of energy.%% There is a rumour that Drakan Summoners can implant these shards into monsters spirits and extract them whenever they want.%% All of those summoning skills, magic etc... although they are called different things, it could be said that their principles have all originated from Spiritual Shards.
Spirit Shards are able to boost the limits of your equipment.... If you don't want to get stronger, I won't force you to.
We shall talk more about this...
For the Guardian Tower I have been developing I'm planning to conduct a simple experiment to reconstruct a Spiritual Shard. If you're interested I could do with a hand.
The Element Inside
Extract Lv2. Fire Element

Spirit Shards are only found in a few special places in this world. The people call these places the Guardians' Dungeons.%% I have gained a few Spirit Shards from travellers who have been to the Guardians' Dungeon, but unfortunately to normal people like me they are just simple stones.%% Only chosen people can extract the elements within the Spirit Shards, this is a unique ability only a few people are born with. I believe you have this ability... Could you please continue my experimentation on how to extract the elements within?%% By watching the process I believe I'll be able to collect enough data. Could you help me?
The extraction method is similar to soul crafting I believe. Select a Sprit Shard in your inventory and use the Extract tool.%% Here, try this Spirit Shard. I do hope you succeed.
You obviously have no idea of the power a Spirit Shard contains.
To extract the elements, open your inventory, select the Spirit Shard and use the extract tool. I've been told it's the same as Soul crafting.
Yes! I knew you are a chosen one! Once you've finished extracting the element from the Spirit Shard you may go on. Ha Ha Ha Ha.
Oh... I'll give you a Lv.2 Fire Element Spirit Shard. Try extracting its element.
Socket Card Development (1)
Talk to Max

Applying the power of a Spirit Shard to equipment is not a simple job, if this experiment does not succeed then the Guardian Tower experiment may face difficulties as well.%% Even if the data I need to collect is very complicated I will try and simplify the steps for you. There are three steps required to develop the equipment.%% The first step is to extract the element from the Spirit Shard. Second step is to create a Socket Card by combining elements and some other ingredients.%% A Socket Card is an item which contains the power of the Spirit Shard refined through a scientific process and ready to insert into a piece of equipment.%% The final step is to create a socket on the equipment you wish to insert a socket card into. Are you with me?

To create a Socket Card you need help from a Production Master. Take the elements you extracted from the Spirit Shard and the other ingredients to him and he shall help you develop the Socket Card.%% I guess you've already have much experience with combining ingredients so I'll skip the details. I've already sent a request for a Socket Card to Max, please go to Port of the Winds and ask {C=0xFF00863C/}Production Master Max{C=0xFF4D0D08/} how the development of my Socket Card is progressing.
Are you saying you're giving up on the experiment?
{C=0xFF00863C/}Production Maestro Max{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is in Port of the Winds. Once you meet him, he will take care of the rest.
Chief Scientist Noel must be in rush. I'm almost done. Could you give me a few minutes?
Socket Card Development (2)
Deliver the Experimental Socket Card Box

Here, the Socket Card for Noel's experiment has been created. Because the Socket Card contains the energy of the spirits I have sealed it inside this special box. Please take this to {C=0xFF00863C}Noel{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

I have mastered the element Socket Card's development process through this experience. If you have the right ingredients feel free to return and I'll create you one in no time!%% Remember that some ingredients can only be obtained through Processing/Manufacture, so you might need to increase your EXP in those areas.%% Now don't keep {C=0xFF00863C/}Chief Scientist Noel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} waiting... Rush back to {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and give him this {C=0xFFFF5917/}Experimental Socket Card Box{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for his experiment.
You're heading back to Libra anyway right? Taking this box with you wouldn't hurt would it?
Deliver this {C=0xFFFF5917/}Experimental Socket Card Box{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to {C=0xFF00863C/}Chief Scientist Noel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Oh wow...You can always count on Max to get things done quickly. This isn't just a plain old box, it contains a Basic Fire Element Socket Card... Open it up and try your luck.%%
This {C=0xFFFF5917/}Experimental Socket Card Box{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is for {C=0xFF00863C/}Chief Scientist Noel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Ha Ha. Have you lost the Socket Card Box? You'll need to go back to Max.
Socket Creation (1)
Deliver the Spiritual Card Socket Adapter

Like I said before you need a socket on the equipment you wish insert your Socket Card to unlock its elemental power. This is the Socket Adapter that will take care of the process.%% Once you have installed this Socket Adapter you will be able to insert the Socket Card into your equipment and feel the new elemental power coursing through it.%% There's just one thing you need to remember! Once a Socket Card has been inserted it cannot be re-used. Removing it causes damage to the socket which will need repairing as well, so keep this in mind before you equip any Socket Card.%% Now are you willing to do me one last favour?

Head to {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and please deliver this to {C=0xFF00863C/}Blacksmith Anders{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. This is a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiritual Card Socket Adapter{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. By installing it, it can enable Socket Cards to be inserted into equipment. Blacksmith Anders will handle the rest of it's development.%% Anders is the best blacksmith in our region, so he is the one best places to work on this kind of complicated task. Your job is to hand it over to him.%% Please hurry.
You don't want to see how marvelous this development will be?
Blacksmith Anders is in this village, {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. He will be waiting for the Socket Adapter.

Ah...so this is what Chief Scientist Noel was talking about. I never expected something so marvelous could be created.%% If this work succeeds I shall spread this skill to every blacksmith in Dragotaka! Then you can have socket slots created for your equipment in every village! Isn't it amazing. Ha Ha Ha Ha!
You forgot the Socket Adapter? Here you go. Now deliver it to Anders.
Now you can go back to Chief Scientist Noel.
Socket Creation (2)
Deliver Socketed Helmet
I have drilled a hole in this helmet already... Now I shall install the Socket Adapter you brought me. It won't take long, can you wait?

... ...%% Ok I'm installing the Socket Adapter.%% Hmm... Looks like it will fit perfectly.%% All Right! Done! Now you can insert a socket card into this equipment.%% Plan carefully before inserting any socket cards, they are very sensitive... A socket card can only be used once, once removed you can insert a new socket card but what a waste!%% Well now, will you take this Socketed Helmet to Noel?
You want me to come with you? Sorry I am a very busy blacksmith...
{C=0xFF00863C/}Chief Scientist Noel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is expecting this {C=0xFFFF5917/}Socketed Helmet{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Finally...my research project has come to a successful conclusion. Now my Guardian Tower research can proceed faster and better all thanks to you.%% I shall give you some good compensation for your efforts. Since you have learnt of these Spirit Shard Sockets, I suggest you have this on your equipment too.
Deliver this helmet to Chief Scientist Noel.
Have you not left yet?
Dungeons, Elements and Spirit Shards...
Conversation with Gwen

I have some important information to tell you...%% Gwen Rubin, the Great Magician has arrived! She was in training for a long time but she appeared out of no where. They say, she will take worthy adventurers to the Guardians' Dungeon.%% This means if you go to her, you will be able to get yourself a Spirit Shard! She will be able to give you some extra training to prepare you for the dungeon so make sure you don't miss out.

She is the great great great grand daughter of the Arpoo Rubin, the greatest magician and the one who discovered the Spirit Shards.%% There are four different levels each magician must go through before they are awarded the Master level and Arpoo was one of these Master Magicians.%% Gwen is here to lead adventurers to the Guardians' Dungeon, she might think this situation has something to do with the Black Witch. She knows how dangerous it is.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}Great Magician Gwen{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is around {C=0xFF016295/}Kazeura Village{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Seek her out, when you return from the Guardians' Dungeon I hope you will be able to make an even stronger equipment with the Spirit Shards.
You do not have to go now. But make sure you remember, that only through {C=0xFF00863C}Gwen{C=0xFF4D0D08/} can you enter the Guardians' Dungeon.
I wonder why she has decided to show herself in {C=0xFF016295/}Kazeura Village{C=0xFF4D0D08/} after such a long period of training.

A Long time ago, there were 5 warriors who were chosen by the spirits. Not long after they disappeared into a different dimension and since that day the Spiritual Protection Stone kept the world in balance, although their partner was gone.%% You have been chosen by the spirit. I can feel it. Although it is very weak, you will protect the weakened spirits from the Black Dragon and Evil Witch...%% If you would like to, I can help you get the power of spirit. I will take you there.
Running a Successful Business
Red Jelly
Oh dear, I must try everything to satisfy my customers. Do you know how to run a successful business?%% I will tell you some tricks in return for a favour.

In business the most important thing to remember is the customer is always right.%% Have you heard of the place called {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Many people refuse to go there because it's dark and dangerous. I think I can make a lot of money... now there are some customers there...%% I am thinking of starting a themed restaurant, Nautilus Port is very dark so a spooky restaurant would be perfect! The problem is the spooky theme and the Jellies and Red Jellies don't work well together...%% I want to reduce the number of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, but I'm not as young as I once was... Could you help me fulfil my customers request by reducing their numbers?
Well if you're not interested in business who I am I to force you. Just remember life can take you to some strange places.
Don't Keep An Old Man Waiting
Thank you! The relationship between me and my customers is better than ever. Of course, your reputation has increased in my eyes also...
The Charm of Riches
Teeth of Shark Deckhand
Haha, the charm of riches! Do you know anything about the Charm of Riches? It's a little different to a Lucky Charm, if you like, I'll tell you about it.

Lots of gold comes after hard work, but it never appears out of no where. But some people still want that special moment, they dream about a massive gold rush.%% I am sure you have heard that the Shark Deckhands have well filled pockets.%% They get their riches by pirating, for some reason people have started to believe that Shark Deckhand Teeth bring luck.%% The owner of the new restaurant would like to have some Shark Deckhand Teeth to decorate the new restaurant.%% I never want to disappoint my customers so I told him I will get him some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhand Teeth{C=0xFF4D0D08/} %% Will you help me?
Oh, well. Just remember to visit me when I am in hospital because of the Shark Deckhands...
What? You're not going to try your best because it's not important?

Thank you. I wouldn't have been able to get the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhand Teeth{C=0xFF4D0D08/} on my own. Huh? Why am I putting 5 of the Shark Deckhand Teeth into my pocket?%% I think I need some riches charms too... 5 were for the customer and 5 were for me!
James's Headache
Shark Pirate
Ha...This customer is getting really annoying. Huh?...Oh {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} it's you. Thank you for your help.%% I have a terrible headache. Why?... I'll tell you...

I am sure you remember the customer who wants to make a themed restaurant in {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Now he is becoming a pain...%% He is concerned the Shark Deckhands will cause problems for him when his restaurant launches, they have been hanging around with Harpoons, Knives and Axes and it's making him anxious.%% I don't know why he is worrying, he should be concentrating on the spooky interior... Anyway the customer has refused to sign the contract unless these Shark Pirates are sorted out.%% Would you help me and reduce the number of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Haha, you would refuse to help this sick old man?
Would you sort this problem and help clear my headache? Taking all this medicine isn't helping at all.
Thank you! The contracts have been signed. I don't think they'll be requesting anything else.
How Fast Can You Move?
200 Combo

Yeah? {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.. How are you?%% Heh, I know who you are... I've heard about you from people around the village. But you knew that right??%% The people in this village think you are very fast, is that true?

Hoho. Really? I think you are still far away from being fast.%% I do not trust anything until I see it with my own eyes. Are you willing to prove that you are as quick as the people in the village are saying?%% All you have to do is achieve a {C=0xFFFF5917/}200 Combo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Don't you think it is an easy task, the monsters in Nautilus Port are very fast.
Ha I knew the rumour wasn't true! {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you fail to live up to your name.
I wanted to see how quick you were, what are you still doing here? At this rate you won't even reach {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/} by sunset.
Hm.. You really did it... It seems you are fairly quick.
Are You Really That Strong?
Nautilus Port Monsters

Hmm, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, just because you were successful on your last task don't get big headed. Ok, I admit you are fast. But being fast isn't everything.%% You understand what I'm saying right?

Have you heard of the saying 'Float like a butterfly, sting like a bee.'? You must move smoothly and attack fast, some will feel lots of pain from a bee sting but there are others that feel nothing.%% You need to attack quick and with strength. So, {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} do you think you have strength?%% Hoho, you think so? That is just what you think... If you are really as strong as you say then defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}40 Monsters{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Yeah? I knew you wouldn't do it. Your must not be as strong as you claim.
What? Are you not confident? Then what are you doing here...
Ok ok, this time you got me. You are stronger than I thought.%% Huh, don't be happy about it. You are strong, meaning many people will be coming after you...
So You Want To Be A Hero?
Blue Jelly

Oh..Not another one... What is happening to this village! Why do strangers come into our village?%% What? What are you doing...I'm talking about you! What, you are angry?%% There are so many people who want to become a hero... Can you prove to me you are different from the others?

Ok, to prove yourself to me go to {C=0xFF016295/}Jigsaw Pincers Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Blue Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. To me this is easy, but for you it might be difficult. Many people have already given up.
Hmm, just as I thought. I can see potential in you.
Hmm. What are you still doing here?
Hmm, I guess you are a bit different from all the others.
Anxiety Relief Potion (1)
Crabby Shell
Sigh, I can't...can't focus on this. There's a special training session today, but I cannot concentrate on training... What should I do? Hey! It's kind of an emergency....Can you help me?

Drakan fighters have a tradition to enhance ourselves physically and mentally through training and meditation. I have gained much strength over the last few years but my mind has yet to catch up to my body.%% It's been a thousand days since I started my daily meditation, usually its around a thousand days people begin realising how you can use your body and mind together in synergy to become a better fighter.%% The problem is I cannot continue my meditation right now because I cannot relax with my heart beating so fast because of this anxiety.%% I heard that Magician Class Master {C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is able to create a potion to relive anxiety.%% I'm going to stay here and try to meditate, could you get {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Crabby Shells{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Jigsaw Pincers Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and deliver them to {C=0xFF00863C/}Edeline{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Ha! Yea...right.... It's really hard to find a volunteer to help me.
Hey, stop distracting me and just go and get {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Crabby Shells{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Huh? You need a potion to relieve anxiety? Hmm. I see. Please wait a minute, I'll fetch my recipe book.
Anxiety Relief Potion (2)
Talk to Chanpio

Hmm.. That's weird. The drug is usually a pale blue colour but this one is a really dark blue. It seems that the Crabby Shells must have been altered by another element.%% Let me smell this potion a little... Oh..Eww. Yes, the drug's modified. My head is spinning from the fumes the potion is giving off.%% I think I'll find the cause of what modified the potion. Please tell Sir {C=0xFF00863C/}Chanpio{C=0xFF4D0D08/} that I'll investigate this and let him know the result.

I'm sure the Crabby Shell caused the alteration of this potion. I'm just not sure why or what has affected the Crabby Shells. I'm sorry for {C=0xFF00863C/}Chanpio{C=0xFF4D0D08/} but I think he'll have to wait a bit longer.
Ah? You're refusing this after you came to me with asking a favour first?

Lets not keep {C=0xFF00863C/}Chanpio{C=0xFF4D0D08/} waiting for news any longer, I recommend you go and talk to him about this. Based on experience, Sir {C=0xFF00863C/}Chanpio{C=0xFF4D0D08/} isn't that patient.
What? The potion is spoiled? Oh No, I have been waiting for it for so long. I cannot give up like this !
Razor Crabby's Smell
Razor Crabby

Ah!! It's annoying... No, no.. I should be patient and calm down. What am I doing? Oh, there you are.%% Are you curious about what spoiled the Crabby Shells too? I'll tell you what it is, do you want to help with the solution?

The Crabbies were spoiled by the Razor Crabbies. In the past the Razor Crabbies were normal and caused no harm, but it seems someone has changed them somehow. I don't know who did this but they have ruined my mental training plans.%% The good news is, if we create some distance between the Razor Crabbies and Crabbies, their shells should recover from the harmful element the Razor Crabbies carry.%% Would you help me by defeating {C=0xFFFF5917}Razor Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295}Jigsaw Pincers Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} while I go and collect some fresh Crabby Shells?
What? You're giving up after all this? If you want to give up in the middle of something, don't try helping me to begin with.
Okay! Please go ahead to {C=0xFF016295/}Jigsaw Pincers Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Well done. I guess I don't owe you anything because you must have felt so good about helping me out.

Blue Shark Fin

This port is famous for its seafood, but the best seafood dishes are the ones with {C=0xFFFF5917/}Blue Shark Fins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. My summoned monsters are looking weak, so I'd like to make them some tasty meals made from Blue Shark Fins for them.%% I cannot leave here even for a minute though, there are many summoned monsters coming to visit me. You'll give me a hand right?

You've made a good decision. Helping other people can give you a very satisfied feeling. The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Blue Shark Fins{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Decker Shark Piers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are known to be the best. Once you have them hurry back! I want them fresh!
Hmph! You can't even do me a little favour like this?
Are you going to starve my summoned monsters to death?
Great. My summoned monsters will feel much better after they have had this tasty broth.

250 Combo

It's getting harder to find people who know how to fight with style. Why is that?%% For fighters, the greatest art is mastering combos. Combos are full of continuous action and look really fantastic!%% The problem is the number of people who are interested in this amazing art is getting lower and lower. Hey, why don't you participate in this movement? The movement to encourage people to partake in this fighters art?

Okay, it's important to take an interest in combo techniques. You should head over to the {C=0xFF016295/}Decker Shark Piers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. There you should be able to achieve a {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Combo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} easily. I'll be looking forward to seeing your great technique.
Why? Why? Why do you refuse this? Isn't there anyone who want's to learn this ancient fighter's art?
Don't delay, go and achieve this combo! Hurry.
Well done! I feel really good, it's been a while since I saw someone participate in this fighters art. Ok, next time it's a 10,000 combo... Hey, why are you stepping backwards?
Dangerous Poison
Jelly and Red Jelly
Hmm. This is a serious matter. Have you heard that the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are attacking people! Will you give us a hand?

But these days they have become increasingly violent.%% The main problem is they carry a very strong poison that can kill you if it has contact with your skin. We have to do something about this problem, would you help reduce the numbers of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Decker Shark Piers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Don't you care of the people who may get hurt?
Hurry, there might be someone who is being attacked right now!
Good job! Now people will be able to pass through the {C=0xFF016295/}Decker Shark Piers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} safely.

Mulosca Skin

{C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} what do you think about muscle pain? Just a small pain that will go over night?%% No it's a lot worse...especially when you get older like I am, the pain just gets worse. I find it very hard to see my friend Jeremy in such pain. Will you help him?

Jeremy keeps telling me that his muscle pain is getting much worse these days. Your not going to help out this frail old man?

Huh? Oh.. I don't want to... It's from James... Oh... OK

Deliver the Pain Relief Potion
There you go. It's done. You can deliver this pain relief potion now {C=0xFF00863C/}Jeremy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} now.

Ah I almost forgot, I'll need you to pay something for it. I guess 100 gold is a fair price.%% What? Expensive? I used some of the best ingredients I keep in my store for this! I could ask for much more than 100 gold. You don't have any money? Well then, I'll just have to ask James for payment...

hoho. Did James give you this Pain Relief Potion to give me? James is the only one who cares for me.

hmm, I'm not feeling good. I'm sore all over.
The Impudent Crabbies
Whoa! Sorry, I was dosing off... Urg, what am I so surprised?%% I have something to ask if you can spare a minute?

I tried to get away from them but it was too late, I was surrounded, they hit me with their giant claws and spat big bubbles at me...%% I can't sleep because it's still giving me nightmares... A young {C=0xFF00863C/}%class%{C=0xFF4D0D08/} like you shouldn't have trouble getting even with the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me?
Yeah sure... Who would want to help someone who let themselves be picked on by {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
When I think about the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} it drives me crazy. Please help me out.
Thank you brave {C=0xFF00863C/}%class%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'll sleep like a baby now!
Weird Hobbies
Gather Yellow Stars

I want, you... Whoa, I didn't mean you {C=0xFF00863C/}%class%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Actually I was just dreaming of some of the things I really want, don't you have things you want and dream about?%% Oh well never mind my babbling, could you do me a favour?

Thanks! The truth is, I have gained some weird hobbies recently. I love collecting Yellow Star looking things.%% It's not easy for me to collect them though, I've asked around the village and I heard that the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Lolos{C=0xFF4D0D08/} around the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have these. Could you help me get some?

Is that so? Well, fine. There's no other way. I'll probably get hurt when I go to get the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Yellow Stars{C=0xFF4D0D08/} by myself from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} monsters and I'll blame you, the lazy {C=0xFF00863C/}%class{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I have no words to thank you enough... But could you go a little faster?
I really appreciate you doing that. I really wanted this. I have been collecting these since I heard that Amy from the Pet store likes star shaped things.
A Horrible Shark Pirate
Shark Pirate
Hey! Stop asking! Ah, sorry. I thought you were one of the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/}...%% Sigh, they keep bugging me, it's too much. Hmmm...You're quite strong, aren't you?

The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} keep coming to me to ask for weapons for them to use. Now why would I want to make weapons for the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so they can use them for piracy, and to top it all off they want them for free!%% Of course, I refused, but they keep coming back and threatening me. I spoke to the guards about it, but the sharks just run when the guards appear. I'm sorry to have to ask but could you do something to make sure they don't come back?
How could you ignore me when I'm in trouble. You don't deserve to be called a hero.
Hey aren't you a little relaxed? I don't know when they're coming again...
Thank you. I'm officially free from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Harpoons on Credit
Harpoon Tip
Seriously, why does this happen over and over again to me. Ah! You must be {C=0xFF00863C/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you helped me out before right? Please hear me out.

The Shark Deckhands stopped pestering me for weapons for a while, and a few days ago one of them came to me and told me he didn't want to commit piracy anymore.%% He said he'd like to start fishing instead and asked to but 20 Harpoon Heads on credit, he said he'd pay me back in the fish he was going to catch! This sounded like a tasty offer so I gave him the Harpoon Heads.%% It turns out he is just using them for piracy... and of course he hasn't paid the bill. I'd like you to get the {C=0xFFFF5917/}15 Harpoon Tips{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Will you help me?
Yeah, I'm asking too much. You've already helped me out before.
{C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} may threaten people with those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Harpoon Tips{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please hurry.
Thank you. Now they'll have trouble committing their piracy!
A Hero's Combo
300 Combo

Hmm, is that place too hard for you too? Mm? What do you think about the monsters in the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% It's easy peasy for me to fight with those monsters, but the other guys who pass through here say otherwise...%% What do you think, can you do better than the others?

Recently so many would-be heroes have been visiting. Strangely they all say it's hard to achieve {C=0xFFFF5917/}300 Combos{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I went there myself to see what all the fuss was about but It was so easy for me. If you succeed, then it just proves they had no skill at all. It will also be a good chance to prove your own ability. So will you try it?
Nah, I thought so. It's hard to become a big shot like me.
I thought you were really confident. So...what are you still doing here?
Hmm, you did better than I expected. But not enough to make me surprised. Keep training.
Memories of a Beautiful Place
Monsters in the Bearded Whale Coast

I'll never be able to see the beautiful landscape again... Sigh... Huh? Did you ask why?%% This is all the fault of the monsters at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The coastline there is so beautiful... Please make it safe for me to go there again!

The {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} holds many of my most treasured memories. I hope to have many more memories there but I haven't been able to go there since these monsters showed up.%% I'm looking for someone who can fight back for us. Please help me retake the coast.
Maybe memories mean nothing to you...
Hey, what are you doing? Are you making some memories here or something?
Thanks! Now I can continue my delivery service to the coast. My store's sales slowed right now because of the monsters.%% This is what matters. Sales have to come first!
Inconsiderate Shark Pirates
Shark Pirate

I have lost all patience for this madness. I have never seen anything like this before... A few days ago the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} came to the port...%% They may have come here with the intention of just having a few drinks but in the end they did some horrible things. Do you want the details?

They, They... They broke all of the potions I made.%% Why are you looking at me like that? Aren't you surprised? I make a living from these potions. I yelled at them demanding that they pay for them. They didn't even feel sorry for what they did, just laughed and left my store.%% I doubt they even have enough money to compensate me for what they did, but I hope they get some kind of punishment for their actions.
No! No! How dare you refuse to help me with this!
Give them some payback for what they did before they forget about it.
Whoa, I feel much better now. You're such a good guy.
Slimey Monsters
Red Jelly

Oh...I'm aching all over. What, stop looking at me like that! Just because I'm young doesn't mean I can't get worn out too!%% It's all because of the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} monsters. Will you help me out, I'll fill you in on the story.

The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have been causing a problem over at the {C=0xFF00863C/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The slime that covers their skin has been soaking the ground and making it all slippery. It doesn't feel very nice to walk on either.%% Urr... Just thinking about it is making me feel sick again.%% Anyways they are hiding at Captain Hookah's place, I am getting really bad back pain from cleaning up this slimey mess with my village people.%% Please help us by stopping the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from going to the {C=0xFF00863C/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} ever again.
Yea, of course it wouldn't bother you if a load of kids are getting back problems from this...
If you dawdle then we might have to clean up the whole coast again.
Thank you for your help, hopefully I won't get anymore back pain from this.
Mom's Belonging
Mom's Belonging
Oh my, I'm in trouble. You look strong young %class%. Could you do me a favour? You must help me.

Thank you. Actually I was playing with my mum's stuff at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% These {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} came out of no where and said, 'Ah! That belongs to my boss'. They snatched my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mum's Thing{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and ran away.%% My mum will be really annoyed if she finds out I took one of her things. Please help me.
What, this 'little cute kid' strategy doesn't work?
She will be back soon. Please hurry.
Thank you! If she finds out that I've lost it ill be in big trouble.
A Man Among Men
Captain Hookah's Hat
Grr...he gives the whole thief community a bad name. hmm. You look quite strong. Do you think you would like to test out your own abilities?

Good choice. We're planning to fix Captain Hookah's attitude, he's ruining the thieves reputation. I'd love to do something about it myself but there are some old protocols stopping me since I'm in the same line of work.%% I can't see a reason that would stop you from doing something about it though....yea that would work... He is a thief, we are meant to represent the people, take from the rich, give to the poor...but he is doing the opposite.%% Could you steal his hat from him, he values that hat a lot being a pirate and all... This punishment will show him his wrong doing.
What? Why do you refuse this, don't you feel you should do something about this terrible thief?
hehe. I'm dying to see the look on his face. Hurry up!
Nice. Hmm. This hat looks quite good! Maybe I should become I pirate myself? Haha, don't worry I'm just joking....please don't look at me like that.
A Strange Clattering Sound
Barrel Bones
Broken Barrel Bones
Ah it's good to see you young %class%. Could you do me a favour? I have been receiving many complaints from local residents.

The people in this village have been complaining about a weird, clattering sound coming from the Sewer over there.%% I held my breath and took a look inside myself... There were many skeletons down there in a strange container.%% I like to call them {C=0xFFFF5917/}Barrel Bones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Broken Barrel Bones{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, they seem to be the source of the strange sounds. They are rather annoying.%% I have been suffering some hair loss because of all the complaints I've been receiving. Could you make the monsters be quiet?
How could you ignore these people's suffering?
I'm begging you, please do something before I get another complaint.
They were really noisy... My local residents can sleep like babies from now on. Thank you for your help!
Grey Fabric
Fabric Bunch

Ah! The day is so close now. What should I do... I don't know why my family won't help me with this.%% ummm, I don't like to have to ask a busy %class% like you but have you seen any Fabric Bunches around here? A local fashion contest is being held in a few days and I need to finish my dress, this shortage of Fabric is not helping at all.%% Could you please help me?
I've entered the contest a few times before, but I didn't win anything so I really want to look my best this time.%% I've always wanted to show my son how good I can be and make him proud.
If you're that busy then I won't ask again. I'll ask my son instead.
Hey I only have a few days left. Please hurry would you?
Thank you. If there's any spare fabric left over, I'll make some nice clothes for you %name%.
Mad Wolf Disease
Wolf Monsters

Ladies and Gentlemen! This village is in big trouble. As you know, Port of the Winds has a sophisticated defence system designed to protect the village from the threats outside its walls.%% Somehow a number of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Wolf Monsters{C=0xFF4D0D08/} with some kind of mad wolf disease have managed to get around these defences. We have no idea how they are getting in but we have to do something to stop them...

Fortunately no one has been bitten yet but any of these Wolf Monsters infected with the disease but there's no guarantee it won't happen. We haven't figured out the exact location they are coming from but...%% Witnesses have claimed they have seen the wolves coming from the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Could you head down there and slay {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Wolf Monsters{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to ensure the safety of the village?
Why do you refuse? Is it the smell? Everyone knows Culvert stinks. Be a man!
What are you doing here? Please go quickly, run to the {C=0xFFFF5917/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for the locals sake.
Well done! You are a real hero. I wasn't sure you would be able to do it.
Being Fooled!
Love Contract

My life is over... Sob...I cannot believe this..%% Do you know how I feel? No, you don't. This pain you can only understand once you have experienced it.%% Do you know why? Fine...I'll tell you to prevent this from happening ever again. You'll promise to help me won't you?

A few days back in the middle of the night, I was enjoying a few laughs with my friends in Rudolph's Inn. We were a bit merrier than usual.... A woman visited the bar asking people for community support for a campaign for saving the sick woodies or something.%% I of course signed it without a second thought...%% Ohaaaa! Ah, sorry, it still freaks me out when I recall that night.%% Anyways it wasn't for sick woodies.... The woman who took my signature was {C=0xFFFF5917/}Steamed Juju{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the notorious Pirate Corps and known for being the nastiest girlfriend on Dragotaka.%% She took my signature on a Love Contract...please please get the contract back for me so I can destroy it, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Steamed Juju{C=0xFF4D0D08/} down in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} should still have it.
I have no option then... I'll have to live the rest of my life as Juju's pet forever...
I will be more thankful if you get the contract from Juju before she comes back.
Yes! Yes!! You are my hero, you've saved my life. From now on I'll be more careful of what I'm signing!
An Amazing Recipe
Chief Cook Kakanu

Do you know what the most important ingredient of every recipe is? It's important to pick the highest quality ingredients and have a skilled chef, but there is something even more important. It's love.%% I make my meals for people to enjoy them and make them healthier than before. The problem is one the chefs I trained with, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Chief Cook Kakanu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has the opposite idea, he only cares about selling his food regardless of its quality or safety.%% I've heard he is trading near here again, I'm begging you please stop him.

I travelled the whole world to learn as many dishes as I could and improve my cooking skills. I met Chief Cook Kakanu during my training. Because he doesn't care about the quality of his food one of his customers got really sick after eating one of his meals.%% I heard that {C=0xFFFF5917/}Chief Cook Kakanu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} ran away and I don't know where he is exactly, maybe he went into hiding down in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, it smells as good as his food down there.%% Head down there and stop him, the people in this village may be in danger from his disgusting food.
Then....I'll just have to stop him myself.
Kakanu is really dangerous. Be careful, oh and don't eat his food!
Thanks, I couldn't ignore Kakanu and let him continue being a village cook.
How to Brew Drinks
Oak Tree Barrel

Umm... Such a delicate fragrance... Can you smell it on the breeze? Hoho.. Do you know how to brew a good drink as well? It's takes a long time to become an expert in brewing drinks.%% However, even for the experts it's difficult to collect good barrels to brew the best drinks. They're required to maintain the best temperature and need to have a good seal.%% I found my family's traditional recipe for brewing this drink, it's been passed down through generations. The problem is I don't have a godo container to keep it in. Could you take care of this problem with me?

If you're interested in learning how to brew traditional drinks then you should learn that the most important part of brewing is the way you store the drink. That's what people find oak containers perfect for brewing drinks.%% It's really hard to find a container made from oak, but I have found a good source of them in the City Hall Sewer.%% The problem is it's not simple... there are plenty of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Oak Tree Barrels{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/} but there are {C=0xFFFF5917/}Barrel Bones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Broken Barrel Bones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} living inside them.%% I hope you can get some of the containers for me so I can pass down my family's tradition.
I won't push you anymore. You just don't know how important this is.
I just feel sorry that I cannot complete my job or let the people of this village taste the delicious drink just because I don't have a barrel.
Haha. Thanks! Now I can make the drink. But urm...I think you might need to wait a while before it's ready.
The Cause of Heart Attacks
Spiked Mace Mummy

Ohaaa! Don't try and scare me like that! What, you didn't? Can't you see how on edge I am now?%% Anything that gets that close to me makes me really nervous. Fine! I'll tell you why... The true horror story of {C=0xFF016295/}The City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

A few days ago I decided to take a walk outside and I ended up wandering around the City Hall Sewer. There I was minding my own business when I saw this strange white and black thing...%% Wheeooo, was the sound it made. Because of that my heart almost leaped out of my chest, If they were monsters I'd be able to just face them, but I really hate Ghosts.%% I ran away, but now my heart beats really fast whenever I have to pass near the Sewer. I'll give you a chance to take great honour by defeating those ghosts...Will you help me?
If you're not interested, that's fine. I'll ask other people for help instead.
Everyone's afraid of ghosts. Who isn't? I'm normal!
Good Job. Now I can wander around without fear again.
A Stolen Helmet
Stolen Helmet

When you recall a fierce battle from the past, what do you see? I see a big trophy making my success in battle.%% Of course it's not the only thing left from the battle, the most important thing that I gain from each battle is bravery and intelligence. Trophies are just one of the things which I can keep to remember each battle.%% The thing is one of my most precious trophies has been stolen... I hope you can take care of this for me.

During the last national anniversary a trophy exhibition has help to show people the achievements of Steven Jr, our Sovereign... The thing is, we had no idea someone was formulating a plan to steal all of those precious trophies.%% They managed to steal just one of Steven Jr's trophies, the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Helmet{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. A lot of effort was spent in obtaining that Helmet but it had no special meaning.%% Fortunately I have managed to locate the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Helmet{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I've heard that {C=0xFFFF5917/}Franken Doju{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is wearing it himself down in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Doju has refused to return it back to the kingdoms possession, your job is now to bring it back by whatever means necessary.
It's not just a favour for me, but also for the kingdoms sovereign. Are you refusing this?
Before Doju can prepare for our arrival, please get back the Helmet.
Great! We appreciate your hard work. My sovereign, Steven Jr. will be pleased.
The Monkey and Banana
Special Banana

I cannot stand this anymore, I'm really growing to hate this village. Why? Don't you know why? Those damn {C=0xFFFF5917/}Porkies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} took all of the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Special Bananas{C=0xFF4D0D08/} I just bought. I can't stand it anymore, I'm going to move my store to another village. Yea. I think I'll leave Port of the Winds!%% Ha! Aren't you going to stop me? {C=0xFF888888/}(You pause....before trying to convince Daisy to stay.){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Too late.%% Well, actually, I guess if you meet my demands there's a possibility I'll change my mind.%%

So my demands are... I want you to bring back the 9 bananas that were stolen from me. The Porkies are bugging not only me but also lots of other people here, especially when they are stealing food and shiny things from the shops!%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Porky{C=0xFF4D0D08/} monsters are often seen in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, perhaps you should look down there first.
Ok, I'll have to pack up and leave this town then. I'm leaving.
Hey. Are you going to just return with Banana skins, the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Porkies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will have eaten my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Special Bananas{C=0xFF4D0D08/} by the time you get there.
Hehe! My precious bananas! They're back! Sniff, sniff. What's this smell? It stinks! Oh my, my bananas smell like the sewer!
Legendary Seasoning
Five Spice

I've finally located the legendary seasoning! Ah, what? You heard what I just said right? Oh, did I say it too loudly? Well, you can't blame me for being happy.%% You've heard of something called Five Spice haven't you? It can turn any food into the most tasty dish. It's legendary.%% The problem is it's really hard to get your hands on some, good news is I've found where to get some from! It turns out that a special component from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Boomboom{C=0xFF4D0D08/} monsters is an important ingredient in the Five Spice. Now I've told you this valuable information would you get some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Five Spice{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me?

Teeheehee. {C=0xFFFF5917/}Boombooms{C=0xFF4D0D08/} like to hide down in the {C=0xFF016295/}City Hall Sewer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I don't know why they live down there but you should be careful, so not to damage the ingredients, you know...
What, you will just take this information and use it for your own good? How despicable.
I have many customers waiting for this {C=0xFFFF5917/}Five Spice{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I've already told them I have some. Are you going to make me a liar?
Khahahaha. I have it! All of the restaurants around will be calling me to get my seasoning!
A Warrior in Training (1)
Shark Pirate
Shark Deckhand

Ohaa! I'm excited!!%% Did I do too much blacksmithing work? I'm excited because this incident reminds me of my past, of when I was training to become a warrior.%% When I was your age I began travelling for my training, I slayed so many monsters during that time... How would you like to slay pirates at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for your training?

I don't know exactly when this started but apparently most of the pirates at the Bearded Whale Coast arrived at the same time Captain Hookah appeared.%% Anyway, the pirates that do all of Hookah's dirty work are the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. If you can slay 20 of them I will have enough confidence to move you to the next stage of training.
Hmm, them I have nothing for you to do. But remember, you are missing out on a really good opportunity to learn some new skills.
Okay! We have no time to delay, your training must begin!
Good! But you should know that this is only the first step of your training.
A Warrior in Training (2)
Starry Lulu and Lolo

The hardest thing I ever encountered was never a single opponent, it was hundreds of weaker opponents all working together.%% When I fought against so many, I was really lucky not to be defeated by them. To make you understand how difficult this is you should complete this next stage of training.

Starry Lulu and Lolo monsters are always packed together in tight groups. Because of their habits many travellers and trainees have trouble avoiding or defeating them.%% If you gather some experience by defeating some of these monsters you may realise how to fight groups of stronger monsters.%% Remember the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are in the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Keep them in mind.
Now are you just too lazy or did you get afraid all of a sudden?
It won't be good for your training to dawdle like that.
You must have gained quite a bit of experience! Now for the last part of your training.
A Warrior in Training (3)
Red Jelly

If you spend time to observe your opponents you will be able to learn their weaknesses. With that in mind I think encountering a number of different opponents will help you to learn how to spot their weaknesses.%% When I was training to become a warrior I once defeated 3 types of monsters at the same time. It wasn't easy, having to dodge, and fight back...%% I realised after that fight how much experience I gained, what do you think? Are you ready to face 3 different kinds of opponents?

This is the last stage of your training. If you can handle this well then you can be proud of yourself, it will mean you are one of my best trainees..%% The opponents I want you to handle this time are {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Don't take any chances and don't let your guard down. Watch your back!
I'm sad you're not going to complete your training. It was the last stage...
Don't get lazy in the last stage of your training!
So what did you think of all the training missions? What? They weren't good enough?%% Hmm, I guided you exactly how the book, [A Warrior in Training], said to. Maybe I bought the wrong book...
Ersil the Great Fisherman

{C=0xFF00863C/}%class%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, come... listen to me. My dream is to someday become a master fisherman, I often go fishing to gather more experience. I met Primo recently at the Bearded Whale Coast...%% He said he's become really good at fishing, like a fishing expert. We started competing to see who could catch the most fish at the Bearded Whale Coast but some Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands came out from nowhere.%% They took my 15 fish away with them, Primo was pleased that he won the competition after he only caught 14 fish. I was the true winner!%% If I show my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Fish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to him, Primo will know I won. Please help me.

This Victory will lead me to become a greater fisherman! It's great that you'll help me recover my dignity.%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} can be found at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I hope you can recover my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Fish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} great %class%.
I have no other way... I cannot be the greatest fisherman.
If you waste time and let the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Fish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} spoil, Primo won't believe me.
Umm? Are these the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Fish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} Ersil caught? I wasn't interested in the competition, but anyway I like free Fish....
Primo's Lunch
Lunch Fish
My Lunch! I have lost the will to live. Don't ask me why, I don't have any strength...%% I'll tell you if you're willing to help me, I'm so hungry.

I really don't earth much, even though it looks like I eat a lot, so I try and make my meals as tasty as I can. I made a very tasty lunch with the 15 Fish Ersil sent to me.%% I have no idea how the sharks found out about it but they cam and stole my whole lunch! If I do not have a good lunch, I will be tired out soon... I need it for my strength. Please go to the {C=0xFF016295}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and get back my {C=0xFFFF5917}15 Lunch Fish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} the sharks took from me.
I don't even have enough strength left to fish... You are merciless.
I am so hungry right now. I think I could even eat my own fishing rod.
Thank you. You think this is too much for one? I only eat this because I am on a see-food diet.
Primo's Fishing Rod
Captain Hookah

My fishing rod! My fishing rod is broken. It's the only thing I enjoy doing in my free time.%% What does he want from me... If he does not pay for my fishing rod, my fishing rod will not be able to go to heaven. Please make him pay for what he did.

I was enjoying my fishing yesterday afternoon when suddenly I was surrounded by loads of bad looking people.%% Among them was Captain Hookah, he said after watching me fishing he wanted to give it a try too. I was so scared of them I just handed over my fishing rod.%% Not long after Captain Hookah screamed 'This is boring!' and snapped my beloved fishing rod in half and then stormed off! He is a very bad guy and he has made me very sad.%% Can you go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and take revenge on {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for my fishing rod?
What? You're just going to ignore my sadness?
My fishing rod is very precious to me. I have been using it for a long time... Please make them pay for what they did.
I think my broken fishing rod is ok now {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has paid for it. What? Will I fix the broken rod? No..don't be silly I've already bought a new one.
A Small Present from Leo (1)
Crabby Shell

Hello fine %class%, please hear me out. I want to give someone important to me a nice present. Thing is, I don't have much gold to buy anything with. So instead I wish to cook something, can you help me?

I've always been taught that handmade presents are the best, so I have thought about it and realised that a healthy dish would be the best present to give. I've done some research and found that Crabby Soup is good for your health.%% I've been told I need the whole shells of Crabbies to make the soup, but my Grandpa Jeremy won't let me go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to get them. Would you go there for me and get {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Crabby Shells{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Ah Well.. I will just sneak out at night and go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} alone.
Fresh ingredients are very important for nice food. I'll wait here for you.
Thank you. I will train hard and become strong like you kind %class%, I will make sure I help other people as you helped me.
A Small Present from Leo (2)
Shark Tail

Huh? Ah, %name%! Thank you for those Crab Shells you brought me before. I have made a nice dish using them.%% Before I gave the meal as a present I asked Daisy, who is well know for enjoying find foods, to try it for me. After having a bite she thought something was missing. Do you know what she told me?

He said the meal was missing Shark Tails. Shark Tails are also called the Jewel of all Sea Food. I really want to get one to improve the flavour of my dish but they are really rare and hard to find. It would be impossible for me to get some.%% The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I would really like to present this person with a really tasty dish...%% Will you help me by returning with {C=0xFFFF5917/}15 Shark Tails{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for my disk?
Oh, well, I guess I'll have to just improve my cooking skills to overcome this problem.
I am sure I can make a new and better dish.
Ah! So this is the symbol of luxury, mmmmm... Shark Tail. Because of you %name% my dish will taste much better.
A Small Present from Leo (3)
Special Spice

Finally, I have made a tasty meal using the Crabby Shells and Shark Tails! I thought it was ready for the special person to enjoy my dish so I took it to the best cook in the Port of the Winds, Mr. Rudolph to let him taste it.%% He said there was a Special Spice missing which would make the soup taste much more rounded and better. I must have this Special Spice, I must make this dish the best it can be! Please help me %name%.

Rudolph says the Special Spice can sometimes be found on Starry Lulus, but the bad news is not all of them carry the spice so it can be very hard to find.
