The cooks in the Port of the Winds either use something similar or spend lots of money to get the Spice.%% The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Special Spice{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is the most important ingredient for Seafood dishes so I really must have it, please get some from the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me %name%.
Have you ever loved someone %name%?
Please hurry, my other ingredients might go bad.
Now everything is ready. The person I love will be very happy.
A Small Present from Leo (4)

Ah cooking is so difficult. I am sure my mother had many problems cooking because of me. I shouldn't have been so picky about food.%% Did I tell you about the person I love so much? It's not my mother or father...% What? Girlfriend? %name%, I am too young for that. The person I love the most in my Grandpa Jeremy.%% My parents were.... because of the monster rushing into Port of the Winds... ...when there was no one, Grandpa Jeremy looked after me.%% Please help me complete this dish for him %name%.

I thought after collecting the Special Spice the food was ready, so I went to Grandpa James who has very similar tastes to Grandpa Jeremy.%% Grandpa James told me not to call him Grandpa and also said the dish is very good, but just one important thing was missing.%% There is a very important ingredient in any seafood dish that was missing, it's called seaweed.%% A long time ago it wasn't too hard to find some seaweed around but since Captain Hookah arrived it has all but gone from Port of the Winds. Grandpa James thinks Captain Hookah is stealing all of it.%% Please bring me some {C=0xFFFF5917}Seaweed{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back from {C=0xFFFF5917}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You have done so much for me, I shouldn't ask anything more from you. I will go and ask Captain Hookah for some myself.
I wish to see Grandpa Jeremy's face when he tries this dish.
Wow! This is the Seaweed? It looks nothing like Seaweed... Well thanks to your help I'll be able to see Grandpa Jeremy's happy face, thank you %name%!
Smooth Skin!
Blue Jelly Extract

Why is the skin so dry? What? You think my skin is fine? Do you think I am worried about my skin?%% Haha, us Drakan do not worry about such trivial things. I am worried about my summoned creatures. I think their skin has gone bad due to all of the battles they have had to fight recently.%% The girl called Cindy told me there is a good medicine I can use of their skins. Don't you think this is a good chance to improve the relationship with us Drakan?

Cindy told me that Blue Jelly Extract from the Jigsaw Pincers Coast is really good for looking after skin. I just have no idea where this place is.%% As you have lived here for so long, I am sure you will be able to find it easily. So bring me {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Blue Jelly Extracts{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for my creatures.
So you do not care if us Drakan do not get along with you Humans? Fine!
I demand you complete this task quickly for my summoned creatures.
I will say thanks, but I only asked for help because I don't know my way around here!
Danger on the Coast
Blue Jelly

Hmm.. A Kazeura messenger has reported that strange things are happening around the Jigsaw Pincers Coast. The main cause of all of these seems to be the Blue Jellies. Until recently it was believed they were not intelligent creatures.%% But according to a recent report the Blue Jelly have been sending out a strange signal. Any monsters in the range of this signal gather around them.%% The problem is the Blue Jellies are trying to enter the village, I think we need you to help sort this problem out.

The main reason behind the change seen in the Blue Jellies is believed to be Dr. Farrell. Perhaps he has performed some kind of experiment on them... I believe you will help us to prevent the people in Port of the Winds from suffering.
Really, are you out of your mind? You're not going to help when there is such an imminent danger to the port!
Hurry and solve this situation. Waiting will just let things get worse than they already are.
Phew, another thing endangering the safety of the people of Port of the Winds has been solved.
Throw It Away!
Razor Crabby

My 1000th training session ended with nothing special. I think it is my fault for trying to get help from a potion.%% It's just difficult to stop thinking about the potion. I think it's because of those monsters, can you help me with this?

Please slay {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Crabby{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Razor Crabby{C=0xFF4D0D08/} that are stopping me from progressing in my training.%% If they are gone, I think I'll do better in my training.
No? You won't help me out with my training?
That's it! Go and defeat those Crabbies for me.
Ok, I can finally calm down about these Crabbies.%% But....Maybe there are some more Crabbies at the seaside? Haha. Don't worry, I am just wondering.
Village Troublemaker
Conversation with Jess

Oh no, Jess is going to be very angry with me. What am I going to do %name%? I have lost something important Jess left for me.%% Jess can get very angry and doesn't forgive anyone easily if you lose something. He might not want to see my face ever again. I am sorry but, would you please go and talk to {C=0xFF00863C/}Jess{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me %name%?

People in the village warned me not to hang around with him but Jess is my only true brother.%% It was very difficult for me when my parents were gone, Jess was always there for me and has helped me in many ways. If Jess says he never wants to see me again I will never forgive myself.
Oh well. Jess will be angry with me, but I will just have to live with it.
Jess does have a temper but he won't hit you %name%.
What? Leo lost my stuff? I trusted him with it....and he's lost it??%% Now, what is it he lost? Ah! Right...right..right. I cannot forgive him for that.
Physical Labour (1)
Starry Lulu

I am so angry right now. What? Calm down? Then replace the stuff he lost!%% It doesn't cost much, just one hundred million gold. What? You don't have that much? Then you are going to have to work to earn it. Are you up for it?

I do not know how good you are, so I am going to test your ability. At the Bearded Whale Coast there is a dangerous place called #location [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Inside there live many strong monsters. Enter {C=0xFF016295/}[Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and slay {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Then I will know you are good enough for the task I'm going to give you.
What? You're not going to try it? Then Leo can work for me until he has paid pack the 100 million gold...
You better hurry, it will be getting dark soon.
Well done, but you will need to do more than that to pay for what Leo has lost.
Physical Labour (2)
Shark Pirate
It's not over yet. You might have just got lucky. And as you know luck doesn't last forever.%% So I do not trust you just tet. I hope you're willing to attempt another test, for Leo's sake?

There are some trouble makers in the Bearded Whale Coast. There worst ones live in the {C=0xFF016295/}[Chaos Mode(F2){C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I don't know why they hang around there.%% I hate the Shark Pirates and Jellies the most, they just look repulsive.%% Go and slay those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Hmm. So you're not going to do it? Yea, I knew you were not that good.
Ok, go on then, hurry up.
Hey. I guess it seems you are good enough. Shall we begin the real hard work?
Physical Labour (3)
Locked Box

Hey. Time for the main job. Don't worry though.. It's not that hard.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Jess lowers his voice.){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Hush! Lower your voice. What? My voice is the loudest?%% Anyway, you do realise that this is a very secret mission, right? If you can do this, then I will be much calmer about what Leo lost.

I heard a rumour that some monsters in the Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)] have found something special.%% I decided to check it out and I found there was some heavy locked boxes, surely they have something special inside. Of course they would have stolen them from some others, so I was thinking I will keep them.%% You know... until the owner is back, I will keep them safe. Unlike the monsters.%% Go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring me back {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Locked Boxes{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Hey! But this is the mail task! You put the effort in to pass the tasks and then give up on the actual mission?
Ok hurry, before anyone else finds out about the boxes.
Wow! Finally, I got the boxes. Haha. Good job!
Physical Labour (4)
Captain Hookah's Secret Key

Ok. This is the last task I have for you. I have calmed down quite a bit already now. But I am still a bit angry.%% There is one thing you can do to make me happy again. But it isn't easy...do you think you can handle it?

I am sure you have heard of Captain Hookah by now? He is really evil and scary. rumour has it he has a Secret Key which he always carried on him. My source should be good on this, I got the information from Hookah's Henchman.%% I seems the locked box can be opened using his {C=0xFFFF5917/}Secret Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I think I should look after this key so they can't get into the boxes. Get it for me from the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
What! So you think everything is ok now?
Hurry up before the others hear about {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah's Secret Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Finally I can open the locked box. Wait! Let me open this.%% Huh? What is this? It's a salted fish! Humph! Well...since you helped me, I will tell you what Leo has lost. It is my tooth. It was taken out and Leo wanted to have a look so I told him to keep it for a while.
Angry Jess
Conversation with Jess

Oh no this is bad %name%! My good friend Jess seems to be in some kind of trouble%% I went to Jess but he seemed very angry and wouldn't tell me what the problem was. He just told me not to worry about anything...%% I think Jess must be in some kind of big trouble. Please would you help {C=0xFF00863C/}Jess{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me %name%?

Thank you. I am very worried because I have no idea what Jess has done. In the past when he has been angry something bad has happened.%% I just hope nothing bad has happened to him this time. He is my only friend in Port of the Winds, he's like my real brother.

Oh well. I am training right now but it isn't right to ask for help from others.%% I will try to solve the problem Jess is facing myself. In the past when I tried to help him before I ended up in hospital. I hope it doesn't happen again.
Please hurry up and help {C=0xFF00863C/}Jess{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I'm in a bad mood. Why are you here? What? Leo asked you to come? Hmm.. Ok, I'll tell you why I am angry.
Whales in Danger (1)
Jelly and Red Jelly

%name%, this place was famous for it's large number of Bearded Whales. But for some reason the number of whales has been getting smaller and smaller.%% We dispatched our research group and found that the marine environment around the coast has changed meaning the whales cannot survive here anymore. Do you want to know why?

It's all because of the Jellies which have flooded the whole area recently. The slime they give off is very acidic and it's polluting the sea water around the coast.%% This means it's not just the number of whales I am worried about, we are worried about all of the fish in the sea! Please reduce the numbers of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} around the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. They are very dangerous, so be careful.
You are going to just sit back and watch the sea get polluted?
Hurry before it becomes too late to save the fish!
Well done. The sea will recover, but it will take time.
Whales in Danger (2)
Shark Pirate

I have found another reason for the disappearance of the whales. Well, maybe it's the main reason... Each Bearded Whale has something called a Whale Tear, each one holds a concentrated magical force.%% They can only be obtained from living whales, it's rumoured that a whale only gives its tears to someone they truly trust.%% I have heard however that there is someone who can extract the Tears from any whale using a special machine. I would like you to stop them.

It's those dastardly Shark Pirates. Although we don't know why they need these Tears, they are still up to no good.%% Would you go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} where the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are and bring back the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Whale Tears{C=0xFF4D0D08/} they took.%% There are already many whales dying because they are missing their Tears.
So you do not care about the plight of the whales?
Hurry, we need to save as many whales as we can.
Good job. I will get these Tears back to the rightful Whales as soon as I can.
Whales in Danger (3)
Captain Hookah

I have found why the Shark Pirates are extracting the Tears from the Bearded Whales. As you know, each whale tear is very beautiful, but it also contains great magical power.%% The whale tears are being traded on the black market illegally between the richest people in Dragotaka at very high prices. Please help me put a stop to this...

{C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is the main trader of the tears. As you know there is demand and supply, but because of it's new boost to supply a surge in demand has appeared.%% Please stop {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to cut the demand.
I know {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was strong, but I didn't expect you to be scared of him.
Go and make {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} pay for what he has done to the Bearded Whales.
Good job. Soon the Bearded Whale Coast will be back to normal again.
Jess's Treasure (1)
Wooden Box

This is really bad, I'm so angry. I hid some of my treasure around the coast but somebody has took them! I have a few ideas who may be responsible, but I have no proof.%% I think Captain Hookah is trying to make me pay for what I did a long time ago, when I stole some things from him... I really need to find those Wooden Boxes, they can be broken really easily and there is no lock so anyone could open them.%% I am sorry to ask, but please help me.

I have never stolen that much from Hookah, just a few boxes full of fish, nothing special. I am sure they were not his things either anyway...%% I really did not expect Hookah to send his henchmen to take my stuff. There are many foot prints around and it looks like it was the Crabbies who took my boxes.%% Please bring me back {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Wooden Boxes{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Ok, so you've 'politely' refused to help me, you can 'politely' accept too you know...
Go and get those boxes back for me as soon as possible, before they take everything. Stop wasting time like you are now!

Thanks. So is it heavy or light?? {C=0xFF888888/}(Jess opens the Wooden Box in a hurry.){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Arf. As I expected they opened the box... ...and now, it is empty.%% What? What do you man it was empty when you found it!? If it is empty, then they have to fill it back up!
Jess's Treasure (2)
Jess's Treasure Chest

Ahhhhh! This is an emergency! EMERGENCY! What am I going to do? Should I call the guards? No, if I call them, it will get worse.%% What's wrong you ask? How can you be so calm! My Treasure Chests have disappeared, they contains all of my most precious stuff! Please, please help me get my Treasure Chests back, please please.

I was keeping all of my most precious stuff inside my Treasure Chests. I left those wooden boxes everywhere to confuse the bad guys, but now they have taken my wooden boxes and my treasure chests too!%% I'm not entirely certain but I saw some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} carrying something heavy. Please get back my {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Treasure Chests{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
No! Please please help me. The chests are very important to me. If you do not help me, I will remember this.
Please hurry, I am getting desperate to get my chests back from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

AH! Thank you thank you! They don't even have the so why did they even take the Treasure Chests? So you want to know what's in the chests? I will show you since you helped me out.%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Jess searches his pockets.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Huh? Wha? No way, oh no! I lost the key to my Treasure Chests!
Jess's Treasure (4)
Jess's Treasure Chest Key

Ah, AH, AAAAAAAHHHHHHH. Where is it? Did I drop it in the toilet? Oh nononono. Did I drop it while having a shower? Wait.... I do not shower. Oh no... Where is it?%% Huh! No? I think Captain Hookah has it.... If you wish to see my treasure please help me find the Treasure Chest Key please.

A few days ago I went to Captain Hookah's place to see if he had anything valuable. I was sneaking around Captain Hookah when his henchmen saw me. I ran as fast as I could, when I glanced back Hookah was picking up something shiny from the floor.%% That must have been my Treasure Chest Key. {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain Hookah{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} . Please bring back my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Treasure Chest Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
What am I going to do with a treasure chest that I cannot open!?
If you want to see what is inside then please hurry.

Oh! You brought my Treasure Chest Key back to me! Ok I will show you what is inside my treasure chest. Huh? What? This is empty.%% Ah... Of course, I remember I used the treasure to pay for this treasure chest. I thought it was best to get a chest to keep stuff in first.
LaLa Hugs!
Starry Lala

Grrr. I am very angry. I was minding my own business, enjoying my fishing when I felt something grab onto my leg.%% I was very surprised and stood up. It was those Starry Lala... I tried to doge them, but they were very fast.%% They kept hitting me and running off to tease me. I am so angry, please make them pay for what they did.

I don't know why they came and teased me like that. My hips are very sore from them hitting me so much. My hips are big but now they have swollen even more since they hit them so much.%% Make them suffer for the pain I have right now. {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lala{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are at the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Oh well. I will get some ice for my hips and my head.
I can not even sit down. I have to stand up and keep fishing. They're so sore.
Thank you. My hips are better now.
Midnight Sea Monster
Shark Pirate
Starry Lulu

I do not know what to do right now. My favourite hobby is fishing, I especially enjoy night fishing because it is so calm and quiet. But I cannot fish at night anymore..%% The Shark Pirates and Starry Lulu have banned me from night fishing. Please help me, I wish to enjoy my hobby.

A couple days ago, I was enjoying my night fishing when I heard some strange splashes in the ocean. The Shark Pirate and Starry Lulu appeared on the surface, and remained still for a while.%% Then they came over to me...They thought I was a legendary sea monster! They said if I ever fish at night again, they will make me pay for it. Night fishing is my favourite, please help me.
Ok I guess I'll just have to give up night fishing. I am so sad.
Please complete this task for me before the night comes....I can only trust you now.
I can fish at night again? Thank you, I am so happy. If you need help with anything, just tell me.

Oh no! Someone has taken my bait! I collected lots of Earthworms but someone has taken them all. Huh? No, don't look at me like that. I don't eat them... They are my bait to use when fishing. I collected quite a few of them.%% I guess there are some who might like to eat the worms... I forgive you for your mistake.%% Without some Earthworms I cannot blind fish into biting my hook. So please help me get my Earthworms back.

I always catch many Earthworms and put them in a bucket and keep it in a dark and moist place. I just went to get some more worms and on my way back I saw someone hurrying away. I tried to follow them but I couldn't catch them.%% All my Earthworms were gone when I got back! That person running away must have been the one responsible. I think it was some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Razor Crabby{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, they were heading towards the {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please get my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Earthworms{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back!
Oh well. I guess I'll have to wait for a stupid fish.
Please bring my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Earthworms{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back before they eat them all.
Thank you. I can start fishing again now! If I catch a lot, I will make sure to give you some.
Love Potion (1)
Crabby Roe

Finally I've found it! Wizard Charming's secret Potion recipe! Do you want to know what it is? The recipe for a love Potion...%% A single drop will make your enemy fall in love with you. The ingredients are very hard to obtain. If you help me I will share some of the Potion with you.

Wizard Charming was a very famous wizard. Many people claim he was famous because of the potion. In the end he gave up and admitted it was him who made the love potion.%% To prevent there being more victims of his potion he sealed away the recipe, Wizard Charming enjoyed using the potion himself but didn't want anyone else to be able to exploit its power.%% But I have managed to find the recipe! To make the potion I need {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabby Roe{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. This is an amazing discovery. You can also be proud yourself for being a part of it.
Yes, you might think you do not need it, but later you will regret your decision.
Hehe, I want to make the potion! Hurry!
Well done! But this is not it. There are still many ingredients to gather!
Love Potion (2)
Starry Stock

Oh no, there are too many ingredients. But I cannot give up now, after these initial difficulties the money will roll in, right?%% I need this potion to make me loads of money! Of course, I work hard for people without a chance with love. Now will you bring me some more ingredients?

I require Starry Stock for the medicine. Not just any Starry, the ones from Steven Trading Port are the best.%% Now! Bring me {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Starry Stock{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lolos{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
What do you mean no? You cannot just say no! This is not just for you, it is for everyone who is not being loved.
If I make the love potion, I will try it first. It is not because I don't already have someone who loves me though.
Ok, nearly completed. I'm looking forward to it!
Love Potion (3)
Magic Black Pearl

Now there is only one ingredient left to collect. The name is perfectly suited to any magical potion...a Magic Black Pearl. According to the description here they are sometimes made from Shark Pirates wounds being healed.%% The important thing though is that a Magic Black Pearl is required for this Love Potion. Now you will help me until the end right?

It's not easy to get one of these pearls, but I guess that's not a problem since you are so strong.%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Magic Black Peals{C=0xFF4D0D08/} can be obtained from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. They are very dangerous so be careful.
WE are nearly at the end. Help me out, come on.
{C=0xFFFF5917/}Magic Black Pearls{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are very expensive. Hut! Forgot what I just said.

Ok, Wait. I just need to add this Black Pearl to the mix and then it will be done. Hmm........Done! Now, let me try. Why, this tastes so good. So, how do I look to you? Do I look good? {C=0xFF888888/}(You shake your head){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Hmm, that's weird. I used everything it said on the recipe. Huh? what is this? 'There is no love potion. I am famous because I am charming. -Charming'.
The Rumours Source.. (1)
Shark Pirate
Ah.. This is wrong. There is a strange rumour going around. Have you heard what it is?%% The rumour is that I'm giving things out for free. Would you help me out?

I think the rumour is coming from the Shark Pirates at Steven Trading Port. Recently many different Shark Pirates from different places have been coming to me and demanding free stuff, all these pirates are driving me crazy.%% I think this time it was the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, they were really persistent. I really need your help.
Ok. It's not easy to get help these days.
Please stop those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from spreading more rumours.
Thank you, I hope the rumour will die down now.
The Rumours Source.. (2)
Meteorite Fragments

Wow, there is really no end to this. I have no idea how these sharks are spreading the rumours so fast, I had a load of Shark Deckhands here a minute ago. As soon as they arrived they began demanding many different things.%% Luckily the list wasn't too long, the problem is they took something else... They took my Meteorite Fragments from my display, I was saving them to use later.%% They might not be worth much to others, but they are very important to me. Please help me get them back.

I saw the Meteorite falling from the sky a couple years ago, I ran to where it landed, there was a very large crater and shiny stones scattered all over the place. I thought I could make some good equipment with the fragments.%% I'm not quite skilled enough to make something using those fragments yet though, it's my life long dream to make some special equipment with them. Please bring back my {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Meteorite Fragments{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You, to you, they are nothing but some small stones.
Do you think those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} know what they took?
Thanks. Because of you I can concentrate on my work again.
The Rumours Source.. (3)
Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands

Ha. It's time for me to leave this place. Just now some Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands came by and they asked why I am not giving out free stuff despite the news they hear.%% They said that they will come back, and when they do I must give them what they want or they will tear down my smelter and steal all of my blacksmith equipment. They said telling the guards won't help, they will just come when they are not around.%% I am sorry to ask you for help again but please can you help me out one last time?

Thank you, I didn't thin you would help me again. These day it's not easy to get help from others. I have no idea what they are planning....%% Please make sure {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} cannot come back to my smithery.
Yea? Ok. You won't see me around here anymore. I might move next to Guard Walter.
They don't come while you are away right?
Ah hahaha. Thank you. Now I can keep working here, I am so harry.
How to Face Danger
Starry Lulu
Starry Lolo

How do you face danger? I am not sure how the humans do it, but I do believe it's not too different from how us Drakan face danger. The most important this is to destroy anything that becomes a threat.%% Looking at things from that point of view the Starry Lulu and Starry Lolo at Steven Trading Port are not much of a threat now but they have great potential to be.%% They are not very strong but their numbers increase rapidly, we should destroy this threat now, what do you think?

Starry Lulus and Starry Lolos can survive in almost any environment, but they are weak fighters alone. The main problem is they all stick together in large numbers. Fighting them all together can be very dangerous.%% Reduce their numbers by slaying {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Starry Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You are just going to watch and allow the world become a dangerous place?
There are other dangers in the world, Starries are just one of them.
Good job. You have helped protect our future.
Only The Fastest Survive!
300 Combo

I told you last time how to prevent danger. Now I will tell you what to do when you are in danger. Danger can come from no where, without notice.%% We can try and prevent as much danger as we can, but there are some things we just don't know about. Do you know how to face those dangers?

Fast approaching dangers have to be dealt with quickly. The danger zone may not just be in one place.%% The best to train to become fast is {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, try to achieve a {C=0xFFFF5917/}300 Combo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} there. You will have to learn to be fast if you are to achieve that.
You think you can face fast approaching dangers?
Now is a good time to learn to be fast! Now gogogo!
Yes you are already quick, but don't forget to keep training.
Only the Strongest Survive!
Razor Crabby

There are many ways to face danger. However, sadly, danger comes in many different forms. You may think you are ready but then you are faced by new dangers.%% Such situations will render your speed totally useless. Now, time for you to train something else to keep in your arsenal, of course, you will continue right?

The monsters you cannot overcome with speed are the ones with great defence and health. To them, speed is not a threat.%% To defeat them, what you need is great strength to break their defence and shatter their health. This is the main weapon you must use against them.%% To gain such strength {C=0xFFFF5917/}Razor Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are a perfect opponent. Their strong shell is hard to break.
Without strength, you will regret not training when you are faced with new dangers.
{C=0xFFFF5917/}Razor Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have very strong shells, be careful.
Finally, you have learnt speed and strength. I think you are ready for the final portion of training.
Fighting Spirit!
Starry Lulu, Starry Lala, Starry Lolo

Drakan have higher mental abilities compared to humans. Of course among the humans there are a few who have achieved this higher mental state. But their level is similar to Chanpio over there, who has a very low mental ability compared to other Drakan.%% I am telling you this, so I can teach you the most important thing to have when you are facing danger. Are you ready?

I have managed to overcome many dangers because I have improved my mental abilities through lots of training. I call it having a high mental ability but it's really about having the spirit to never give up.%% My worst enemy is myself. If you give up easily you are just running towards your death. Such spirit cannot be obtained easily, only through training and experience.%% Luckily there is a good place to learn to have such a fighting spirit. Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and take on the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starries{C=0xFF4D0D08/} around there, they are good at lowering your spirit.%% They all look the same, so you'll have no idea how much damage they are taking, they like to distract you by talking a lot too. Don't let them break your spirit.%%
You have been training so hard and you are going to give up now?
Learn to have a Fighting Spirit and become a better fighter.
Good job. I think now you are ready to face any danger thrown at you.
Damn Big Mouth!
Punk Hippo, Biker Hippo, Charming Hippo

Hey, did you know there is a famous fishing spot in the Temple of Water? When I first heard about it I went there, I was amaze at the clear water and many rare fish in there. Because of the beautiful fish I completely forgot what I went in there for.%% I took all of my fishing equipment, including all of my bait I collected too. As I was staring down at the beautiful fish, Hippos appeared out of no where and ate all of my bait! There were very overweight and must have been very hungry, help them loose weight.

The best way to keep fit is to exercise, but the Hippos do not like to exercise. If you pretend to hit them they will run away, that way they will get some exercise.%% If they don't run, then just hit them a bit harder and they will run...
You won't help me? I am sad.
It is not like I hate them, but if I meet them again I will pinch them hard!
Thanks. I feel a lot better.
Dangerous Roe Dish
Puffer Roe

Hey, I heard about a deadly dinner... If you make a Roe dish using Puffer Roe from a Swellfish in the Temple of Water the dish has the potential to kill someone. I think I need to investigate this so such an accident can be avoided.%% I am too weak to investigate the Temple of Water myself, will you help me investigate?

Puffer Roe are kept by Breeding Swellfish, but they are protected by Young Swellfish and Single Swellfish. They think it's safer than being kept by just one.%% Please collect {C=0xFFFF5917/}20 Puffer Roe{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Breeding Swellfish{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Young Swellfish{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Single Swellfish{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the {C=0xFF016295/}Temple of Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Are you really just going to ignore this?
Swellfish are more violent than you may think, so be careful.
So this is Puffer Roe? I have wanted it since I heard the story. Don't worry, I am not going to eat this. I just wanted to have one.
Legendary Bait (1)
Abandoned Quartz Golem
Broken Jewel Golem

Hey! I have some big news to tell you! A legendary bait is in the Temple of Water. Huh? You do not look very surprised.%% Is this just big news for fishermen? To fishermen this is the biggest news you can get! I heard a couple fishermen tried to enter the Temple of Water, but they weren't able to bring back the bait.%% It's a very dangerous place for fishermen. Will you help me?

I would like to know if you are strong enough to bring back the legendary bait. If you try, and then get hurt, I won't forgive myself. If you think you're strong enough please enter the {C=0xFF016295/}Temple of Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and slay {C=0xFFFF5917/}Abandoned Quartz Golem{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Broken Jewel Golem{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to prove yourself.
You are not going to do it because you're not a fisherman? If you ever went fishing, you wouldn't say no to this...
If I have the legendary bait, I will be able to beat Ersil.
Yep you are very strong. This is good, now we can try and get this legendary bait.
Legendary Bait (2)
Golem Core

I will tell you about a legendary bait so listen very carefully. It's the Golem Core. Huh? You are not surprised? Golem Cores can only be taken from Mossy Golems inside the Temple of Water.%% I don't think anyone actually knows that they can be used as bait. If you promise to bring me some Golem Cores I will tell you more.

There was a warrior a long time ago who went into the Temple of Water. He fought with a Mossy Golem and the Golem fell into a large pond when he was defeated.%% The warrior, who happened to love fishing, noticed a huge number of fish suddenly swarm around the Golem.... Isn't this a great story? I really want to experience this too. Please collect {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Golem Cores{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mossy Golems{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the {C=0xFF016295/}Temple of Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You are not going to do it? But it's such a good story.
Ersil told me he has a legendary earthworm for bait!
Wow! So this is the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Golem Core{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?! Thank you, I'm so happy!
Legendary Bait (3)
Rakerta's Tail

Do you know of the fish called the King of the Sea? They are called Sea lions, they are very strong and violent, they are on every fisherman's blacklist. But at the same time every fisherman hopes that one day, they will catch one themselves.%% There is a legend that once a fisherman used a Rakerta's Tail as bait and using this, he managed to catch a giant Sea lion.%% Rakerta's Tail is irresistible to Sea lions, and once they have eaten it, it calms them down making it easy to land the catch. Problem is it's almost impossible to get a Rakerta's Tail, they can be found in the Temple of Water however.%% I really want to catch a Sea lion and become part of history, will you bring me a Rakerta's Tail?

Rakerta is the name of a lizard, but many people say they are extinct. I've heard the Diles like the tail a lot, they grab the tail and let the Rakerta run away after they have cut it's tail off so they can keep collecting more.%% I've heard rumours that {C=0xFFFF5917/}Seafood Seller Dile{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Luxurious Dile{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Temple of Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/} carry {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rakerta's Tail{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I need {C=0xFFFF5917/}20{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Be careful though, the Dile have strong teeth.
So you do not care about Sea lions or Rakerta's Tail? So tell me, what do you care about?
Ersil says he has caught as big as himself!
Wow! You really got some Rakerta Tail! Now I can show off to Ersil!
Book of Sages (1)
Book of Sages Page

Oh dear. This is bad. It's really bad %name%, I had a very important book called the Book of Sages, but it has been stolen! Sometime ago I leant the book to my friends, I had just got it back and was on my way home when...%% ...I was walking through Steven Trading Port when a group of Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands appeared. They told me to hand over everything... All I had was the book. They took the book from me and said they'd use it to make a fire or something.%% I didn't imagine they would want to steal a book... The Book of Sages contains lots of knowledge about this world, if it gets into the wrong hands nothing good would come of it. Please would you get my Book of Sages back?

They said they would use it to build a fire, but if they find out what knowledge is inside the book then they will make use of it. Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands are very violent but also clever.%% I am sure they know how much the book is worth. Please help me %name%.
You think the book is full of useless waffle?
The information in the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Book of Sages{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is very valuable.
Thank you. Huh? Oh dear, someone has made a mess of my Book of Sages!
Book of Sages (2)
Jelly and Red Jelly

Oh dear, something has made a mess of my Book of Sages. Hmmm, this is slime from Jellies and Red Jellies. Argh, this was bound to happen if they were allowed to get too close to any scroll or book.%% This is a big problem, if the slime remains on the paper for too long, it will start to disintegrate. Many great books have disappeared because of the Jellies and Red Jellies.%% It seems my Book of Sages will suffer the same fate too.

Strangely, only the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have this liking for Scrolls and Books.%% Maybe some kind of experiment has been conducted on them, we should prevent them from doing the same thing to anymore books.
You don't have a love for books? I think many people trust %name% will make the right decision.
The number of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are increasing. This means the worlds libraries are in danger!
Although it's too late to save my Book of Sages, we've managed to save many other books! Thank you.
Book of Sages (3)
Purifying Cleanser

Ah! Good news! I have finally found it! How to save my Book of Sages that is... I told you about the Jelly Slime and what it does to paper.%% I looked for anything that would neutralise it and I have found it! It's called Purifying Cleanser.%% The Purifying Cleanser would not only remove the slime but it would also make my book look brand new! %name%, would you get me some?

It's not easy to get {C=0xFFFF5917/}10 Purifying Cleansers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you can only get them from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lala{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please be careful %name%.
The only way to remove the Slime from the Book of Sages is with this Purifying Cleanser. Please reconsider.
Please hurry with that {C=0xFFFF5917/}Purifying Cleanser{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The book is disintegrating more every second!
Thank you %name%. My book is as good as new! If you need anything, please come to me.
Still a Way Off
Starry Lulu

%name%, I went to Kalygon Fleet to test out my sword skills. I started a battle with just one Starry Lulu, even though I've been training very hard the Starry was very strong.%% The battle was just about going ok but suddenly the Starry Lulu called out to his friends. I was quickly surrounded by nearly thirty Starry Lulu. I ran away so I am ok now but I realise I need to train harder.%% However I can't help but think it was a dastardly act. Don't you think so?
I will go to the Starry Lulu again to have a battle, but if he calls his friends again I'll have to run away yet again.%% Will you help me so Starry Lulu can't call his friends %name%?
Ok if you say no I guess I'll have to face another 30 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} alone.
{C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} may be nothing to you, but to me they are a very strong enemy.
Thank you %name%. I managed to finish the battle alone! Although I am not strong, I have hope that one day I will be. Thank you again.
Leo's Necklace
Leo's Necklace

Hey again %name%, I went back to the Starry Lulu for another battle. But it wasn't just me who'd improved their skill. Since our skill level was so similar, it was not an easy battle. But I won in the end.%% Thing is, during the fight I dropped my Necklace on the floor somewhere, I didn't realise and the Starry Lulu took the necklace and ran away. The necklace was left to me by my mother, please help me get it back safely.

I tried to chase the Starry Lulu but I couldn't keep up. The Lulu went into hiding somewhere in {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so I had to give up and come back.%% I cannot just give up this necklace though, it has great sentiment to me, it reminds me so much of my mother....
Ok. I will try to solve this by myself.
I will not cry when I miss my mother, Tears are for the weak...and I am not weak.
Thank you for getting my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Necklace{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back. It will continue to remind me of my mother forever again.
Shiny Equipment!
Crabby Stick

Hello %name%, you will listen to my story won't you? One of the golden rules I've learnt since I started running this shop a couple years ago is that the products have to be shiny!%% Of course the customers come for the useful, powerful equipment but keeping it shiny is also very important. The shinier it is, the more people want to buy it!%% But! I've run out of polish! Will you help me make my equipment shiny again?

I can't find any polish around here, so I am importing it. But as you're aware, since the pirates arrives the imports are not going as smoothly as they once did. The polish I ordered never arrived.%% Luckily I have found something that can replace the polish, they're called {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabby Sticks{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you can get them from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabby{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% They contain a very special oil which is a great substitute to my usual polish, please bring me some.
Oh well... Finding polish is not easy these days.
I tried to use my spit to give it a quick shine, problem is the customers complained about the smell.
Thank you. Now I can make my products shiny again!
I've Had Enough!
Starry Lulu
Starry Lolo

Those Starry! They are so annoying! Ah! Nice to see you young %class%. My people and I haven't been able to visit our hometown since we started working here because of the pirates blockade. Our hometown is very small and there was not much work so we came to Port of the Winds in search of work.%% We work hard despite missing our families deeply. Now we work hard and earn lots of money but we cannot see our family. Please help me.

Steven Jr is giving out special boarding passes to allow residents to get aboard the military ship! Many people cannot visit their home because of all of these pirates.%% I haven't been able to go to my hometown for quite a while now so I've applied for a boarding pass as well. Luckily mine was approved, so I am counting down the days until I can go home!%% I collected mine and my friends boarding pass from Steven Trading Port the other day but on my way back I was attacked by the Starries. They made a hole in my bag and the passes must have dropped out.%% Luckily I know roughly where they must have fallen out so I went back to look for them but the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} keep stopping my search.%% Please stop them so I can search for the boarding pass.
You won't help me? I guess I cannot visit my hometown.
Please help me before someone picks up our Boarding Pass.
Thank you! Now it should be safe for me to search for them.
I Want To Go Home! (1)
Crispin's Pouch

Now all home for getting home is lost. It was too late to find the Pouch which contained the boarding passes, the area where I had dropped it was already swarming with Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands.%% They had the pouch, even though I was scared I asked for the pouch back but they just laughed and left. Please help me. I don't care about my pass, but please bring back my friends passes.

If it was just my own, then I'd bare it, but I'm more worried about the other people who trusted me with their boarding pass. I am the most senior, so they trusted me and asked me to look after it.%% It was them expressing their trust in me, but I've let them down.... I guess I shouldn't have been carrying them around with me.
Please, for my friends... Please.
If we cannot get the boarding pass back, I will have to sell everything I own and buy it back.
Ah, you found them? Huh? Oh no! The Pouch is empty.
I Want To Go Home! (2)
Speak with Croquis

I've searched all over Steven Trading Port but I haven't been able to find a single boarding pass. I'm worried because someone might have taken them.%% Even a pirate wouldn't be stupid enough to go on-board a military ship. I guess I have one last hope...

I don't suppose you know who Croquis is? No? Well he's a Drakan who has been training around Steven Trading Port, perhaps he saw or heard something about the boarding pass.%% Would you ask {C=0xFF00863C/}Croquis{C=0xFF4D0D08/} about the boarding pass for me? You should be able to find him around {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I understand, I keep asking for your help.
{C=0xFF00863C/}Croquis{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is a Drakan. I've heard the Drakan do not answer any questions if you are not close friends with them.
Yes? My name is {C=0xFF00863C/}Croquis{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I Want To Go Home!(3)
Jelly and Red Jelly

Hm. The boarding pass? Boarding pass..boarding pass....I heard something about it... But I'm not sure what they're worth.%% How do I know you will give them back to the rightful owner? You want me to trust you?

Us Drakan do many things to earn the trust of you humans.%% We do not trust words alone, only actions can prove someone's true intentions.%% It has been a while since I trained here, this place is perfect but due to the strange monsters I am having some difficulty.%% Would you hunt some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jelly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so I can continue training? Then I might consider helping you.
Then why have you come to me?
If you just stand around, you will just lose more of my trust.
Now I can trust you. I can just guess the value of the boarding pass.
I Want To Go Home (4)
Boarding Pass

Ok, you've earnt my trust. So I'll tell you who took the Boarding Pass. I'm not entirely sure it was the Boarding Pass, but I think I saw the Sharks around Steven Trading Port with it.%% If you want to know more, I'll tell you the details...

I was on a walk around the word when I saw the Sharks carrying something. I'm not sure about the exact details but they had something which looked just like the Boarding Pass you described.%% I saw the Sharks heading towards {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm guessing those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sharks{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have the missing boarding pass.
Are you going to waste the trust I have given you?
If it's so important to these people, then why aren't they looking for it themselves? ... I do not understand, maybe it's because I am a Drakan...
Hmm? This looks different.%% This is an entrance pass to a famous Inn.. Maybe the Sharks swapped the Boarding Pass with this entry pass.
I Want To Go Home! (5)
Genuine Boarding Pass

It appears the sharks have swapped the Genuine Boarding Pass for an Inn entrance ticket.%% I am not entirely certain about this but this is what I overheard from a group of sharks. They said the boarding passes are begging traded for a high price on the black market.%% Shark Deckhands have learnt of this and are trying to sell them to other people, you must hurry before they sell the boarding pass.

The reason the boarding passes are worth so much is because the Military Ship is very safe and fast, they can fight off any pirates who try and stop them. You don't have to undergo any security checks to get on-board either.%% It's perfect if you're trying to import any contraband, you can hide it right under the military's noses. I am not happy that the boarding pass is not with it's rightful owner.%% This information is reliable, but please make certain and return them to the rightful owners.
You make me angry. Whatever happened to your will to help others?
The problem is with the ones who try and sell the boarding passes, but the blame is also with the ones who are abusing the system.
Thank you. Now I can go home with my head held high. I must go and give the boarding pass back to the people from my hometown.
The Masterpiece (1)
Speak with Sijin

Hello %name%, are you interested in art by any chance? I am very good friends with Guard Sijin at Steven Trading Port. Not just as a simple friend, but as an artistic friend, we compare each others art.%% This time I gave him my best piece yet but he can be very forgetful. If you do go past Steven Trading Port please remind {C=0xFF00863C/}Sijin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} about our art meeting.

It takes time to consider the meanings of different pieces of art so we leave our work with each other for a while and let our thoughts on it develop.%% I do not believe that a piece of art can be valued in just a few moments. True artwork happens when you are in calm environment and you can observe the whole piece.
Well. If you are too busy, I understand.
I am really looking forward to hearing what {C=0xFF00863C/}Sijin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has to say about my work.
What? {C=0xFF00863C/}Victor{C=0xFF4D0D08/} left his work with me? Huh? Art work? Oh no, I completely forgot!
The Masterpiece (2)
Round White Sculpture

Now... Where did I put Victor's Sculpture? Oh no! That's not good. Yesterday I went on patrol at the Decker Shark Piers, I had a feeling I left something there, now I'm thinking it might have been the sculpture.%% Victor loves his work, if you have no idea what I'd have to go through if Victor finds out about this... Please, %class%, I am on duty and cannot leave my post. Please help me...

I've known Victor for quite a while now. We had many things in common. But then Victor started getting into art, and kept asking me to join too. I didn't want to really, but because he was my friend I didn't want to let him down.%% Victor thinks this is his best work yet and has very high expectations. If he finds out that I've lost it he will never forgive me. The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the {C=0xFF016295/}Decker Shark Piers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} here love to collect different things. Maybe they are the ones who took his work. The sculpture was white and round.
Ah! You're just going to watch me suffer?
Ah, what would happen to me if the sculpture is broken.
Oh, thank you. You have saved me from Victor. Huh? This? This is something a made over a month ago to get Victor off of my back. I threw it away!
The Masterpiece (3)
Round Eyed Sculpture

Ah! After I had finished my duties for the day, I went to look for the sculpture around the Decker Shark Pier. I had the sculpture in my sights but suddenly a number of sharks appeared and took the sculpture with them.%% The Sharks said they were collecting everything they thought was hideous. Who would have imagined? Victor's work is famous among the Sharks as well! If Victor knew, he would be very disappointed.%% Right now I cannot leave my post. Please get the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Round Eyed Sculpture{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back from the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sharks{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Decker Shark Pier{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.

Honestly, It's not easy to express what Victor's work looks like. I can't tell him that though....%% If you do find Victor's sculpture, please take it straight to Victor. I don't know what will happen to it if I keep it. If Victor asks about my opinion on it, tell him my thoughts are the same as his.%% He will understand it, one way or another.
Are you going to let my friendship with Victor just finish like this?
I think if Victor makes a sculpture which looks like a Shark, it might be good.
Wow! Finally, my sculpture is back! What did Sijin think of my artistic masterpiece?%% What? His thoughts are the same as mine? Haha. This is my best sculpture yet!
Sad Truth (1)
Starry Lulu
Starry Lolo
Starry Lala

Recently I've been very worried about Leo, I've been looking after him but he keeps going often to a dangerous place. I have told him not to go there but he doesn't stop.%% I don't know what's caused the changes in Kalygon Fleet but the place has become very dangerous since the Starry Lulu, Lolo and Lala started to attack young children. %class%, would you slay these monsters for us?

Children just don't listen to their elders anymore. But we cannot just let them do whatever they'd like to do right?%% Especially since the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Lala{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are attacking young children. Please save the children from the danger in {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
If you don't care about it, then I'll have to stand up and take action on my own. I just feel sorry that I'm the only one willing to do something about this.
Leo could get himself into some serious trouble.

Thank you. I'd like to have done it own my own, but I'm too old for that. So I turned to the right person %name%! Being so strong and reliable enough to defeat any threat to our children. Well, this doesn't mean I would you work for us from now on, hoho.
Sad Truth (2)
Leo's Father's Dagger

I think I've found out why Leo keeps going to Kalygon Fleet. He must have heard what some of the residents here have been talking about... I heard that there is a Razor Crabby walking around Kalygon Fleet with a dagger that looks like Leo's Father's Dagger.%% If we get it back and give it to Leo, I bet he wouldn't go to Kalygon Fleet anymore.

I was very good friends with Leo's Parents. They decided to leave Port of the Winds and move to a different village.... They boarded a ship and set sail to a better land but during their voyage their ship struck a rock out at sea.%% Everyone tried to board the lifeboats and make it back safely to land, but nobody got back apart from Leo. Leo was found on the beach of Kalygon Fleet, he had lost most of his memory about the accident.%% Leo believes his parents were murdered by pirates and misses them a lot. Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and see if you can find {C=0xFFFF5917/}Leo's Father's Dagger{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I believe Leo will keep going to {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} until he finds what he is looking for. Even if I try and stop him, it wouldn't work.
This kind of tragedy is difficult for anyone to overcome. Losing your family...
Oh? This dagger looks like the one my father used to carry. He used to say he'd give it to me when I grew up.
Sad Truth (3)
A Letter from Leo's Parents

When you gave me my father's dagger, some memories of the accident came flooding back to me. On that day, when the ship I was on was sinking, being smashed to pieces by the power of the ocean...%% ...people were yelling, trying to get themselves onto a lifeboat. My parents gave up their lives to get me onto one of those lifeboats, the last thing they said to me is they'd leave a letter, in a bottle, just in case they could not be saved.%% Please help me to find my parent's letter. It is the last thing they would have ever written.

I remember there were many {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} on-board the ship, wandering around leaving slime everywhere and collecting anything made from paper.%% If my parents letter was written on that boat then the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} must have it... No one understands why they have this habit.
I see. Then I will try and find it by myself.
I'm not sure if the letter would have survived, but I've heard that the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Jellies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} have a habit of collecting any papers and keeping them for a long time.
Thank you very much! Finally I can see what my parents last words to me were.
Sad Truth (4)
Captain's Log

This letter doesn't say what happened to them in the accident. They just wrote how much they love me, maybe they didn't want me to know the truth about the accident.%% Doesn't the captain of a ship keep a log of everything that happens, even when there is an emergency. Maybe there is an entry in the Captain's Log of the incident.%% %name% could you bring me the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain's Log{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so I can learn the truth of what happened?

I expect the log would have washed up at Kalygon Fleet, anything found around there usually goes to Kalygon. Maybe {C=0xFF00863C/}Kalygon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} still has the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Captain's Log{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, find him at {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I see. I think it's time to find out the truth by myself.
Even if I discover the truth about what happened, I wouldn't do anything crazy. My parents told me to become a great hero. So that's what I'm going to be.
Thank you so much. Now I have a chance to know what actually happened to my parents. This has been bothering me for a long time.
Sad Truth (5)
Mad Kalygon
Shark Deckhand

I've found out what caused the incident! According to the Captain's Log the ship struck a rock while travelling near Kalygon Fleet while trying to avoid a pirate ship commanded by some of Kalygon's Shark Deckhands.%% The log says the captain was watching the life boat as it was leaving the ship, it says that the lifeboat was overturned in the rough seas while trying to escape from the Shark Deckhands.%% I cannot forgive the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} or {C=0xFFFF5917/}Kalygon{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for putting my family in such danger.%% I cannot change this now though, even if I defeat them, it will only be for revenge. I believe you, %name%, can show us what true justice is.

According to the Captain's Log, the captain and my parents went down with the ship. The record ends as it was saying that they couldn't reach land because of the high seas.%% My parents and the captain must be....
There's no justice in this world.
When I think of my parents, I cannot help myself. I can only think of getting revenge because of my rage. I promised to be a hero to my parents though...So I should keep this promise.
I'll keep trying to become a hero, just like you %name%. I won't forget the justice you have shown to me.
A Pirate Alliance (2)
Speak with Sijin

%name% thank heavens you're here, there's a big problem. Guard Sijin at Steven Trading Port has reported to me there has been suspicious movement in that area but I haven't been able to get any support forces yet.%% There are currently many different defence issues in Port of the Winds and many of our forces are being spread thinly over all the different problems.%% I've reported the report of the suspicious activity directly to my superiors but they cannot afford to spend any extra man power without clear evidence. I believe Sijin may have stumbled on something big here...%% %name% would you help {C=0xFF00863C/}Sijin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} gather evidence?

Sijin is always keeping a close eye on the pirates activities at Steven Trading Port, so he knows about the pirates movements better than anyone else in my force.%% If he think's he has seen something suspicious enough to report it to me, then there definitely must be something going on. ...Of course there have been some false reports, many times, but it's better to be safe than sorry right?%% If we simply ignore him because there have been false alarms in the past, then we are putting all of the residents of Port of the Winds in danger.
You're just like those people in charge of the security. Do you just ignore your subordinates' reports?
I'm worried that Sijin may be in trouble.
Ah! You came here to help me. Thank you so much.
A Pirate Alliance (2)
Starry Lulu

You made a good decision, I believe this is much more serious than Victor's superiors have thought. Problem is I cannot expect to get any support troops because there is not enough evidence suggesting an imminent attack.%% A few days ago I heard one of the Starry Lala murmuring something about pirates from Steven Trading Port and Kalygon Fleet working together in an alliance to plan an attack on Port of the Winds!%% One of the pirate groups involved in the alliance are the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please help me to defeat them.
I'll continue to gather evidence from here to build our case to prove to Victor's superiors that we need support troops. Come back to me when you're done.
You don't want to work with us to identify this threat to Port of the Winds? Should I beg you for help?
I think I think the Starry Lala had just come from the Inn when he was murmuring.
Thank you for your work. I'll focus on finding out what other pirates have been working with the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} on this attack plan.
A Pirate Alliance (3)
Attack Plans

I have another important piece of evidence! The pirates have a document they call the Attack Plans, it documents their strategy for the attack.%% I heard this information from the same Starry Lala and doubted it, but since the previous information turned out to be true.... I have no reason to doubt it. Will you help me get it?

The Attack Plans document their whole attack strategy, we must get our hands on this document. Apparently it's currently in the hands of the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Steven Trading Port [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please bring the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Attack Plans{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back to me.
Well, then I have no choice. I will have to ask my superiors for help.
The Starry Lala seemed to be no part of the main group
Well done. Through the analysis of the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Attack Plans{C=0xFF4D0D08/} we can begin to prepare to defend from the imminent attack on Port of the Winds.
A Pirate Alliance (4)

I have finished analysing the Attack Plans you collected. According to the plans they are going to attack just one specific place in Port of the Winds. It doesn't say where exactly, but we can at least be certain it is Port of the Winds being targeted.%% The plans specify that it will be the Starry Lulu from Steven Trading Port and Crabbies from Kalygon Fleet who will work together to attack the port.%% %name%, please defeat the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabbies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} who are planning to attack Port of the Winds.

We do not know what has caused the pirates to try and attack Port of the Winds yet. Maybe there's something important at Port of the Winds that has caught the pirates interest. Otherwise there is no reason for them to want to attack there.%% I'll contact Victor to find out if anything special has arrived there recently.
I still haven't gathered enough evidence to contact Victor's superiors again yet. Please consider my request again.
The Starry Lala passed by here again, after another evening at the Inn. This time he didn't say anything special though and just fell asleep.
Well done. Now we just have to find who is leading this attack.
A Pirate Alliance (5)
Shark Deckhand

Finally I have a clear picture of what is going on. Today the Starry Lala visited again. He said his group has planned to attack the new Inn at Port of the Winds, but he isn't joining them.%% He said the drinks from the new Inn are very delicious, made with honey and lots of delicious fruits. (Hiccup) Ah, excuse me... I urrr...%% I don't know how the pirates learnt about the delicious drinks at the new Inn. Victor was telling me how crowded it normally is, perhaps the pirates just overheard some of the residents of the port talking about them.%% If the pirates' attack goes ahead, it will not just be drinks that will be stolen, but the people in and around the pub will get hurt.%% Please give us your help %name%.

The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} will be part of the main troop to infiltrate and steal those drinks.%% For the residents of Port of the Winds, slay 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet [Chaos Mode(F2)]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. If they have no troops then they cannot continue with the attack.
You're giving up on saving those delicious drinks, urm, I mean people's safety!
For the residents of Port of the Winds, please stop the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} horrid plan.
Thank you for your hard work. We couldn't have saved these delicious drinks, I mean residents without your help. Would you like to visit the Inn with me after I've finished my duties %name%?
Friendly Letter
Friendly Letter

Ah! %name%. I'm concerned it's been over a year since I've been able to visit my cousin Hime in Moonlight Shore Village. We have been close friends since we were kids but I have been way too busy with work recently.%% If you are going to be heading to {C=0xFF016295/}Moonlight Shore Village{C=0xFF4D0D08/} anytime soon would you take my letter to {C=0xFF00863C/}Hime{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

I have been thinking about Hime a lot recently, I miss the fun times we used to have together, making jokes and making mischief. We have both grown up now and it's hard to find time to meet each other.%% Thank you %name% for offering to deliver my letter.
Too bad. Ah... How I miss the fun times we used to have.
Please get this letter to {C=0xFF00863C/}Hime{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, he will love to hear from me.

Sorry? Sijin sent me a letter? Wait....what does it say...%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}(If you don't send this letter to 7 people, you will have bad luck for years.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Arg! Stupid Sijin sent me a bad luck chain letter AGAIN!
Oh, you lost my letter? No worries. I made plenty of copies.
Welcome. Are you looking for something in particular?
Don't Swing a Mace At Me!
Spiked Mace Mummy

Arg!! That stupid Mace Mummy has made me mad!! Hear me out! I always travel around the sanctuaries in each region. It is exciting to find out all of the hidden secrets of each sanctuary.%%% I was just visiting Skippy Sanctuary when suddenly a Spiked Mace Mummy bumped into me holding a humongous mace. He swung it at me, I sidestepped quickly to avoid the mace but fell to the floor. Look...I ruined my new clothes?!%%
He doesn't even think about what he is doing. Someone should teach the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} a lesson.
You are just scared. Show me you've got some guts.
What made him do such a thing. Such a spoiled kid. Actually, I have no idea how old the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is...
Haha. That Spiked Mace Mummy must have learnt a lesson or two.
Don't Throw Bones At Me!
Skull Thunker

Ahh. I've got a big lump on my head! I went to Skippy Sanctuary again to gather some herbs and all of a sudden, bones starting flying straight towards me! SMACK was the sound it made when it hit my head.%% I quickly got back to my feet and there were several Skull Thunkers watching me. Those brats were throwing everything they had at me! Bones, Cutters, and whatever else they had.%% I rushed out of the place, but I still have a big lump on my head. What a horrible thing to do! Someone has to teach those {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Thunkers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} a lesson.
I don't get what made them this troublesome. Probably no one took good care of them. Just look at how skinny they are!
You're not going to help me at all? Fine! Then don't expect to get any of the herbs I collected!
At least I was only hit on the head by a bone! What if it was a cutter? What a nightmare....
Thank you. Now I can go finish gathering herbs.
A Nasty Itch (1)
Aloe Vera Plant

Arggg. Save me! Itchy! So itchy! Scratching just doesn't help! Don't you feel itchy? Not at all?! Life is so unfair!%% Do me a favour! Please get me some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Aloe Vera{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to calm my skin.

Argh! I can't help it!%% {C=0xFF888888/}(Hime wildly scratches his feet){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Arg! Still itchy itchy. Scratching doesn't help with athlete's foot.%% The only thing left I can try is an {C=0xFFFF5917/}Aloe Vera Plant{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, they can be found in {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Many of the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spectral Knights{C=0xFF4D0D08/} carry it with them.
If you reject my request, I'll give my itchiness to you!
No more pain for me please. This itchiness is driving me crazy!
Thank you. This will relieve the itchiness, but I don't think it will cure the problem.
A Nasty Itch (2)
Skin Cleanser

I'm so tired. Nothing seems to cure my itchy skin. Hm? What am I not saying I have athlete's foot? Shh! I don't want to be known as the man who has athlete's foot. The villagers think I'm a very neat person.%% Anyway, the Aloe Vera Plant you got for me cannot cure this problem...

I need some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skin Cleanser{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, it contains a disinfecting ingredient. I guess that's why {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} often keep it... It's the only thing that keeps them from rotting away.%%
You are just being mean to me.
Arggg. So itchyyy! Be quick! Get me the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skin Cleanser{C=0xFF4D0D08/} pleaseee!

Thanks. Now I shall make a proper Itchy Skin Treatment by combining the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Aloe Vera Plant{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skin Cleanser{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you got for me. I'll be a millionaire!
Tattered Bandage
Obtain a Tattered Bandage

Hi there %name%! I have a big problem! I gave wrapped some of the village people's wounds with bandages I got from Mirinae Sanctuary, but they haven't worked at all.%% Worse than that, their symptoms have deteriorated since I used the bandages. I really need to find some better bandages, some with a positive healing effect. Would you help me find them %name%? Please.

I heard that the bandages from Mummies in the Underground Graveyard are very good. Because the Mummy monsters use it, I can guarantee they must have some kind of positive effect.%% Please go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Underground Graveyard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to collect 15 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Tattered Bandages{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
It's awful that you're willing to just ignore these poor villagers suffering in such horrible pain.
Please hurry up. They're hurt and waiting for help.
I've got to do my rounds and treat the villagers using this bandage. Thanks for you help %name%! It's appreciated.
Who is the Criminal? (1)
Talk to Jess
Talk to Hunter G
Talk to Larell

%name% I have a big problem. The ring Claire entrusted me with has gone! I've checked all of my drawers, but it seems someone must have broken into my home and took it while I was out!%% Please help me. I have faith that you'll be able to work this out %name%, please!

I have suspicions that either Jess, Hunter G or Larell took the ring. They have been acting suspiciously in the last few days, it's very out of character for them.%% {C=0xFF00863C/}Jess{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is obviously a thief with a big interest in Jewels, {C=0xFF00863C/}Hunter G{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has been having a very hard time and is struggling to make ends meet, and {C=0xFF00863C/}Larell{C=0xFF4D0D08/} has many secrets and no one knows who he really is, so I guess they are the most suspicious people.%% Go and talk to them for me and let me know if you notice anything out of the ordinary!
Are you busy? Ok then well... I wish you could have helped out...
You have to find that ring!
You don't think any of them are guilty? It can't be... Ok, I'll have to check this myself. Thanks for checking this out for me.
What? Have I seen Swirl's ring? Why do you ask? Eh? What's that look for? Do you suspect that I'm involved in this? I know that I'm a Sneaky Thief, but I have no interests in a cheap ring!!!
A Ring? What ring are you talking about? I have no time to focus on stealing a ring, even if I am starving these days. I have a lot of work to do.
Ring? I don't know anything about jewellery! You know me. Why is everyone bothering me, even you?! I'm tired. Let's discuss this another time...
Smith's False Teeth
Obtain a Strong Tooth

I've been working on designing a new weapon recently. Yesterday I was out walking when I saw a huge shark in the sea, it gave me some great inspiration for a new weapon. Do you want to know what it is?%% Okay, listen to me carefully, I'm only telling you this. The weapon is a Strong Tooth you place over your own tooth you use to attack a target by biting it!%% Okay, good. To create the weapon, I need a few materials. Can you help me collect them?

Go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Underground Graveyard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and collect teeth from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Slithers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! I heard a rumour that they have very sharp and strong teeth. I need just 15 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Strong Teeth{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You won't do that for me? Hmm... I shouldn't have told you about my weapon idea in the first place.
Strong Teeth! No one can beat this! Strooooooong Toooooth! How' does that sound? I made the theme song for it.
Oh! Great. I'm going to make this right now. If you come back after having all of your teeth removed I'll make you a Strong Tooth for only 100 gold.
Who is the Criminal? (2)
Defeat Katler
Ha! I was one of your suspects last time you can to see me and now you're asking me for clues? Did you find the criminal? .... Well... Did you? Then you must be interested in my information. Huh?%%

Well, now you're interested... I'll give you my information in exchange for a favour.%% Have you been to the Underground Graveyard before? My Thief guild always used to meet there but now a monster named Katler is down there and he gives me a headache.%% Since he arrived it's just too dangerous for us to go down there. I'd like you to go and deal with {C=0xFFFF5917/}Katler{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and clear the way. Then I'll give you the information you'd like to know.
You don't want to hear about the clue?
Shouldn't you be gone defeating {C=0xFFFF5917/}Katler{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Hurry up!

Well done! Okay, I'll tell you what I know. A while ago, a ring that looked just like Claire's appeared on the Black Market, one of my lads saw the guy who's trying to sell it.%% It was hard to tell who he was, his face was covered but it must be a young guy. It must be a young guy who knows Swirl well.%% The curious thing is that Swirl doesn't have many people around him like the guy in the Black Market, no young guys at least.%% Can you tell that something strange is going on? We don't know. Maybe Swirl made this whole thing up.
Headache in the Underground Graveyard
Defeat Graveyard Mummies
Defeat One-eyed Mummies
Defeat Master Sprinters
Defeat Slithers

Arg. Feeling dizzy wizzy. My headache is getting worse and worse! It's just terrible, It's all because of the monsters in the Underground Graveyard making lots of noise and not letting me sleep. I need sleep....%% Will you save me from this headache please?
Hurry down to the Underground Graveyard and defeat 30 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Graveyard Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I can't stand the noises they're making anymore.%%
I thought we were friends...
Arg. Dizzy wizzy. The sounds from the Graveyard are driving me crazy.
So is it quiet down there now? I'm very relieved. Thank you %name%.
Explore the Underground Graveyard
Underground Graveyard Monsters

Business has slowed during this recession, customers just don't buy these days. I think I need something unique to grab their attention. Ah! %class%. Have you heard the news?%% Apparently there some treasure hidden in the Underground Graveyard located in this village. Will you help me find it, please you very kind %class%?
Defeating monsters may be the fastest way to find the treasure hidden down in the Underground Graveyard. Head down there and slay 200 monsters for the investigation!
If you can't, then that's okay. Sigh, my children are starving. They are crying for food. But without your help, what can I do. Ah, I don't mind. It's ok just my children are hungry, sigh.
Oh! You're still here? The seeds aren't going to find themselves.
How was the investigation? No treasure? Hmm I got this information from a reliable source. That's all right, thanks for your help!
Frank's Tricks
Defeat Bone Frag

This is a serious issue. The situation is getting worse day by day. From what I see, young people only pursue a comfortable life with no desire to face challenges, seek adventure or help save the world!%% I think this is the time that heroes should rise up to save these people. Ah! I think you're one who can give me some help with this?

I'm impressed. If you stand up and give people encouragement they'll realise what they're missing. Go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Underground Graveyard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bone Frag{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I'll reward you for your effort and let people know how great this work is!%% If this works I'll prepare a weapon for you too!
I'm starving and you won't help me? I don't know what to say.
Haven't you gone already? I'm trusting you to be back soon.

Did you defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Bone Frag{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? I think your achievement will entice young people to face up to challenges.%% Everyone dreams of becoming a hero... Anyway, here is the reward I promised. It's not a lot, but please take it.
My Stolen Cheese
Claire's Cheese

Hero, what should I do? It's really bad... I lost the cheese I prepared for my children...%% While I was carrying them to the warehouse some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Master Sprinters{C=0xFF4D0D08/} turned up and stole all of them from me! Please help me.
