I saw the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Master Sprinters{C=0xFF4D0D08/} head towards the {C=0xFF016295/}Underground Graveyard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} with my cheese! Could you get 20 of my cheeses back? I'm not strong enough to do this myself, so I'm asking for your help.
What can I do for my children if we have no cheese?
Did you find the cheese? Please bring the back to me.
Now I can give my children delicious cheese. Thank you!
The Future Mercenaries (1)
Rusty Sword

Hey! Where are you going? When I see you rushing around like that it reminds me of when I had just joined this mercenary clan. As I was the new guy it took me a little time to adjust to being part of the clan, but I have some very fond memories of it now.%% Back then the clan used to be very strong, no one would dare challenge our clan. I miss that time. I think it's about time we got our strength back and become legendary again. Can you help me out?

I'm happy that you're willing to help me! I hope we can protect the villagers once we become strong again like before. First, I need to prepare some things.%% Please help me prepare! First defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Headless Fencers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the {C=0xFF016295/}Underground Graveyard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and collect 15 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rusty Swords{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from them for me. I've already told Claire to expect some swords so you can take them straight to her.
I thought you'd help me out with this project...
I don't know what you're doing here still! Please hurry.
You brought the swords that Thomas mentioned to me! Hand them over to me so I can get to work on them. Well done fine %class%.
MingMing's Revenge
Defeat Ratler

You are good at fighting right? A few days ago my little kitty called MingMing went to the Underground Graveyard all on her own, I didn't think anything of it. At least...not until he got back and won't event get out of his cage anymore!%% He gets frightened every time he sees anything now, even a little rat! I think someone picked on him and he got scared, please help me find who picked on MingMing.

Since he seems to jump at the sight of a ray I think the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Ratlers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in the {C=0xFF016295/}Underground Graveyard{C=0xFF4D0D08/} did something to him. Please take revenge on them for MingMing. I doubt you will have any trouble.
You can't? Maybe you're too weak to face this fight... I see...
You're still here? Hurry up and do something for MingMing's sake.
I think MingMing will be feeling better soon thanks to your help. Thanks %name%.
Dabbling in Fashion (1)
Smooth 'Brick Red' Fabric

Hey there %name%. Nice weather right? How are you these days? I haven't seen you come to the bank in a while. Is everything ok?%% A couple days ago I started a night job making clothes. Yesterday I received my first order, hehe. Since it's my first order, could you help me?

I need some cloth to create the clothes, but I haven't managed to collect enough because of my bank work.%% If you could go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary Arcade Mode F1{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and collect 15 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Smooth 'Brick Red' Fabric{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummy Boxers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} it would be fantastic!
I'm sure you can help me. We all help each other right?
Please bring me some Smooth 'Brick Red' Fabric! I want to make some passionate clothes.
Thank you. I will start working on the clothes tonight. It's my first try. You think I can do it.. Right?
Dabbling in Fashion (2)
Delicate Bead

%class%! Wait.. I have completed the clothes. Do you want to see? Ok! Three - Two - One!! What do you think? ... ... ... ... ... ....%% I...Is it... bad...? ... This is my first try after all, I can improve right?%% Would you help me improve the clothes?

I think I need to accessorise with some beads, then the clothes will look far more elegant, like a beautiful blossom. Huh? What? It's ok, you won't understand.%% What's important is the fact that it need some beads! Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and retrieve 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Delicate Beads{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummy Fighters{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% The beads will make the clothes shine! When you have the beads, please deliver it to Cindy.
Ah... I thought you understood fashion... You really cannot see the value of these clothes can you?
I think I have a talent for this. My clothes are so good.

What is this? Where is the cute and chic design that I wanted? Are you sure this is for me?%% I guess I went to the wrong person. Phew... Her feelings might get hurt, just tell her that I'm satisfied.
Two Treasures in the Sanctuary (1)
First Jewel

Hello friend! I've had some amazing news! I don't want anyone to hear this, so come close..closer...%% Do you know about Skippy Sanctuary behind this village? The news is about the sanctuary if you're interested?

I heard about this a little while ago... Did you know that there is a great Jewel in the Sanctuary? According to the legend, there was a hero a thousand years ago who died protecting this very village. The villagers made a sanctuary and buried him there with two Jewels.%% There is a rumour going around that the hero has come back to life and is protecting the Jewel, but it's only a rumour.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Clubbers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I overheard that a couple of the Skeleton Soldiers have a piece of the first jewel. Collect all 5 the pieces of the Jewel.
Tsk? Are you rich? If we can get that Jewel, we will be rich!!
I can smell the Jewel... Hurry to the sanctuary!
This is the Jewel? It doesn't look very expensive. I am sorry.. I guess I've wasted your time. I don't have lots of gold, this is all I can afford to compensate you.
Two Treasures in the Sanctuary (2)
Second Jewel

Hey buddy! So what we tried last time didn't really work, but don't look so disappointed. I've found some information about another treasure! Hahaha!%% How did I find this? It's nothing special, it's just what I do! These days, knowledge is power. You're interested in this, aren't you?

Anyway, as we're not sure if there's anyone who's after the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Second Jewel{C=0xFF4D0D08/} please hurry! Head over to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and find the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Lord of Night{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I've heard rumour's that he is a legendary hero. After you defeat him, I guess we'll find out if that's true.%% I'll wait for you here %name%.
Don't be silly!
There are a lot of things you can buy if you become rich!
This looks expensive, but it's not as good as I expected. So it turns out that the rumour wasn't true. It's really hard to find reliable information.
Wicked Skull
Defeat Skull Runners
Hey could you hang on for a second? I have something to tell you...

I'll keep it short. I keep having crazy nightmares over and over, I think the strange sounds coming from Skippy Sanctuary are the cause.%% If I hear those sounds, I always have a nightmare. I know what is making the sound, but I can't kill it myself. So I'm asking for your help.%% Please go to Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1] and defeat 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Runners{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me.
You're saying no? I thought you were a good person... Maybe I was wrong.
If you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you'll see the monsters making the wicked sounds.
Thanks, hopefully that will stop those nightmares!
Nasty Skull
Defeat Skull Thunkers
Arh! They're really killing me. I can't believe how nasty they are, it really bothers me. You'll help me right? I really need your help.

A few days ago the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Thunkers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} started throwing stones whenever I tried to take a nap. I cannot sleep at all! I don't sleep much even without all of these distractions, I cannot stand it anymore!%% I really need you to defeat them and stop this nightmare.%% Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Thunkers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please!
You don't want to? Ok..I see...
Find the nasty ones in {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat them. Please!
Thank you. I will sleep better now.
Immature Skull
Defeat Skull Clubbers
This is too much to take. Would you help me with something?

Some Skull Clubbers have been coming to my Graveyard and damaging the Gravestones! This is a very cruel thing to do, they're so immature. I think they need to be punished for what they've done.%% Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 15 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Clubbers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to teach them a lesson.
You're not going to help me? What's wrong with you?
You're still here? You know I don't have much time right?
Thanks. Finally some peace and quiet.
James's Unusual Request
Defeat Blue Spectral Knights
What did I do? I can't believe that I made that up! I think I must have lost my mind. It's all Frank's fault! Do you have some time?

Even since I was young I haven't been the active type. I much prefer crunching some numbers instead! That doesn't mean I deserve to be treated like this, does it?%% Frank keeps teasing me about it, so I got really angry and lied. It's all because of Frank! I really need your help.%% I told him that I'd been to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and slayed 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Blue Spectral Knights{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please do it for me.
You're doing a terrible thing. What should I tell Frank?
Frank came by asking me about the details! Please hurry, go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm begging you.
Have you taken care of it? Phew. That's a relief. I'll ask you more about it later. When I've calmed down.
The Future Mercenaries (2)
Rusty Helmets

Hey. I've got some good news for you. You have been a great help to me, so I'm willing to let you join my mercenaries without the usual admission fee. Here's the admission form for you.%% What? You don't want to join? Fine! But this doesn't mean I won't be asking for more favours.

As you're aware, I run the mercenaries. I'm holding the swords you collected for me the other day in storage.%% This time I need you to obtain some armour. Would you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Blue Spectral Knights{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to collect 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Rusty Helmets{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Mercenaries are cool! I won't let you in!
Have you not left yet?
Ah. Look at all of them! My mercenaries will be full of brave fellows.
The Secret of His Birth
Talk to Claire

Hi %name%. I feel a little tired today. Did you have a good nights sleep? You didn't have a bad dream did you?%% I can't remember the last time I had a dream, it seems that people don't dream as much as they get older. I must have had many dreams in my lifetime, but I can't remember any of them at all!%% I can't even remember where I was born or where I grew up. I'm curious about my past and I've found a little clue about it. Do you want me to tell you?

When I went back to my house the other day, someone had left me a letter. There was no writing, but just a picture, it seems to be of me when I was young.%% The thing is, the background of the picture seemed just like {C=0xFF016295/}Claire's Inn{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I was wondering if {C=0xFF00863C/}Claire{C=0xFF4D0D08/} knows anything about my past.%% Please ask her if you knows anything about the picture and let me know what she says.
Really? You do seem very busy. Then I guess there's no way for me to find out. I'll keep living with this curiosity.
Who am I? Where am I from, where did I live?
Larell's childhood? Hmm... Well, I don't know.%% This inn is part of a franchise, so many have a very similar interior design. I cannot tell where it is from the picture, sorry.
New Townsite (1)
Defeat Mallet Mummy
Defeat Mace Mummy
Defeat Spiked Mace Mummy
What a fabulous opportunity. You're here. I think everything is falling into place perfectly. Are you busy? I have a new business plan, you really don't want to miss it.

This is top secret, so lets keep it between you and me. I've entered into a business partnership with Rudolph from Port of the Winds to develop a new town.%% The new town will be called Winery Village. We expect lots of visitors to come and relax and taste our great wine. But there's a small problem...%% We found a great place to build the new town, but there's monsters all over the place! Would you do a favour for me please?%% Just head over to {C=0xFF016295/}Parmir Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mallet Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
This is such a fantastic plan, why are you not interested?
You've defeated them already? Awesome! OK. Soon we can begin the construction. Please accept this reward.
Environmental Protection (1)
Talk to Rudolph

Have you heard about the Winery Village project? I can't believe our sanctuaries are being allowed to be destroyed and have a Winery Village built over the top of them!%% This is ridiculous! I shall stop this!

For years, I have been living in Moonlight Shore Village as a Graveyard Keeper! We cannot allow our Cultural Heritage be destroyed just because someone wants to build a new town over it...%% It's just not worth it! I suspect Jess is behind this plan... I guess since it's going to be a winery village, without Rudolph's support the plan cannot proceed.%% Please try to persuade Rudolph that we cannot destroy our heritage!
Sigh...is this the beginning of the end for Moonlight Shore Village?
Please hurry! The sanctuaries could be destroyed at any minute!
Pardon me? I thought Winery would be fun for everyone... It may destroy the environment? I shall reconsider this plan then. Thanks for the information.
Cute Fossil
Retrieve a Cute Fossil

Oh dear, I am in trouble. I made a promise to Claire that I can no longer keep. Claire asked me to collect some fossils to decorate her inn...%% I spent all night searching for fossils and found a fair few, but they've all been stolen from me! What should I do? I can't tell Claire about this, would you help me fine %class%?

Could you bring them back to me? Please, I've lost a total of 20 fossils.%% The {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spectral Dragon Knights{C=0xFF4D0D08/} took them from me in {C=0xFF016295/}Parmir Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please find them and give them to Claire!
You cannot help me? Oh well...
What should I tell Claire?
Oh! Now I can decorate my inn! Thank you.
Best Chef in the World (1)
Shark's Fin

%name%, have you heard? Soon the Best Ramen Chef competition will begin. Last year I was too busy to participate, but this year I'm planning to enter.%% As you may already know, my Ramen is very famous in Moonlight Shore Village Hoho! I wish to treat my children with something nice when I win!%% If you're not too busy would you mind helping me collect some ingredients?

The Ramen I'm planning on making is Shark's Fin Ramen. Doesn't it sound tasty? I'm planning to use the Shark's Fin as a garnish in the Ramen. Hoho.%% The ingredients are very expensive, so I cannot afford them. If you would get them for me, I am confident that I can win.%% Please would you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary {C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummy Boxers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring back 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark's Fins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
No? Oh well...
Some onion, spring onion....Radish, and..... And...
Thank you. If I do win, I will treat you to something nice! For now, here is a small reward.
Best Chef in the World (2)
Sack of Grain
Sniff... Hello. I am very sad right now. Do you want me to tell you why?

I have been researching what makes the best Ramen, because I want to enter the Best Ramen Chef competition. I prepared a special type of noodle just for the competition from a special flour I purchased.%% While I was bringing it back though, some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Blue Spectral Knight {C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} stole them from me!%% Please. Help me find them again.
Oh well. I will have to drop out of the competition.
I have faith in you %name%. Please find them for me.
Thank you!! I nearly gave up hope. I should be able to start preparing again now. I will practice harder and I will win. If I do win, it's all thanks to you!
Best Chef in the World (3)
Mummy Jerky
Hey! You! %class%! Why are you in such a hurry? You're hungry? Looking at you reminds me of the Ramen my mum made me when I was young. Would you like to know what it is?

When I was young my mother would cook me a very special Ramen. It has a very strong flavour, made with a rare Jerky, the taste is unforgettable. I am planning to enter the Best Ramen Chef Competition with this Ramen.%% To run the mercenary clan we need gold, and by winning the competition, I think the prize will help us out quite a bit.%% Would you bring me 20 pieces of {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummy Jerky{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? You can get them from {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crimson Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
If I win, I was planning on buying you a potion... What? You already have plenty?
The longer you chew a piece of Jerky, the better it tastes!
Wait! Let me taste a piece to make sure it's the right one. (Chewy Chewy)%% Hmm! This is it! Thank you %name%. I owe you one.
Hammer Robbers
Defeat Sparks
What shall I do? This is the last Blacksmith Hammer I have! I keep ordered loads of hammers, but the Sparks stole then while they were on their way to me. I need help! Please!

Do you know how much equipment I repair each day? Yeah, I need many hammers.%% I ordered lots of new hammers, but Sparks have stolen them for some reason.%% I really need your help, I can't survive the rest of the day with just one hammer. Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 15 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Sparks{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
I really need some more hammers!
Ah my last hammer... I can't continue much longer. I need a new hammer.
Thank you, It's safe for me to order new hammers again.
Good Blacksmith
Defeat Mage Dudu
Ahhh! Friend. I was looking for you.%% I have some problems I think I can trust you with. You're a nice and generous person.

Villagers often come to me asking for help, I never have it in me to say no! Sigh.... I should have rejected the requests that I can't do at least.%% Villagers often go to {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to pick mushrooms but {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mage Dudus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} often attack them. Please could you go there and defeat 10 of them?
No? Sigh... I should learn how to say no to the villagers.

Oh! You've done it already? Wow. So quick!
Service for Residents
Torn up Receipt Piece

Hmm. I don't feel good. I wish I could turn a blind eye to it, but the truth is, I saw what Frank did. He was throwing receipts away! Our merchants pay their taxes based on what they earn, and receipts are the proof of our earnings. If there are no receipts, we can pay less tax.

It's not right to just ignore this, but if I report it, Frank will be angry that I reported him.%% I guess firstly, we should collect the receipts. I saw him throwing them away in {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Runners{C=0xFF4D0D08/} were picking up the pieces, see if you can collect any.
Should I just ignore this? Alright... Thank you for dropping by anyway.
I don't know what to do. What should I do about this?
Thank you %name%. Let me have some time to think about what to do.
The Merchants Code
Talk to Smith

Hi there heroes. This depression in the economy has put me in a really tight pinch! Actually, I was caught by the police because I did some bad things.%% I knew that I shouldn't have done it. It's simple really, if you do something wrong you have to be ready for the punishment.%% I feel disappointed that {C=0xFF00863C/}Smith{C=0xFF4D0D08/} was the one who reported me to the police.
Ha...I don't know what to say. It's best if you go to {C=0xFF00863C/}Smith{C=0xFF4D0D08/} I think.
When will this depression go away?
Sigh...I feel irritated.

Hey. Frank says he's disappointed in me? I don't know whether it was the right choice for me to make, but I had to report this as anyone should.... But I don't feel good about this either.%% Thank you for visiting me to convey his message though. Let me talk to him.
Running a Farm (1)
Talk to Florence

Hi! It's so sunny these days, huh? There are fewer travellers compared to last year even with so many bright and sunny days. I'm worried if I can afford to take care of my children with such a low income.%% I don't suppose you are heading to Odelia?

Actually, I borrowed some land from James a few days ago and I'd like to plant some fruit there. I'd like to cultivate the cheese apples that I liked when I was little.%% I've been worried about what I need to do because I have never done anything like this before.%% I heard that {C=0xFF00863C/}Florence{C=0xFF4D0D08/} knows what to do. Would you go and ask her about it for me?
Is it too much to ask? I thought you might do me a favour...
I've told my children that we're planting the trees, they love the idea so much... I'll look forward to seeing you again next year.

Cheese Apple? I didn't know that you'd know about this. It's impossible to get this apple nowadays.%% There's no place suitable to grow it. They can only grow in dry, windy places, but all of those places are the best for monsters to live in.%% Because of this, everyone gave up trying to grow the apple trees. I doubt anyone can find one.
Running a Farm (2)
Obtain Apple Seed
Apple Seed? Umm I am not sure. You may get one. But it can be hard to find one.

Ok here's what I know about the seed. I heard a rumour that the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummies{C =0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} may have the seed.%% As Claire is planning on starting a Cheese Apple farm you will need at least 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Apple Seeds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. If you're lucky you will find enough of them. Go straight to Claire if you do.
Well? OK. If you don't want to taste the Cheese Apple...
Oh! You're still here? The seeds aren't going to find themselves.
So, this is the seed? Oh. It looks weird! Thank you.
Running a Farm (3)
Defeat Skull Thunkers
Thank you %class%. Could I just ask one more thing of you? If that's ok? I'd like to take care of it myself, but what can I do, I'm a little old lady.

I have the seeds, tools, and the place to plant the trees, but the real problem is this. In the area James gave to me are many Skull Thunkers, they're very dangerous.%% Would you please defeat 30 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Thunkers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to clear the way for my farm, for me?
Yeah, I guess you already helped me get the seeds... I've already asked too much of you.
Sorry for asking for your help again. Come inside and have some tea, hoho.
Oh my... Thank you! I'll plant the seeds there right away. Please come to see me when the place is full of apple trees!
Old Friend (1)
Talk to Victor
Hello %name%. I bet you have seen so many places on your travels, haven't you? Have you ever been to Port of the Winds?

At Port of the Winds there's a guard keeping the town safe, just like me. His name is {C=0xFF00863C/}Victor{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, have you ever met him? We used to be real close friends when were little.%% Since you're probably going to be passing by sometime on your adventure, please give him my best regards!
If you're busy, it's okay... {C=0xFF00863C/}Victor{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is doing fine I'm sure.
{C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} isn't near here, so I cannot just go and see him, even if I'd like to.
Eh? Did you come here to tell me how Swirl is getting on? It's very nice to hear he's ok! I was wondering what he's been up to recently.
Old Friend (2)
Obtain Pincers
Hey. Are you off to find a new adventure? If you're on the way to {C=0xFF016295/}Moonlight Shore Village{C=0xFF4D0D08/} would you do me a favour?

Would you stop by {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and collect 10 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Pincers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from Razor Crabbies? Swirl really likes to eat Pincers so much. I can't go by there myself, so I'd really appreciate your help.
You can't? Aww, Swirl probably hasn't had a chance to have them in ages. Are you sure you can't help?
I'd like to remind Swirl how tasty {C=0xFFFF5917/}Pincers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are. He really used to like them a lot.
Ah! These are my favourite! Mmm Pincers! Thank you so much! I haven't had a chance to have these in a long time.
Old Friend (3)
Crabby Claws Lunch Set

Hey again %name%. Can you smell this? Hehe. I've made a very delicious meal using the Pincers you collected for me.%% I've already eaten as much of it as I could and made a Crabby Claws Lunch Set with the leftovers! Want to know what I plan to do with it?

Since you like adventure so much, would you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and take this tasty {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabby Claws Lunch Set{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to {C=0xFF00863C/}Victor{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
You can't go? So my friend cannot try my tasty pincers dish again?
The food is getting cold. Could you please hurry up? It tastes best when it's hot!
What's this? I can smell something good. Huh? Swirl made me a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crabby Claws Lunch Set{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Wow it looks so yummy! Thank you %class%!
What's that? You were brining me a Crabby Claws Lunch Set, but you ate it?! Hmm.. Your stomach seems to agree.
I love all food with Pincers in it! Thinking about Pincers really makes my mouth water.
Who Ate My Herbs?
Defeat Spectral Dragon Knights
Hi, good to see you again... What? I look tired? Ah...Well I am under a lot of stress because of my business...

Umm. What am I concerned about? My best selling potion is made from some special herbs, but I'm running out of them! I've never had a herb shortage before.%% Recently some Spectral Dragon Knights have been invading my Herb Grove regularly. Would you please stop them?
Soon, my best selling potion will no longer be for sale.
Please hurry! The herb grove is almost completely destroyed.
Now I feel better. I think I can gather all of my herbs now. I really appreciate your help, you've taken a weight off of my mind.
The Future Mercenaries (3)
Defeat Mace Mummy
Defeat Spiked Mace Mummy

Come here! Have you decided to join my Mercenary Army? No? Well maybe you're not ready for the change just yet! Recently, the preparations to refresh the mercenary clan have been going better than I expected.%% Well, at least until yesterday anyway. There's one think I'd like you to help me with.

I sent the weapons you brought to me before to Libra so they could be repaired... They were meant to be sent back as soon as they were done. But there's one problem.%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are blocking the road back. I need those weapons as soon as possible!

Environmental Protection (2)
Obtain Focusing Lens
Arh. This is a nightmare! What can I do? What can I do?!! Will you help me? I'll offer you a good reward.

Rudolph in Port of the Winds has invented a Solar Powered machine. He has asked me to create a Focusing Lens that can concentrate the solar energy.%% I said I'd do my best and produced 20 Lenses, but on my way to deliver them yesterday...%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Spiked Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Parmir Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} robbed them from me! I..I need them back, please get them back for me!

Did you get my lenses back?
Thank you! Thank you! Now I can deliver them this time!
New Townsite (2)
Talk to Rudolph

Oh? Yes I made them. This time 'm hiring some mercenaries to be my bodyguards on my way to deliver the Lens. As long as Thomas's Mercenaries come, I will feel relieved.%% Ah! But Rudolph may be waiting for this lens. If you have a chance to go by {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} could you let {C=0xFF00863C/}Rudolph{C=0xFF4D0D08/} know that the Lens will be delivered soon.
Great! Thanks. Now what's next...
Well. Ok then...
Great! Thanks. Now what's next...
Morning. (You explain what happened).%% Ah. Yes. I was expecting the lens by noon. So the delivery has been delayed, eh? Ok! Thanks.
Protect Village (1)
Warn Thomas

Hey! Listen! I saw something strange on the mountain. The monsters were all lined up, it looked like they were preparing for something.%% They're probably planning to invade somewhere. We must let the village know so they can prepare!
Hurry. It looks like they were almost ready to attack. We should let {C=0xFF00863C/}Thomas{C=0xFF4D0D08/} know immediately! He's just over on the bridge.
What? What do you mean no?
I must gather everyone around! Hurry up!
What? Monsters? Ok. We are not going to sit here and do nothing. We're going to be ready. Thank you for the heads up.
Protect Village (2)
Obtain Lunch Bag
Hurry! We're in a rush. You look confused. Ah! Here, I'll tell you. You can laugh after I clear things up.

Blue Spectral Knights in Mirinae Sanctuary have been a problem for us recently. I ordered food for the warriors for this battle, but the Blue Spectral Knights attacked the convoy wagon and stole all of our lunch bags!%% I can't believe they stole even our food!
Ok..So you're not hungry right now... Maybe you will be soon.
What are you waiting for here? Eh?

Ah. Brilliant. I'm full now. A big breakfast is just what every warrior needs! A big guy like me always needs energy. Haha.%% So, do you want to learn how to fight? Ask me anytime, of course....you will need to treat me to a big lunch.
Protect Village (3)
Defeat Skull Clubbers
Defeat Skull Thunkers
You do know what the best defence is? Yes! The best defence is a good offense. I think now is the time to move in. You! Go first!

Good! I'm glad you agree. We will have to attack from different directions. While we finish our preparations you can being from one side, be careful out there, we need to win this battle.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and slay 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Clubbers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and 20 {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Thunkers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm counting on you.
Am I talking to a coward? Eh? Eh?
The stupid monsters won't expect us to attack first! Now go warriors!
Ah. Now I feel that the enemies have become weak. Take this for your effort. Do you like it? Hahaha.
Protect Village (4)
Defeat Crimson Mace Mummies
Defeat Mummy Boxers

Hahaha! Our last attack was perfect. I think we have really lowered their morale. I'm nominating you as the top solider in the battle!!%% Now, we cannot rest, we must prepare the next attack. Of course, you will help me, right?

Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. There you should find {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crimson Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummy Boxers{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I have reason to believe they are preparing for another attack. We should hit them before they come to us! Haha! Show them what we can do!
What? Hmm.. Well we don't need you anyway. We have our own mercenary!
They will not believe we will attack first! Let's protect the village!
You can fight well, compared to how weak you look! That's good! Even the enemy are scared of you young %class%.
Protect Village (5)
Obtain Artis's Battle Plan

Hahaha! The battle is getting more interesting. We're almost there. All thanks to you being part of our team!%% I haven't seen such a brave %class% in a long time. I think you will turn out to be the hero who saves our world. I believe you will be the one who ends this battle once and for all.

I heard news that Artis in {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is in charge of the plan to attack the village. According to some basic strategic principles, if we capture the leader, we can capture the rest easily.%% I can deal with this myself, but I have a ton of laundry piles up... Would you bravely defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Artis{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and bring back his {C=0xFFFF5917/}Battle Plan{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
What? You have piles of laundry to do too?
You can meet {C=0xFFFF5917/}Artis{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary [Arcade Mode F1]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Don't hesitate to show your strength!

Our strategy was perfect! It worked flawlessly. With my wise plan, and your bravery we have successfully saved the village from the monsters.%% We should keep this news a secret, just between you and me. If the villagers found out, they become to scared to stay here. Thank you for your discretion. Here's your reward.
Challenge (1)
Deliver the Challenge

Argh! He is really getting on my nerves!!! Listen to me!%% I bumped into Equipment Merchant Frank this morning... He was teasing me about making less sales than him!%% He has really hit a nerve, I don't think I can stand it. You have to help me save my pride!
I shall make him feel sorry!! Take this Challenge to Frank for me, he's nearby.
Are you rejecting my request? This is a super simple job.
I shall prove that I have great pride and ambition as a merchant! Huh....? Are you listening?

Hello there. Yes? Oh, that kid Hime sent me a Challenge? Hahaha. Ok! I'm accepting this challenge. Merchandising is not just based on luck, but service and experience.%% Smile at customers like me, and anyone can be a successful merchant. Great. You can tell Hime that I've received his Challenge.
You lost the Challenge? No worries. I'll write a new one.
What are you up to?
Challenge (2)
Tell Hime the Ingredients

Thanks again for the Challenge Letter you delivered to me. He's still a kid at heart, getting angry over something small like that. I guess I have to accept the challenge. So could you help me with one thing %name%?
Inform him that on this day next week, we will check our profits and whoever has made the most will be the winner. This is going to be fun. I will teach him how to run a business.
What? You help him, but refuse to help me?! I'm too busy to leave my market to tell him myself.
A weeks profit will clearly show the winner.
Aha! So he want's to challenge it that way? Ok! Interesting, thank you friend.
Challenge (3)
Mummy Boxer
Friend! My Friend! I have ordered a special potion so I can win the challenge with Frank, but I've got word that the delivery is being blocked by Mummy Boxers. Can you help me out?

Thank you. You should find the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Mummy Boxers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} blocking path of the delivery in {C=0xFF016295/}Belkan Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please defeat 30 of them. I have to beat Frank!
I opened my merchant store before Frank..
The delivery is on it's way! Please hurry! Clear the path for me.
Thank you. Really! I will sell the potion and beat Frank for sure.
Challenge (4)
Red Herb
Ah, you are here! I have sold so many potions this week!%% If the sales continue like this, I will easy break Franks record! But there's a problem, and I need your help.

You are always nice to me. The special potion I made this time has quickly become one of my top selling items. Some customers are complaining about it's bad smell though.%% It works perfectly, I think I can sell even more if I improve the smell. Red Herbs can make it smell better, but the Red Spectral Knights stole what I had left the other day.%% Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Belkan Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me and get my {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Herbs{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back. 30 Should be enough.
You can't? Sigh. I thought we were friends.
I have everything I need, except herbs. Could you get back the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Red Herbs{C=0xFF4D0D08/} I lost?
I knew I could count on you. Take this, just a little something from me. Hehe.
Challenge (5)
Green Herb
I must work faster! Could you buy 1,000 potions from me? If you can buy that many, I may beat Frank at this challenge!%% No? I thought so. Could you help me with something else instead?

I put the Red Herb you got for me into the potion. The smell improved greatly, but the potions effect was weakened. People are not happy with it, I need to add something else to improve it's effect.%% {C=0xFFFF5917/}Green Herbs{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from {C=0xFF016295/}Belkan Sanctuary's{C=0xFF4D0D08/} {C=0xFFFF5917/}Crimson Mace Mummies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} could do the trick. I'll need about 20.
You reject to help me? Fine! Then I reject you!! Tsk.
I don't have enough profit... I need a special potion.
Thanks. It's all up to me now! I will show Frank!!
Sleeping Pill (1)
Tell Hime the Ingredients

Wait! I need a favour! A little while ago, {C=0xFF00863C/}Hime{C=0xFF4D0D08/} Hime was asking me how to create a sleeping pill.%% The last time I made one, was a long time ago, but I managed to find out how from an old medical book...

You need a Poisonous Pumpkin, combine it with the rest of the ingredients, and boil it for 3 hours... That should do it. Please deliver the list of ingredients to {C=0xFF00863C/}Hime{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. He's here in Moonlight Shore Village.
No? I thought you would help me out. I guess I was wrong.
You are still here? If you change your mind, do tell me.
Larell sent you? About the sleeping pill? Poisonous Pumpkin? That's what I was missing! Thank you.
Sleeping Pill (2)
Poisonous Pumpkins
Now I have the recipe for sleeping pills, but the problem is I don't have the ingredients! Would you help me gather the ingredients, please?

I really want an eagle pet. That's why I'm creating a sleeping pill, so I can capture one.%% Would you get me some {C=0xFFFF5917/}Poisonous Pumpkins{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? I really need this ingredient. You can get it from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Pumpkin Heads{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I need 15 if you could!
Too bad, I could really use your help.
How are you getting on with the task? Please hurry!
Great! Thanks. Now what's next...
Sleeping Pill (3)
Skull Blood
The Sleeping Pill is almost ready. I can't wait to use it to capture an eagle. I've always wanted to have a pet bird. Will you help me get ready to use it?

My plan is to attract an eagle using the Skull Blood. Eagles go crazy over it, so I'm sure this plan will work.%% You can get it from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Barrel of Bones{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I need 5 of them please!
No? Ah... I'm so close to getting an eagle.
Well? Have you got me the Skull Blood yet?
Now I am ready to get my a pet bird. Eagles are my favourite. You will see me with my new pet eagle soon! Haha. Thank you.
Lost Memo
Retrieve Mercenary Note
Oh dear, this isn't good. Are you busy? Can you help me out?

I lost the contract note for our mercenary clan when I was in {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I put the note in my bag, a {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shroom Soldier{C=0xFF4D0D08/} must have stolen my bag when I was resting.%% The note is crucial to us, this situation is really not good. Could you please help us try and find it?
I am disappointed, you have no mercy!
What am I going to do? The note has a very important message...
Ah thank you! I'm so glad to get the note back. I wish to repay you for your help. It's not much, but please take it.

Speak with Leo

Hello %name%! Have you heard about the brave young boy called {C=0xFF00863C/}Leo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% It was a very sad story to hear about. Would you deliver a message to Leo for me? Tell him I'm looking out for him.
Thank you. I hope there are no more poor people.
You're not going to Port of the Winds? Oh well, ok. Thanks anyway.
Please, don't let there be any more sad people.
%class%! Hey. Long time no see. What can I do for you?%% Really? Sofia is looking out for me? Tell her I am very grateful.
The Offspring's Mind
Speak with Jeremy

I am ashamed with myself %name%. I've never told my Grandpa how much I love him. His health is getting worse everyday...%% I need to tell him before it's too late. I find it hard though, I'm too shy. I look like an idiot right?
Please tell Grandpa Jeremy that I love him.
Yes I know. I really should tell him myself.
Please. Pass on the message to my Grandpa.
Leo? He said he loves me? Heavens! I've got some dust in my eye... Haha, thank you, I guess I am a very happy man.
Shared Thought
Speak with Leo
Ah you're back. Could you help me out?

To me, Leo is a priceless treasure. I would like to tell {C=0xFF00863C/}Leo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} something. Would you pass on the message? I am old and sick, it's not easy for me to say such a thing to him. Please help me out.
You're not going to help this old man? Come on...
Please pass on my message to {C=0xFF00863C/}Leo{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Really? He also loves me too. I am in his debt. %name%, you should also tell the ones you love.
How to Get Rich! (1)
Defeat Fist Dudu
Hey, hey! Where are you going? Listen to me.. Are you looking after your assets? I'm sure you're doing well and don't need my advice, but if you can space a minute... I have an opportunity for you.

I have found the perfect piece of land to invest in. There's just one problem... Fist Dudus are living on the land.%% Could you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 20 First Dudus, check the land out yourself while you're there. Everyone is happy then right?
You are not even going to listen to me? I'm disappointed.
You're still here?? Come on hurry up!
Remember, you must clean the land. Then we can being the real investment. Once that's done we can start to earn money, create a new village. Everyone wins!
How to Get Rich! (2)
Defeat Dudu
Are you busy at the moment?%% Those Dudu have caused so much trouble We need to teach them a lesson!!!!!

A while ago, I went to see some land with some investors... Suddenly loads of Dudu came out of no where and started attacking us! Our investor, William, was hurt!%% We should not show any mercy to the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Dudus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} who attacked us humans like that. Go and teach them a lesson. I am not angry just because of the money...
I am beginning to get angry with you too!!!
How dare they attack William, I will not forgive them!
You punished them? Hmm! I am still angry about it! But thank you so much anyway...
How to Get Rich! (3)
Defeat 100 Monsters in Dangerous Caverns
Oh! Please help me! William is impressed with you for taking revenge on the Dudus.%% If you can help me once again, I think we can rescue this deal. Are you interested?
If the number of monsters decreases, William will invest, I hope. Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Dangerous Caverns{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat 100 of them. I think that should be enough.
Ah please. This is not something I can do alone.
Are you leaving soon?
Thank you! Thank you! Here's your reward. You can drink these delicious potions as much as you like.
